chapters.title: Chapter 701
chapters.body:
Chapter 701

It was no wonder that the Mysterious Heavenly Palace was able to make a full retreat from the Boundless Mainland during those years. Their overall strength was indeed amazing.

As they advanced inwards, even if the speed of the two attendants leading the way were not that fast, it was still the speed of an individual with a Fifth Jewel cultivation base. The scenery on both sides constantly passed them as they advanced deeper for approximately an hour. By then, they were already in the mountains.

As they were walking, the terrain in front of them suddenly became steep as it turned into a slope that was almost 70 degrees. Fortunately, there was a flight of steps already dug into the mountain wall, so it made the climb slightly easier. Of course, the easiness only pertained to a Heavenly Jewel Master. If it were an ordinary person, the climb would still prove difficult even if they used both their hands and feet.

It was only after they went up the steep mountain wall for a full thousand meters that the terrain became almost flat.

Finally, when they reached their destination, the mountain breeze began to pick up, and as the clouds blew from the mountain winds, it brought a cold and moist stream of air.

As they continued pressing forward for about seven minutes, they entered a barren clearing with no vegetation. Zhou Weiqing and Shangguan Bing’er could not help but feel startled when they saw the scene before them.

Anyone who saw it in front of them for the first time would likely be shocked as well. The scene in front of them was truly too shocking.

There was already no proper path ahead. Below them were sheer cliffs and precipitous rock faces. In the bottomless abyss, one could only see the misty clouds floating in the valley. The bottom was definitely not visible to them. This terrain continued extending on both sides and formed an extremely huge circular terrain.

It was like a horrible crater that was made by a huge artillery shell. In that deep abyss, at the center of the sheer circular cliff, a completely upright mountain column stood erect. What was most fascinating was that there was actually a pure white castle at the peak of the mountain.

Zhou Weiqing and Shangguan Bing’er did not expect that the headquarter of the Mysterious Heavenly Castle would actually be located at such a dangerous place at all. If one did not have the ability to fly, it would be an almost impossible mission to leave the palace from within once the roads leading out of the castle were cut off from the outside world.

After calming themselves down, Zhou Weiqing and Shangguan Bing’er discovered that the Mysterious Heavenly Palace and the outside cliffs were connected with iron chains. There were at least a hundred iron chains connected to the cliffs on all sides. However, even if there were iron chains, if one had an inadequate cultivation base, it would still not be that easy to get through from above.

The two attendants looked at Zhou Weiqing simultaneously. Although they did not speak, it was obvious they were asking if Zhou Weiqing and his partner would have difficulty passing through the cliff. The truth was, as long as they were careful, even Heavenly Jewel Masters with a cultivation base of Three Jewels would face no problem traveling over the iron chains. However, because of the deep abyss underneath, it might be difficult to pass through if one was not mentally strong.

Zhou Weiqing smiled indifferently and answered them with his actions. He tipped his toes on the ground and in a flash, he was already on the iron chain. A faint azure light radiated from his back, and under the influence of the Heavenly Wind Attribute, his body was propelled forward as if it was sliding rapidly on the metal chains. Also, under the influence of the Heavenly Wind Attribute, the mountain winds would automatically disperse when it reached him.

To the two attendants, it seemed like Zhou Weiqing had applied his skills to achieve this. However, if they could see Zhou Weiqing’s wrists under his sleeves, they would be shocked to find that there were no Power Jewels there.

That was the power of Heavenly Dao Energy. Zhou Weiqing only used the wind element in the air to propel his own body forward. It was not his own strength at all. At that time, he was like the wind.

Generally speaking, after Heavenly Jewel Masters had broken through to the Heavenly Dao Energy, the most efficient element to control were the Atmospheric Energy which had the same attribute as their own Elemental Jewels. And once Zhou Weiqing had attained that level, the benefits were too obvious. There were six attributes in his Elemental Jewel, and he also had the powerful Six Ultimate Skill Manipulation Formation. Those, combined with the ability to commune with Atmospheric Energy, made him more powerful than the average Heavenly Jewel Master.

The distance from the edge of the overhanging cliff to the Mysterious Heavenly Castle was a full kilometer, but with that kind of sliding speed, it was just a moment’s effort for them to arrive on the other side.

At the entrance of the Mysterious Heavenly Castle, two of Zhou Weiqing’s acquaintances were waiting there. There were impressive double sun emblems on their blue robes. They were Meng Xing and Nie Han, the two God Tier Master who had tested Zhou Weiqing abilities as a God Tier Master the other day.

Although it was not the first time he met Meng Xing, Zhou Weiqing was still stunned. She was also wearing the same attire and there was also a double sun emblem on her chest.

“Good day to both of you.” Zhou Weiqing greeted the two God Tier Masters. However, his eyes were mostly on Meng Xing. The love of beauty was a trait all people had, let alone the lustful Little Fatty Zhou. His pair of eyes easily revealed his salacious gaze.

Meng Xing did not seem to care that he was staring at her. She smiled faintly and said, “Congratulations, God Tier Master Zhou for becoming an Honorary Master of our Mysterious Heavenly Palace. Please enter.” The two God Tier Masters had personally welcomed Zhou Weiqing. This showed how highly the Mysterious Heavenly Palace thought of him. He was the main star of the banquet today. The two attendants retreated after they gave a respectful bow.

As he entered the Mysterious Heavenly Castle, Zhou Weiqing’s eyes brightened. The Mysterious Heavenly Castle was not considered luxurious. However, the interior decor and architecture seemed to have been carved from some kind of jade that he had never seen before. However, they seemed to have the ability to gather Atmospheric Energy.

As he followed Meng Xing and Nie Han in, he smiled and asked, “The Atmospheric Energy here is indeed dense. Do the both of you usually live here?”

Meng Xing nodded and said, “We usually cultivate inside the Mysterious Heavenly Castle. However, when we’re researching and making scrolls, we’ll go to the valley where Master Zhou previously resided at. After all, it is quieter and more suitable for us there. In the future, we’ll be fellow associates. So, Master Zhou, you can just address me by my name.”

As she spoke, she turned her head towards Zhou Weiqing and revealed a stunningly beautiful smile. Her pair of beautiful watery blue eyes seemed to be capable of speaking. They seduced Zhou Weiqing, making his heart thump rapidly.

Suddenly, he felt a sharp sensation on his back. It was Shangguan Bing’er lightly pricking his back with her fingernail. Only then did Zhou Weiqing snap out from the shock. He smiled and said, “Then, the two of you should also address me by my name in the future.”

As they conversed, they arrived at the second floor. The huge arched door was open inwardly, leading into an extremely spacious hall.

Many people had already gathered in the hall. When they saw Zhou Weiqing and company entered, the people inside stood up. Aside for the innermost four people who remained silent, the rest bowed to them.

“Greetings, Honorary Masters.”

Zhou Weiqing was one who could handle himself during such occasions. He smiled faintly and nodded. Meng Xing and Nie Han did not express anything. They just led him and Shangguan Bing’er to continue walking inward.

Zhou Weiqing looked around casually, but he was secretly in shock.

There were at least a few hundred people gathered in the spacious hall at the moment. Most of the people were seated at the back, and there were only about twenty seats in the center. From the emblems on their chests, one could see that those who sat at the center were at least Elders. The four innermost elderly men who stood up but had not bowed, all possessed extremely amazing Heavenly Energy fluctuations. Without a doubt, these four were the Supreme Elders.

However, those who were not Elders should not be underestimated. Those present had at least two crescent emblems on their chest. Despite there were more than a hundred people in the hall, there was not a single person that was lower than Zong Tier. Even those at the edge who had the lowest cultivation base were Seventh Jewel Masters at the Lower Heavenly Zong Stage. The fact was that these people were all Heavenly Jewel Masters!

What an enormous and terrifying force! If these people were to go all out, it would not be a problem for them to swiftly sweep across a small country. This was especially so for the four Heavenly Emperor Tier Supreme Elders who gave Zhou Weiqing a considerable amount of pressure.

Under the guidance of Meng Xing and Nie Han, Zhou Weiqing and Shangguan Bing’er were taken to the innermost position. They were even seated in front of the four Supreme Elders.

There were still four seats left inside. Meng Xing allowed Zhou Weiqing to take the first seat on the left while Shangguan Bing’er took the second seat next to him. As for Meng Xing and Nie Han, they sat down on the two seats opposite them.

From the arrangement of the seats, it could be seen that the God Tier Masters’ ranking in the Mysterious Heavenly Palace were actually higher than that of the Supreme Elders. Of course, that might be just what could be seen on the surface. The Supreme Elders still had more say when it came to internal affairs of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace. However, that was also enough to show the importance of God Tier Masters to the Mysterious Heavenly Palace.

“The Palace Master has arrived.”

Upon hearing the announcement, the powerhouses of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace who were originally seated stood up once again. From the side door, with four attendants by his side, Dongfang, the Palace Master of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace, walked out from the back until he reached the main seat where he stopped.

“Greetings, Palace Master.” Everyone, including the four Supreme Elders in the Mysterious Heavenly Palace paid homage to him loudly.

At this moment, the difference in status became evident. In the outer circle, all the experts of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace who ranked below the rank of Elder kneeled on the ground. However, the Elders at the core only bowed. The only difference with the Supreme Elders was that they did not bow as low. The God Tier Master, Nie Han also bowed slightly. What mildly surprised Zhou Weiqing was the fact that although Meng Xing stood up, she did not show any intention to bow. She just stood there quietly.

“Everyone, please stand up.” The Palace Master of Mysterious Heavenly Palace, Dongfang, waved his hands as he spoke with his usual neutral voice.

For an unknown reason, despite it being the second time he had heard this voice, Zhou Weiqing still had doubts as he felt that this time. The voice seemed somewhat different. However, he could not seem to nail down what exactly was different.

Dong Fang did not sit down. He continued standing as he said with a smile, “Today is a day of celebration for our Mysterious Heavenly Palace. All these years, although the two Honorary Masters, Meng Xing and Niehan, have spared no effort, our Palace’s High Level Consolidated Equipment Scrolls remain rather scarce.”

chapters.title: Chapter 702
chapters.body:
Chapter 702

After pausing for a while, Dongfang continued. “This time, we’re fortunate to have invited the reclusive successor of the Strength Legacy. The addition of the Honorable God Tier Master Zhou will surely increase the overall strength of the palace to the next level. As you can see, Honorable Zhou is very young. He is also the youngest God Tier Master in the history of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace and the Mainland. In fact, I believe even in that distant Boundless Mainland, it’s impossible that they would have such a young powerhouse.

“From now on, I urge everyone to respect Honorable Zhou like the way they respect me. I also hope that Honorable Zhou will produce more God Tier Consolidated Equipment Scrolls. This is also relevant to all of you present here. Come, let us toast to this historic moment.”

Next to the seats, several tables with all kinds of food and drinks had been placed there. When the Palace Master of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace summoned them, everyone stood up in unison and toasted Zhou Weiqing respectfully. “Congratulations to the Honorable Zhou for joining our Palace.” The two Honorable and four Supreme Elders also simultaneously got up and congratulated Zhou Weiqing for the first time.

After the toast, the Palace Master of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace looked in the direction of Zhou Weiqing, however, because there was a crystal barrier where his eyes were on his mask, Zhou Weiqing could not see the expression in his eyes.

“Honorable Zhou, please say a few words,” the Palace Master of Mysterious Heavenly Palace said with a smile.

Zhou Weiqing nodded as he gave an indifferent smile. With a glass in his hand, he turned toward the crowd of Mysterious Heavenly Palace powerhouses. “Thank you for your well wishes. I’m Zhou Weiqing. Although I’m fortunate enough to be a God Tier Master, I’m really very young. With regards to Cultivation Base, I’m far inferior in comparison to all of you here. When it comes to the creation of God Tier Consolidated Equipment Scrolls, I’m also inferior compared to the Honourable Meng Xing and Honourable Nie Han.” Having said all that, he paused for a moment, leaving the people below confused.

Nobody could understand why Zhou Weiqing would say those useless words that belittled himself.

“However, perhaps there is one thing that I have an advantage in. That is the speed of producing Consolidated Equipment Scrolls. As long as there are enough materials, no one in this world can be faster than me in making Consolidating Equipment Scrolls. Certainly, there was no one previously and I’m afraid it’s probably impossible to have anyone who can beat me in the future as well.” Although his tone was calm, the words were very on the mark.

The moment that remark was out, even though the Palace Master of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace was still around, the people below were in an uproar.

Arrogance, that was absolute arrogance! As the saying goes, one should always stay be respectful before flaunting their strengths. With his previous self-deprecating statement and the absolute confidence in his arrogant declaration, it caused an uproar among the high-ranked officials of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace. Even the four Supreme Elders could not help but frown slightly. Zhou Weiqing had said too much without any reservations at all.

Zhou Weiqing turned around to face the Palace Master of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace. He bowed slightly and said, “Please Lord, forgive my blunder. Since today is a welcoming reception for me, I only wanted the seniors of Mysterious Heavenly Palace to understand me better. Will you allow me to show my skills? I prefer to let my actions speak for me.”

The Palace Master of Mysterious Heavenly Palace hesitated for a moment, but he soon nodded to Zhou Weiqing and gestured for him to go ahead.

The eyes of the two God Tier Masters, Nie Han, and Meng Xing, who were sitting at the side, were radiant. Although Zhou Weiqing was extremely arrogant ever since his arrival at Mysterious Heavenly Palace, the strength he displayed had also deeply shocked them. Therefore, when Zhou Weiqing said that he wanted to demonstrate his strength again, the two God Tier Masters were, of course, more than willing to take a look.

Different from the other high-ranked officials in the Mysterious Heavenly Palace, there was almost no competition between the ranks of the God Tier Masters. The reason being that the status of a God Tier Master would never change. Instead, these gentlemen needed to have a good relationship between themselves in order for them to be able to improve their abilities in making Consolidated Equipment Scrolls by communicating with one another. Therefore, they looked forward to Zhou Weiqing demonstrating his strength again because it would surely be beneficial to them.

After they saw that the Palace Master had nodded, everyone’s eyes were focused on Zhou Weiqing’s body. Especially those higher-ups that were sitting around the periphery of the Elders of Mysterious Heavenly Palace. Their eyes were zealously watching Zhou Weiqing.

It was a known fact that the Consolidated Equipment Scrolls produced by the God Tier Masters were reserved only for those in the upper echelons. Aside from the Palace Master, next on the list to be given access to the scrolls were the Supreme Elders; the core disciples of Mysterious Heavenly Palace members, the Elders and a total of 2 God Tier Masters. Moreover, the production of high-level Consolidated Equipment Scrolls required a lot of resources and time. Therefore, those below the level of the Elders would not have an opportunity to obtain Consolidated Equipment Scrolls produced by the two God Tier Masters. However, with Zhou Weiqing’s participation, it would be different this time around. With an additional person, the speed of making Consolidated Equipment Scrolls would be much faster.

Naturally, they did not expect to obtain the God Tier Consolidated Equipment Scrolls from Zhou Weiqing. That was unrealistic. However, even a Consolidated Equipment Scroll made from the hands of a God Tier Master would be much better than the ones made by an ordinary Consolidating Equipment Master. Therefore, when Zhou Weiqing said that he was the fastest God Tier Master in history regarding the speed in making Consolidated Equipment Scrolls, how could these high officials of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace not view him in a new light?

Naturally, all their thoughts had been seen through by Zhou Weiqing’s eyes. The reason why he acted with such eminence was to quickly obtain the approval of those high-level members of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace. Supreme Elders were certainly respected, but in Zhou Weiqing’s opinion, they were not as good as those high-ranking members amongst the Elders. Those people could be easily won over. If he could, in the shortest possible time, demonstrate sufficient strength and obtain their approval, the mission to Mysterious Heavenly Palace could be completed in the fastest time.

“Bing’er, come over.” Zhou Weiqing waved at Shangguan Bing’er.

Shangguan Bing’er got up from her seat and went over to him. Zhou Weiqing’s lips were moving as he said a few words to her. Shangguan Bing’er nodded slightly. She turned around with her back facing Zhou Weiqing.

Under the indescribable gaze of everyone, Shangguan Bing’er bent over with both her hands on her knees.

Her action looked a little weird. Her perfectly round buttocks, covered by the blue robes of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace, was tilted in Zhou Weiqing’s direction.

Despite knowing that Zhou Weiqing would be sensible enough not to do anything inappropriate, this was still quite a shameful position to be in. As such, her delicate face blushed.

Although in terms of visual impact, Shangguan Bing’er did not possess the looks to stun people in the same way Meng Xing might, her appearance was not inferior in any way. At the same time, her temperament was entirely different from Meng Xing. Meng Xing’s temperament was similar to the noble temperament of Princess Cai Cai while Shangguan Bing’er belonged to the gentle and elegant type, similar to the gentle girl-next-door. The main difference between these two traits made Shangguan Bing’er seemed more approachable and more attractive, making people feel like caring for her, while in men’s minds, Meng Xing could only be described as a Goddess.

Therefore, when the crowd of senior people saw Shangguan Bing’er posing in such a position with a touch of blush on her charming face, they could not help developing a favorable impression of her. Those high-level members were generally not young. At this age group, there was little impulse to engage in the carnal behaviors of men and women. Instead, there was only a benevolent form of love that came from the bottom of their hearts.

However, in the very next moment, the affection on their faces disappeared and was replaced by shock, absolute shock.

A strong, dark golden light radiated out from Shangguan Bing’er’s body like great waves in streams of succession. A pair of incomparably huge dark golden wings suddenly unfurled on Shangguan Bing’er’s back.

When they felt the strong surge of Heavenly Energy fluctuations, the two God Tier Masters, and four Supreme Elders, who were the closest, all stood up. An extremely powerful pressure almost directly smashed on Shangguan Bing’er’s body.

“Stop.” A clear and cold shout sounded. That managed to stop the four Supreme Elders from dropping their powerful pressure directly on Shangguan Bing’er’s body. The person who spoke out was Meng Xing. Although the four Supreme Elders stopped and did not strike, their attention was still fully trained on the pair of wings which had unfurled on Shangguan Bing’er’s back. It was shocking to the audience.

Without a doubt, the four dark golden lights had shown everyone that this was a God Tier Consolidated Equipment Scroll! The enormous pair of wings on Shangguan Bing’er’s back was a God Tier Consolidated Equipment Scroll outfit!

People with lower cultivation could only perceive it visually. However, for those elders above the Heavenly King Tier, their impact was far greater. That was because they could already see that the enormous pair of wings on Shangguan Bing’er’s back was not just a simple God Tier Consolidated Equipment, it was a Set! A Consolidated Equipment Assembly Set! That was definitely the best God Tier Consolidated Equipment in existence. Her God Tier Consolidated Equipments were already comparable with the Legendary Sets, not to mention her four-part assembled wings that might be a part of a Legendary Set. That alone was enough to call it the world’s best God Tier Consolidated Equipment!

Meng Xing and Nie Han were naturally the most knowledgeable. After shouting at the Supreme Elders, Meng Xing subconsciously looked toward Nie Han. She also saw the same astonishment in her eyes reflected in the eyes of God Tier Master Nie Han.

They both knew very well that if they wanted to produce these types of Consolidated Equipment, it was not possible to collect the materials in a short period of time. Moreover, it could not be completed by a single God Tier Master. Even if the two of them worked together with sufficient materials, without a few years of preparation, they would not be able to produce such a high-grade God Tier Consolidated Equipment.

When the enormous wings spread out, the wingspan was almost 10 meters long. As Shangguan Bing’er bent forward, it was as if two long, narrow tables unfolded in front of Zhou Weiqing.

Shangguan Bing’er had arrived together with Zhou Weiqing. Therefore, what he wanted to reveal was naturally this set of God Tier Consolidated Equipment Assembly Wings.

However, Zhou Weiqing’s following actions were a clear indication that this was only just the beginning.

chapters.title: Chapter 703
chapters.body:
Chapter 703

The instant Zhou Weiqing lifted both of his hands up, the Consolidating Papers fluttered out of his hands piece by piece. A sheen of pale green light appeared on Bing’er’s pair of gigantic wings as she shook off the Consolidating Papers that landed on them. Above the huge, wide-open wings, the papers fit snugly in a neat position.

The divine Wind Attribute wings had a wingspan of ten meters, and they were fully covered with about 50 sheets of Consolidating Paper.

With Zhou Weiqing’s cultivation, naturally, it was not necessary for Bing’er to help him at all. However, he had only revealed that his cultivation base was at the Fifth Jewel. Naturally, he could not make himself stand out too much, and it was vital for him to conceal his cultivation base. Otherwise, it could let slip the secret that he had already mastered the Heavenly Dao Energy if he showed his proficiency. He would definitely be treated as a monster by the Mysterious Heavenly Palace’s high-ranked officials. Not only that, they would undoubtedly be more guarded against him.

What was he going to do? 50 sheets of Consolidating Papers? Did he really plan to use all of them to make Consolidated Equipment Scrolls? That would take a f*cking long time, wouldn’t it? There might be no point in having the banquet today.

Although everyone who was present had doubts, nobody dared to stop Zhou Weiqing at that moment. They could not wait to witness what powerful technique this new God Tier Master was going to show them, and if he was worthy of the title Honorary Master.

Zhou Weiqing waved his hands again. This time, 50 tiny crystal bottles appeared out of thin air. Each of the bottles held a different type of Consolidating Ink in it. Slowly, every one of them landed on the 50 Consolidating Papers respectively seemingly aided by Shangguan Bing’er’s Wind attribute.

This time, even Meng Xing and Nie Han could no longer sit still. Almost at the same time, the two of them walked out from behind the desk. They stood in a trance behind Zhou Weiqing. This was because the both of them could clearly see that the Consolidated Equipment Scrolls that Zhou Weiqing was about to make were actually 50 sets with completely different functions respectively.

Turning around, Zhou Weiqing flashed a smile at Meng Xing. “Meng Xing, can you lend me two Consolidating Brushes, please? I only have my usual one with me.”

Meng Xing nodded her head. Without asking any question, she quickly passed two Consolidating Brushes to him. Although the two brushes could not compare to the one that Zhou Weiqing used when he crafted the God Tier Consolidated Equipment Scroll, they were still of excellent quality.

After he had gotten his hands on the two Consolidating Brushes, Zhou Weiqing returned to his spot behind Bing’er once again. With a brush in each hand, he lifted both of his arms slightly and gradually closed his eyes in concentration.

Because he was the center of everyone’s attention, after Zhou Weiqing completed his action, everyone on the scene could immediately feel the obvious shift in his aura.

In truth, nobody on the scene cared about his cultivation base that was at the Fifth Jewel. But in that instant, he was emitting an aura that they could not help but greatly admire. His entire aura seemed like it was elevated to another level that was much more dominant than the people present. This aura did not come from his physical force. Instead, it was unique, and it seemed to have come from the innermost part of him as it slowly spread out. It was as magnificent as the tall mountains, and yet, it was also like the clouds that were drifting freely in the sky. Basically, the aura was imposing, but it was not oppressive.

Meng Xing was standing the closest to Zhou Weiqing, so she had a view of his side profile.

Even though Zhou Weiqing was not very handsome, the unique quality that he exuded from his body and the state that he was in right now as his body merged with the environment made her usually calm heart fluttered very lightly.

A man with confidence was indeed charming. A confident man with a prodigious talent was even more irresistibly charismatic. On top of that, he was still at a very young age. Compared to those handsome men who were good looking and only pleasing to the eyes but had no capabilities, men like Zhou Weiqing were much more attractive to a lady of elegance and poise.

It was precisely for this reason that he was able to get so many stunning beauties to stay by his side. Had it not been for the exceptional talent that made him stand out during the Heavenly Jewel Tournament, he probably would not even stand a chance to meet Shangguan Fei’er and Xue’er. Had it not been his bloodline that attracted Tian’er greatly, they would not have interacted in the first place.

Other than his bad-boy charm that attracted the girls’ attention, the reason why so many beauties were attracted to Zhou Weiqing was becau of his resolution, the honesty in his soul, the powerful talents he displayed, and the sincere heart that he had.

seA God Tier Consolidated Equipment Master like Meng Xing also could not help but be attracted to him. Even though right now she was merely impressed by his powerful Heavenly Energy, he had already left a deep impression in her heart.

Of course, Zhou Weiqing had no idea that his own actions had managed to elicit new feelings from her. Right now, he was completely immersed in a mystical state.

Ever since he had graduated from being Huyan Aobo’s disciple, Zhou Weiqing actually did not really put much effort into crafting Consolidated Equipment Scrolls after he left. However, during the period when he was still a disciple, Huyan Aobo had laid a very deep foundation in him for his lessons. In order to not disrupt Zhou Weiqing’s cultivation, Huyan Aobo had passed on all of his knowledge to him. Of course, Zhou Weiqing had been forced by Huyan Aobo to memorize most of them.

In truth, Zhou Weiqing’s memory was quite good. At the very least, he did not forget all of the things that he had learned even though quite a few years had passed. Although he did not spend too much effort in crafting Consolidated Equipment Scrolls, he was not the least inferior to Yun Li in terms of theoretical knowledge. On top of that, when he stepped on to the Heavenly Jewel Island for the first time, he even received guidance from three God Tier Masters for a short while. For this reason, his knowledge alone was enough for him to become a God Tier Master. Not only that, the three God Tier Masters specially created a God Tier Consolidated Equipment so he could watch and learn.

After his cultivation base had reached the Ninth Jewel along with the advancement of his Saint Energy, by using the strong Saint Energy’s perception ability, he was able to achieve mastery and become well-versed in the knowledge that he had forcefully memorized in the past.

For a genius, especially one who possessed Saint Energy, it was rather easy for Zhou Weiqing to absorb the knowledge that his predecessors imparted to them. In fact, when Zhou Weiqing came to the Mysterious Heavenly Mainland in The Pearl, he had already started to absorb this knowledge to make preparations for himself and Bing’er. Even Bing’er did not know about this. This was Zhou Weiqing’s best strength compared to ordinary people. He was able to take the whole situation into consideration and plan ahead. Because of this, even though he might not be a good general, he definitely had the potential to become a great commander. It was just that he had never been interested in the military.

The creation of the Consolidated Equipment Scroll a few days ago had managed to help him verify the knowledge that he had gained. He was now truly and thoroughly acquainted with the knowledge that he possessed. After the few days of hibernating, he felt completely refreshed the moment he woke up, as if he had truly become a real God Tier Master. Of course, he, the God Tier Master, still needed to rely on the Time Attribute to cheat a little in order to demonstrate his full strength.

All of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace’s masters who were present subconsciously held their breath and silence descended upon the spacious and luxurious hall. They were afraid to disrupt Zhou Weiqing’s process in case it left an unfavorable impression on this new God Tier Master.

Zhou Weiqing did not let the crowd wait for long. After three long breaths, he started to make his move.

Five Heavenly Jewels began to emerge slowly on each of his hands. The Alexandrite’s Cat Eye gems on his left hand instantaneously became the center of attention.

Rich, flavorful green and silver colors appeared simultaneously within his hands. It highlighted the two Consolidating Brushes, making them seem brilliant and dazzling.

In a flash, Zhou Weiqing went next to Bing’er’s stretched out wings. With a shake of his wrist, the caps of two Consolidating Ink bottles popped open.

As fast as lightning! These were the only words that could describe Zhou Weiqing’s movement. Not only that, instead of blinding the rest with his erratic movements, his every move seemed to follow a special kind of rhythm. It left a pleasant feeling in the spectators. Each of his every move was very harmonious. It made him look very skilfull and dexterous, yet rapid and rather brisk.

He shocked the two God Tier Masters that were standing at the back as he simultaneously dipped the two Consolidating Brushes into two different Consolidating Ink.

The brushes in Zhou Weiqing’s hands landed on two different pieces of Consolidating Papers. With lightning speed, his hands started to move across the papers.

The two Consolidating Ink that Zhou Weiqing used was totally different! This meant that they were both used for two different Consolidated Equipment Scrolls.

Multitasking? Making two different Consolidated Equipment Scrolls at the same time? Any God Tier Master would also find this to be an impossible task.

For any Consolidated Equipment Master, the most important thing that they had to master was the rhythm. This was to ensure that no mistakes occurred when the scrolls were made in one go. However, what Zhou Weiqing was doing now totally contradicted this theory. Two different Consolidated Equipment Scrolls would require two different rhythms, and right now, what he was demonstrating was precisely two different rhythms.

Silver and green light merged together on the tip of the brushes. Even the top Heavenly Jewel Masters by the side could not clearly see what Zhou Weiqing was doing. With just a stroke of his hands, along with a simple sketch, two rays were already blooming out of the Consolidating Paper under his hands.

The moment the stunning ray burst forth from the Consolidating Paper, even the Mysterious Heavenly Palace Master who was sitting on the master seat could not help but exclaim out loud. This was because everyone knew that the eye-catching ray was the light that would flash after a Consolidated Equipment Scroll was completed.

Even with the bright light obscuring their sights, they could discern that it was only a Master Tier Consolidated Equipment Scroll. Nonetheless, Zhou Weiqing’s speed was too fast. The entire process only took the duration of a breath or two. Not only that, that also included the time he took to dip the brushes into the Consolidating Ink.

When the two God Tier Masters saw such an alarming speed, they thought that even they themselves could not finish making a Master Tier Consolidated Equipment Scroll in such a short time. On top of that, Zhou Weiqing made two different scrolls at the same time. In their opinion, this was a feat that was absolutely impossible to achieve.

One stroke from him only took the span of a breath. Not only that, he was also multitasking. Even the saying ‘practice makes perfect’ was not enough to describe his action.

chapters.title: Chapter 704
chapters.body:
Chapter 704

Before Zhou Weiqing started making the Consolidated Equipment Scrolls, most of the people present did not believe the title he gave himself – the Fastest Consolidated Equipment Scroll Crafter in History. However, their doubts faded and disappeared as they watched Zhou Weiqing work his magic.

It had only just begun. As soon as the two Consolidated Equipment Scrolls lit up in success, Zhou Weiqing slid three feet away. With just a slight flick of his hand, the residue liquid from the Consolidating Ink disappeared from the Consolidating brush. The Consolidating Brush could be controlled with just a thought from the Consolidated Equipment Master. That was the advantage of a high-quality Consolidating Brush.

As the Consolidating Brush moved again, he opened two different Consolidating ink bottles again. His movement was fluid like water. Before the initial two lights from the successful creation of the Consolidated Equipment Scrolls faded away, another two lights shone out. The visual impact was just staggering. Everyone could see the two bright lights that lit up Shangguan Bing’er’s dark gold gigantic wings from left to right in a wave.

From left to right, Zhou Weiqing only used five minutes to complete fifty Consolidated Equipment Scrolls. As the last two lights shot up to the sky, he had already moved back to the spot he was initially standing at when he was making the first Consolidated Equipment Scroll. He waved his left hand and all the completed Consolidated Equipment Scrolls rolled into his hand from left to right. Shangguan Bing’er straightened her back as the dark gold light faded away.

The entire place was dead silent. As Zhou Weiqing looked around, he saw that most of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace’s powerhouses sitting below the stage looked shocked and their mouths were agape.

‘When was the last time we’ve seen such a terrifying Consolidated Equipment Master?’

That was right. ‘Terrifying’ was the only word that they could think of to describe Zhou Weiqing. Even the two God Tier Masters had never shown the audience such a performance before.

In the Heavenly Jewel Master’s eyes, God Tier Masters were mysterious and powerful. However, Zhou Weiqing had completely overturned what they knew. With such powerful ability, arrogance was no longer arrogance but instead, a showcase of his confidence and abilities. Zhou Weiqing had used his actions to prove himself. It also allowed the upper echelons of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace truly understand him for the first time.

The Heavenly Jewel Masters were not the only ones who were surprised. Even the two God Tier Masters standing behind Zhou Weiqing was similarly astounded. Meng Xing was still alright, but Nie Han’s eyes were wide open. He had managed to make fifty different types of Consolidated Equipment Scrolls with fifty different types of Consolidating Ink within such a short period of time. What kind of ability and foundation did he possess?

Initially, Nie Han had thought Zhou Weiqing only managed to successfully make the Consolidated Equipment Scroll due to sheer good luck and his shameless use of the Time Attribute. He had thought the young man had great potential, but his foundation might not be any better than an average Master Tier Consolidated Equipment Master.

However, what Zhou Weiqing had demonstrated earlier clearly showed that his prowess was not simply potential. The fact that he knew fifty types of Consolidating Inks for Master Tier Consolidated Equipment Scrolls as well as the methods to make the scrolls proved that he was a Consolidated Equipment Master that had inherited a particular legacy.

“Clap! Clap! Clap!” The applause began, but the first to clap was Dongfang, the Palace Master of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace. It was only then that the Heavenly Jewel Masters from the Mysterious Heavenly Palace snapped out of their stupor. They followed the lead of the two God Tier Masters and four Supreme elders as they gave a thunderous round of applause. The way the four Supreme Masters looked at Zhou Weiqing became a lot friendlier. Zhou Weiqing’s age was also totally ignored by them. In this world, as long as one had the ability, nothing else mattered.

The Mysterious Heavenly Palace Master smiled as he said, “Astounding! I can only use the word ‘astounding’ to describe you, Honorary Master Zhou. I believe no one will doubt you anymore. From today onward, Honorary Master Zhou will be one of the pillars of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace. I’d like to announce that the banquet has officially begun.”

Because of Zhou Weiqing’s performance, the banquet’s participants became enthusiastic. The Mysterious Heavenly Palace Master walked over to Zhou Weiqing and toasted him. Following the Palace Master’s lead, more and more people came to toast Zhou Weiqing. Fortunately, the hierarchy in the Mysterious Heavenly Palace was very clear. The people who dared to toast him were at least Elders. The upper echelons who were sitting outside could only watch from far and raise their glasses.

Apart from Zhou Weiqing, Shangguan Bing’er’s abilities had also been acknowledged when she displayed her Seventh Jewel cultivation base and her Fourth Jewel Consolidating Equipment Master Assembly Wings set. As such, her status as Elder was established. Since she had already achieved the Seventh Jewel cultivation base at such a young age, becoming a Heavenly King Tier was definitely not wishful thinking. Moreover, her husband, Zhou Weiqing, was such a powerful God Tier Master.

Everyone that was present was a powerhouse of their generation. With their mighty Heavenly Energy, it would be difficult to get them drunk. That was why even though the banquet was boisterous, nobody was really drunk.

“Weiqing, here’s a toast from me.” Meng Xing walked towards Zhou Weiqing. She looked at him with sparkles in her eyes as she raised her glass. Zhou Weiqing finished the drink in his glass after clinking glasses with her. The alcohol had some effect on his mood which caused him to be a little more presumptuous than usual. There was a saying, ‘It’s easier to move a mountain than to change a man’s character.’ It was his personality that he could not help himself whenever he saw beautiful women.

Meng Xing ignored Zhou Weiqing’s lecherous look and smiled. “Weiqing, correct me if I’m wrong. You managed to make the scrolls so fast because you combined the Wind Attribute with the Spatial Attribute. Can you tell me how you managed to control them so well? You were able to maintain accuracy even with your tremendous speed. I did not detect your use of the Time Attribute.”

Zhou Weiqing shrugged. “It comes with practice. The more I practice, the more the patterns of the Consolidated Equipment Scroll are etched in my mind. They just come naturally to me.”

Of course, he could not have told her that he had been that accurate because he was using the Saint Energy to guide his thoughts. With the existence of Saint Energy, any energy attributes could be fused and they did not have any effect on Zhou Weiqing while he was making the Consolidated Equipment Scrolls at all. Moreover, it was not difficult for him since it was only Master-Tier Consolidated Equipment Scrolls.

Meng Xing frowned and proceeded to say, “Is that so? I wonder if I can pick your brain regarding the secrets of making Consolidated Equipment Scrolls in the future?”

Zhou Weiqing chuckled. “Of course you can. You’re welcome to at any time.”

The banquet officially ended. From that moment forth, Zhou Weiqing was considered to have been fully accepted by the Mysterious Heavenly Palace. His performance with the Consolidated Equipment Scroll earlier had worked wonders for him. At the very least, nobody doubted his ability anymore. Zhou Weiqing and Shangguan Bing’er did not leave the Mysterious Heavenly Castle. Arrangements were made for them to stay in the center of the palace where the highest ranking powers stayed, but Zhou Weiqing felt helpless with the accommodation that he was given.

The residence in Mysterious Heavenly Castle that had been arranged for Zhou Weiqing and Shangguan Bing’er was huge. They were staying on the sixth level. There were only seven levels in the Mysterious Heavenly Castle. On the seventh level, apart from the Palace Master’s residence, there was also a hall where all the meetings were held for the highest-level authorities in the Mysterious Heavenly Castle called the Heavenly Court. All of the important decisions in the Mysterious Heavenly Castle were made in the Heavenly Court.

Apart from the seventh level, the next highest position was naturally the sixth level. Naturally, Zhou Weiqing was happy to be close to the core of the Mysterious Heavenly Castle. However, the issue was that he was not alone on the sixth level. Besides him, there were the four Supreme Elders staying on the same level. Due to his arrival, the other two God Tier Masters, Nie Han, and Meng Xing moved to the same level too.

Surrounded by six peerless experts, how could Zhou Weiqing act as he wished? He was not sure about Nie Han and Meng Xing’s cultivation bases, but they were at least at the Heavenly King-tier. Moreover, there were four Heavenly Emperor Tier powerhouses staying on the same level. His scalp became numb just thinking about this. How could he investigate the Spatial Teleportation Stone now? He could not even use his Perception to investigate as the four Supreme Elders would find out about it immediately.

Feeling helpless, all Zhou Weiqing could do was take up residence temporarily. He was new, so he could not escape from being monitored for a period of time. Since he had a lot of time, he figured he should relax instead. Besides cultivating, he would focus on studying the process of making Consolidated Equipment Scrolls as well as interacting more with Nie Han and Meng Xing.

In the Mysterious Heavenly Castle, the higher it was, the thicker the Atmospheric Energy. The Atmospheric Energy was even thicker here than in the Heaven’s Expanse Palace. Cultivating here was naturally more effective with less effort. A month passed by in a blink of an eye, Zhou Weiqing had finally stabilized himself on the 37th-tier Saint Energy as he started to gradually improve. Moreover, his speed of improvement was pretty fast. He estimated that before solidifying a Saint Nucleus Core, he would not encounter a bottleneck like he did before. After all, he had officially entered the level of Heavenly Dao Energy.

In reality, if anyone found out how he broke through to Heavenly Dao Energy, they would definitely be envious of him. He managed to break through in just a few months naturally. How could that even be called a bottleneck? Naturally, that was one of the benefits of the Saint Energy.

Compared to the speed of leveling up his cultivation base, Zhou Weiqing’s speed in making Consolidated Equipment Scrolls could only be described as leapfrogging. He had experienced the Strength Legacy for many years. Meng Xing and Nie Han were God Tier Masters too, he gained priceless experience from working together with them and learning about the making of Consolidated Equipment Scrolls.

Moreover, the Consolidated Equipment Masters had different perspectives on the making of Consolidated Equipment Scrolls on the Mysterious Heavenly Mainland compared to the Consolidated Equipment Masters of the Boundless Mainland. It could be considered as opening a brand new path which was helpful to Zhou Weiqing. Although the points he raised were different from the two God Tier Masters, who else was to blame for him being born into the ‘reclusive world’ of the Strength Legacy? As such, he did not attract any unwanted suspicion.

chapters.title: Chapter 705
chapters.body:
Chapter 705

The days passed by just like that; it had been a long time since Zhou Weiqing had been able to relax so much. He spent his days in fulfillment, continuously improving himself. Of course, he also made some Consolidated Equipment Scrolls. However, due to his cultivation base, nobody forced him to make any God Tier Consolidated Equipment Scrolls. It was obvious that the Mysterious Heavenly Palace placed more importance on grooming him into a reserve God Tier Master.

Zhou Weiqing was happy with the arrangement. However, to prove his worth, he still made ten sets of Master Tier Consolidated Equipment Scrolls every month in addition to a set of Zong Master Tier Consolidated Equipment Scrolls that was sent up to the officials. Compared to Zhou Weiqing’s continuous improvement, Shangguan Bing’er’s improvement was even more obvious. Since she was not a Consolidated Equipment Master, she did not have to think about any other matters apart from cultivating. Besides being with Zhou Weiqing every day and doing things she enjoyed, she was focused on her cultivation.

With the help of Zhou Weiqing’s Saint Energy and her own effort, her cultivation had improved so fast that even Zhou Weiqing was stunned. She was almost at the peak of the Seventh Jewel cultivation base. According to Zhou Weiqing’s calculations, if she continued at the same speed, Bing’er might break through to the Eight Jewel in less than three months. In fact, even Shangguan Fei’er who grew up in the Heaven’s Expanse Palace was not at the Eighth Jewel cultivation base.

“Weiqing, there’s a meeting at the Heavenly Court.” Meng Xing’s pleasant voice came from behind the door.

The accommodations on the sixth level of the Mysterious Heavenly Castle were completely isolated. Each of them covered a large area, and their living quarters were separated. Without the permission of the owner, even the other upper echelons of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace who were staying on the same level were prohibited from entering.

Zhou Weiqing opened the door as soon as he heard Meng Xing’s voice. She was wearing a light purple dress that made her look graceful today. Throughout the past month, Zhou Weiqing and Meng Xing had gotten closer. This beautiful God Tier Master’s attractiveness was more potent than he had imagined. Beauty aside, she was also smart. Her vast knowledge made her Zhou Weiqing’s teacher and confidant when it came to making Consolidated Equipment Scrolls. Meng Xing was also the one who visited Zhou Weiqing the most frequently. Meanwhile, Zhou Weiqing had never seen the Mysterious Heavenly Palace Master ever since the day of the banquet.

With regards to Zhou Weiqing and Meng Xing’s encounter, Shangguan Bing’er only said one thing to him. “The sisters won’t allow you to bring another one back. Think it through, wisely.”

“Admiration, it’s just pure admiration…” Zhou Weiqing replied. Of course, he looked mesmerized when he replied her. He had been warning himself to behave every day and to not start relationships with other women. He had also been trying his best. Besides matters concerning Consolidated Equipment Scrolls, he hardly had any other conversations with Meng Xing. Neither did he ask Meng Xing about her personal life. All he knew was that she was not married and she was twenty-nine years old.

Zhou Weiqing asked curiously as he could not help but sweep his gaze at Meng Xing a few times, “Meeting? What meeting is it?” He had never been to the seventh level despite having spent so much time here.

Meng Xing said in all seriousness, “Follow me right now. The meetings at Heavenly Court are always important.”

“Okay,” Zhou Weiqing replied. He turned around to speak to Shangguan Bing’er, who was cultivating in the room, before following Meng Xing.

As he walked beside Meng Xing, Zhou Weiqing asked out of curiosity, “How do we get to the seventh level?”

Meng Xing smiled and replied, “Just follow me. Only the Palace Master has the authority to open the seventh level. It’ll automatically open every time there’s a meeting at the Heavenly Court.”

As they conversed, Meng Xing brought Zhou Weiqing to the central zone of the sixth level. Usually, it was just a round empty clearing. However, at that moment, there was an odd symbol on the ground. Zhou Weiqing was shocked to see the symbol as it looked very similar to his Six Ultimate Godly Light Formation. It was also an image of a hexagram but there was an extra ring on the periphery.

“Step up.” Meng Xing walked up to the hexagram first. Zhou Weiqing knew that it was something like a Teleportation Formation. It was no wonder he had never seen the entrance to the seventh level. As the both of them stepped onto the hexagram, Meng Xing injected a burst of Heavenly Energy into the formation from her feet. As a light flashed by, the both of them were teleported elsewhere.

It was a huge hall. The most peculiar thing about it was that there was a indiscernible bright brilliance around. Zhou Weiqing was awed. From the looks of it, the seventh level of the Mysterious Heavenly Castle was not an actual place but a dimension like the Luster Spatial Realm. Although it was not as huge, complete, and real as the Luster Spatial Realm, the fact that the Mysterious Heavenly Palace owned a parallel realm like this proved how powerful it was.

There was an oval table in the middle of the hall. The four Supreme Elders sat on the left and God Tier Master Nie Han sat alone in the second seat on the right. The main seat was currently vacant. However, the gigantic armchair had caught Zhou Weiqing’s attention. The armchair was enormous with a backrest that was ten feet tall. The entire chair was made of an unknown translucent material that was like black crystal and carved into the shape of a gigantic black dragon. The dragon’s head was situated in the middle of the armchair. Its eyes were made of two red precious stones that were the size of a fist. The red stones were shining brightly, giving it a demonic aura.

A black, gigantic dragon? Zhou Weiqing had never heard about it before. He thought to himself, ‘Could it be the Dreadfiend Sea Naga? That can’t be right. The Dreadfiend Sea Naga should be dark blue in color, not black.’

Meng Xing walked silently to the first seat on the right side of the oval table and sat down while Zhou Weiqing took the third seat naturally. The four Supreme Elders had their eyes trained on Zhou Weiqing. He felt uneasy being watched by four Heavenly Emperor Tier powerhouses at the same time.

Just like the Five Great Saint Lands of the Boundless Mainland, which each had their own specialties, the Mysterious Heavenly Palace had its own specialty as well. Their specialty was the Blackness Attribute. That’s right, it was Blackness, not Darkness. The two attributes were different. The Blackness Attribute was exclusive to the Mysterious Heavenly Palace.

All of the core members of the upper echelon had a Heavenly Jewel of that attribute among other Heavenly Jewels that they owned. That included the Elders and Supreme Elders, as well as Meng Xing and Nie Han. Zhou Weiqing was the only exception. However, he had a special connection with the Blackness Attribute.

The difference between the Blackness Attribute and the Darkness Attribute was that the former was slightly superior to the latter. The Blackness Attribute possessed some Evil Attribute. It could be considered a type of Darkness, so the combination of Darkness and Evil attributes formed a new attribute. However, compared to the Evil Attribute, it was less powerful. Moreover, none of the masters who were present had Heavenly Jewels of a single attribute. Apart from Blackness Attribute, the four Supreme Elders sitting across him had Water, Fire, Earth, and Wind attributes respectively. Therefore, the people in the Mysterious Heavenly Palace usually addressed them as Elder Water, Elder Fire, Elder Earth and Elder Wind while the normal Elders would be addressed by their names.

Nie Han’s Heavenly Jewel was naturally the Spatial and Blackness Attribute. On the contrary, Zhou Weiqing had no idea which Heavenly Jewel attribute Meng Xing had despite being the most familiar with her. All he knew was that she had the same Heavenly Jewel as him — the Alexandrite Cat’s Eye Jewel. That would mean that Meng Xing also had more than four Heavenly Jewel attributes. That was also the reason why she held a higher position than Nie Han who was also a God Tier Master. Zhou Weiqing had always been curious about Meng Xing. She was only 29! Her cultivation base was at least at the Heavenly King-tier. How did she do that? He had never heard of any Heavenly King Tier that was below thirty years of age on the Boundless Mainland.

This was the Heavenly Court that everyone talked about. The four Supreme Elders of Water, Fire, Earth, and Wind had solemn expressions on their faces. Based on that, it was obvious the matter that would be discussed at the meeting today was not something the Mysterious Heavenly Palace considered trivial. Zhou Weiqing was puzzled. What exactly could have been so important to the officials of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace? The fact was they did not have any foreign enemies on the Mysterious Heavenly Mainland. The Mysterious Heavenly Palace was dominant. With their powerful abilities, even if their subordinates were corrupted, it was not necessary for the upper echelons to be so somber.

Besides, Zhou Weiqing noticed something peculiar. God Tier Master Nie Han, who was sitting next to him, seemed like he also had no idea what was happening either. He looked as puzzled as Zhou Weiqing was. However, Meng Xing had a solemn expression on her face that indicated she knew what was happening. As a God Tier Master, why would Meng Xing know about the event in the Mysterious Heavenly Palace in advance? Just as Zhou Weiqing was pondering over the matter, a blurry shadow appeared in the main seat. It was none other than the masked Palace Master of Mysterious Heavenly Palace.

Everyone stood up immediately and bowed at the Palace Master. The Mysterious Heavenly Palace Master waved his hand. “Dispense with the formalities.” He then turned in Zhou Weiqing’s direction and said, “Is Honorary Master Zhou getting used to life in the Mysterious Heavenly Palace?”

Zhou Weiqing smiled as he nodded. He said, “It’s not bad. There’s sufficient material for me to express myself. It’s much easier for me to make Consolidated Equipment Scrolls compared to before when I had to look for the materials myself. Moreover, I can ask for advice from Honorary Master Meng Xing and Honorary Master Nie Han. I’m glad that I decided to join the Mysterious Heavenly Palace.”

The Palace Master of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace nodded. “That’s great. Please take a seat, everyone.”

All of them sat down while the Palace Master of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace started speaking in a serious tone. “Let’s get down to business. The Dreadfiend Sea Naga has recently been causing trouble at sea. At least a dozen seafaring ships have been destroyed, causing us to suffer heavy losses. If we don’t do anything about it, it might get even more aggressive. Please speak your mind and discuss if we should directly attack it.”

Zhou Weiqing was stunned when he heard the words ‘Dreadfiend Sea Naga’. He thought to himself, ‘Did I jinx it with my big mouth?’ He did not expect that the Dreadfiend Sea Naga would really appear in the Mysterious Heavenly Mainland’s ocean. At the same time, he secretly felt lucky. He and Bing’er would have been in danger if they had encountered the dragon while they were traveling across the ocean. However, he finally understood why the upper echelon of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace looked so solemn. Facing a Heavenly God Tier Heavenly Beast, especially in the ocean where it was strongest, was indeed quite a challenge.

chapters.title: Chapter 706
chapters.body:
Chapter 706

Among the four Supreme Elders, Elder Water who was sitting in the first seat started speaking in a low voice. “This is difficult to handle. The Dreadfiend Sea Naga are practically invincible in the ocean. Even with the palace’s ability, it’ll be almost impossible to kill it. Even if we succeed in killing it, the losses will be severe. We’ll lose more than we gain. It’s better to think of a way to drive it out.”

Elder Fire frowned as he said, “Drive it out? How do we do that? Would that guy even listen to us? I’m afraid it’ll just ruthlessly attack us. I think killing it isn’t entirely impossible if we plan this properly. If our predecessors could do it, why can’t we? Although it’s extremely risky to kill the Dreadfiend Sea Naga, it would bring great benefit to the palace if we managed to do it.”

The two Supreme Elders presented firm and radical opinions before Elder Earth spoke. “This Dreadfiend Sea Naga should be the offspring of the one that the predecessor killed years back. It probably has a grudge against us. As soon as it finds out that the palace is using the Darkness Attribute, it will be difficult to drive it out. At that time, it won’t be us doing the killing. Instead, we’ll be the ones getting annihilated. So we have to be extremely cautious about this.”

Zhou Weiqing chose to interrupt at this point. “Why can’t we just pull back our operations on the sea temporarily? Besides, the Dreadfiend Sea Naga won’t decide to come ashore that easily. If it does that, its ability will be greatly weakened.”

Everyone present clearly did not expect for Zhou Weiqing, who was attending the meeting for the first time, to open his mouth randomly. Everyone stared at him as if he was an idiot.

Eventually, Meng Xing came to Zhou Weiqing’s rescue. “Honorary Master Zhou, the situation isn’t as simple as you think. Although our Mysterious Heavenly Mainland is vast, land suitable for planting is scarce. Most of the land consists of mountains, hills, and rocks. Throughout the years, we’ve been getting food and riches from the ocean to maintain the daily lives of the civilians. For quite some time, riches in the coastal waters have been unable to meet mainland’s needs. Therefore, we have at least 100 ships sailing across the ocean to bring back massive amounts of food and treasures every year. This involves the livelihood of the people. As soon as fishing and treasure hunting activities are cut off, I’m afraid that we’ll be faced with food shortages in the mainland soon after.”

“Oh… Is that so? I’m sorry. I rarely concerned myself with external matters in the past so I’m not too clear on this. Everyone, please carry on.” Zhou Weiqing shut his mouth immediately.

Fortunately, the four Supreme Elders did not question him, and they just smiled kindly. Zhou Weiqing was just a young man in their eyes. Although he had impressive talent, he still wasn’t mature enough.

The Palace Master of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace proceeded to say, “Elder Wind, what do you think?”

Elder Wind was a tall and skinny old man. Among the four Supreme Elders, he had been the friendliest one to Zhou Weiqing ever since he arrived more than a month ago. The reason was naturally due to Shangguan Bing’er’s gigantic Wings of the Wind God.

“If there’s a guarantee that we can retreat unscathed, I think we should try killing it. Aside from being beneficial to us, it’ll also serve as a deterrent to the other powerhouses in the ocean. Every year, losses are bound to occur in our fishing operations. If we retreat this time, I’m afraid that, apart from the Dreadfiend Sea Naga, other ocean beasts with comparable strength will become more audacious. If that happens, it’ll be a disastrous blow to us.”

Elder Fire and Meng Xin nodded slightly after listening to what Elder Wind said. Elder Earth frowned, but he did not say anything. Elder Water shook his head and said, “That’s easy for you to say. How do we guarantee that we can retreat unscathed? In the ocean, even if the four of us fight together, we might not be able to stand up to the Dreadfiend Sea Naga’s full attack. It can manipulate the force of the ocean. Although our abilities are top-notch on the mainland, compared to the ocean, we’re just a drop of water.”

Nie Han, who was sitting to Zhou Weiqing’s side, closed his eyes as the four Supreme Elders sitting across from them were arguing with each other as if this matter did not concern him at all; Zhou Weiqing realized that this matter would be handled and dealt with by the four Supreme Elders. Although God Tier Honorary Masters like them were respectable, their authority was incomparable to the Supreme Elders.

The Palace Master of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace then turned to Meng Xing. “Honorary Master Meng Xing, what do you think?”

The four Supreme Elders who were arguing became silent when they heard the Palace Master of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace’s question.

Meng Xing looked serious as she replied, “I agree with what Elder Wind said. The war with the Dreadfiend Sea Naga is unavoidable. As it has already come to coastal waters nearby to attack the ships, it’s obvious that it’s provoking us. Instead of suffering more losses, it’s better to solve this problem as soon as possible. Now regarding what Elder Water said about avoiding losses, I think that’s what we should consider right now instead of considering whether we should fight or not.”

The Mysterious Heavenly Palace Master who barely speaks nodded lightly after hearing what Meng Xing said. “Does anyone have any ideas.”

Elder Water looked at Meng Xing who was sitting across him and thought for a while before speaking. “It’s not that there are no solutions. If we’re really going to take action, then we’ll at least need to prepare two things. First, we need to get that person to help us. If that person is willing to fight, then we’ll definitely have enough firepower. Next, we’ll need to bring out the Spatial Teleportation Stone to build the Teleportation Formation. As soon as something goes wrong, we’ll leave immediately.”

Zhou Weiqing almost lost himself when he heard about the Spatial Teleportation Stone. It took some effort for him to calm himself down. He cheered secretly in his head. ‘Bring it out, bring that thing out so that I have the opportunity to get my hands on it.’

Elder Fire then proceeded to say, “I’m afraid that won’t do. Whether we can get the help of that person remains a problem. Besides, the Spatial Teleportation Stone can only be used two or three times at the most before it breaks. The preceding Palace Master instructed that this great treasure shouldn’t be simply used unless it concerns the life or death of the palace. Moreover, the energy consumption of the Spatial Teleportation Stone depends on the number of people. If we’re going to kill the Dreadfiend Sea Naga, there’ll definitely be a large number of people going on the trip. How could it possibly teleport so many people? What if the Spatial Teleportation is destroyed on our watch?”

Elder Water glared at him madly. “You old thing, you were the one who suggested we fight, and now, you’re the one who’s being paranoid. Aside from the two things that you mentioned, is there no other way we can restrain the Dreadfiend Sea Naga and at the same time guarantee our complete retreat? We’ll just be digging our own graves if we fail to get that person to join us. Also, if we push the Dreadfiend Sea Naga to its limit, we might not be able to handle its final attack. Who would dare to go without the guarantee of the Spatial Teleportation Stone? Nobody would dare to give their all even if they go. Even an old man like me still wishes to live for a couple more years.”

Elder Fire then scoffed, “You’re already so old and you’re still afraid of death. No wonder you can’t break through to Heavenly God Tier even though you’re more talented than I am.”

“You…” Elder Water glared at him like he was going to blow up.

“Alright. You two Elders, now is not the time to fight.” The Palace Master of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace stopped them with his deep voice. Only then did the two Supreme Elders calm down for the time being.

The Palace Master of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace Master turned around to speak to Meng Xing again. “Honorary Master Meng Xing, what do you think about Elder Water’s suggestion?”

After thinking for a moment, Meng Xing replied, “Let’s not talk about using the Spatial Teleportation Stone first, we should at least ask for that person’s permission before discussing further. It’s impossible to fight the Dreadfiend Sea Naga without that person’s help. If that person is unwilling to fight, I’m afraid we’ll have to formulate a new plan.”

This time, the four Supreme Elders nodded almost at the same time. It was clear that they agreed with what Meng Xing said. Naturally, Zhou Weiqing did not have anything to say. No matter how much approval he had gotten from everyone when it came to making Consolidated Equipment Scrolls, he was still ranked the lowest when it came to authority and did not have much of a voice here. He was content to not speak at all anyway. However, he had finally heard about the Spatial Teleportation Stone. Although he was still not sure if he would be able to see it, what he heard had confirmed that there really was such a thing in the Mysterious Heavenly Palace. At least he was not wasting his time here.

Seeing that everyone had come to an agreement, the Palace Master of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace nodded and spoke again. “If that’s the case, let us see that person together.”

He waved his hand as he spoke. Zhou Weiqing was not sure of what he had done, but he felt the space around him distorting. In the next moment, they appeared at the formation on the sixth level again.

The Palace Master of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace took the lead while the four Supreme Elders followed behind. Meng Xing walked to Zhou Weiqing and said to him softly. “Weiqing, stay close to me. No matter what you see later, stay within three meters from myself.”

“Oh.” Zhou Weiqing gave a short reply as he looked at Meng Xing with slight astonishment.

The eight of them left the Mysterious Heavenly Castle. Soon after they arrived at the iron bridge that connected the Mysterious Heavenly Castle to the outside world. Where were they heading to? Who were they seeing? Zhou Weiqing had many doubts in his mind. It was clear that the person that these upper echelons from the Mysterious Heavenly Palace were going to see someone with powerful abilities. That person might even have a higher position than all of them, including the Palace Master of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace. Why else would they come in full force? In his heart, he remained extremely vigilant as he adjusted the Saint Energy in his body carefully to better disguise himself.

Just when Zhou Weiqing thought they were going to cross the iron bridge, the Palace Master of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace leaped into the air and down toward the abyss below. Zhou Weiqing was shocked when he saw that. Then, the four Supreme Elders did the same thing. The five of them disappeared into the thick mist of the abyss below in mere seconds. Nie Han gave Zhou Weiqing a light smile and leaped down as well. Meng Xing then grabbed Zhou Weiqing’s right arm. “Let’s go down. Don’t be afraid, I’ll protect you.”

As she leaped with Zhou Weiqing while speaking, Zhou Weiqing felt a gradually growing force as they fell towards the abyss below. Was the person that they were meeting in the abyss? Though Zhou Weiqing was surprised, he did not react slowly. He needed to do something that matched his current cultivation base to prevent the others from suspecting him. That was what he thought but what he did in reality was…

chapters.title: Chapter 707
chapters.body:
Chapter 707

“Ahhh!” A shrill and forlorn scream echoed in the abyss of the Mysterious Heavenly Castle. It almost stirred the entire castle in an instant. Right now, a certain someone who was falling in mid-air came back to his senses and grabbed on tightly to the person next to him like a giant octopus.

It had never crossed Meng Xing’s mind that the confident and wise Great God Tier Master Zhou who looked calm in the banquet would react in such a way after leaping off the cliff with her.

Zhou Weiqing’s scream had already shocked her to the core. For this reason, when he suddenly turned around and hugged her tightly, she did not even have the time to stop him from doing that. Instantly, a strong manly scent inundated her olfactory senses. The warm and vigorous body was holding on to her tightly in his embrace. What caused her to be at her wit’s end was this guy even had his legs up high, wrapped around her luscious ass. Right now, the two bodies were stuck so close to each other that there was not even a gap in between them.

Even though Meng Xing had a high cultivation base, she almost could not control her own body and was on the verge of plummeting into the abyss directly.

“W-What are you doing?” Embarrassed and shocked, she quickly tried to break away from Zhou Weiqing’s bear hug. Yet, his embrace was very tight, and no matter how much she struggled, she still could not get away from his arms. On top of that, the speed of their fall was increasing drastically. It left her with no other choice but to use the airflow to carry their bodies’ weight so that they would not crash directly to the bottom.

‘It feels so good!’ Zhou Weiqing’s heart was bursting with joy. As he held on tightly to Meng Xing, his face was also stuck against the soft and delicate face of the girl. Her body had a hint of fresh fragrance, and her petite body was extremely soft and fragrant. Hugging her was like hugging a lumpy, boneless lump of cotton. To top it off, it was a really tough cotton. Particularly the part where both of his legs were clinging tightly around her full, round, and perky ass. The surprisingly bouncy ass immediately turned him on. Zhou Weiqing could also vaguely feel a sense of energy in Meng Xing’s body that seems to harmonize with his own energy.

Surrounded by the chilly cold peaks, the light gradually turned darker and darker as their bodies fell. Meng Xing was dying to give this perverted guy a good slap in the face. However, she could clearly feel his heartbeat rising through his body as if he was truly afraid. Her heart softened as she sighed secretly. ‘This guy is still at the Fifth Jewel level after all. Although he’s talented in the consolidating aspect, his cultivation base is still only at the Zun Tier. I guess it’s pretty normal for a person to be scared if they suddenly jump off a cliff. Since we are already in a situation like this, I might as well let it be for now.’

Zhou Weiqing was extremely smart. He did not continue to do anything else that would arouse Meng Xing’s suspicion. However, there was something in particular that was making her face red with embarrassment. She felt something hot and fiery on her abdomen twitching uncontrollably as they fell.

Despite the fact that she was already 29 years old, Zhou Weiqing was the first man that she had ever gotten physically close to since she was young.

Within the time it took twenty breaths, the surrounding light became completely bleak. Zhou Weiqing could feel the falling speed was decreasing, and in the next moment, they had already landed on the ground with their feet.

He had no idea why but the moment they touched the ground, a sense of chilliness enveloped his body. It was natural for the temperature here to be much colder than the temperature at the top but with his body physique, he should have not been affected by the temperature at all.

Instinctively, Zhou Weiqing raised his head, and his eyes met with a pair of extremely peculiar gaze.

The mouths on the four elders’ faces opened so wide that they could practically fit a dragon egg inside. Even the Palace Master of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace was staring at him as his body went stiff. Nie Han’s face contorted strangely as he held in his laughter. Even then, he did not dare to laugh out loud. These people were now standing by his and Meng Xing’s side.

Of course! A sturdy man clinging onto a beauty and in an octopus-like manner on top of that! One could easily imagine how strange the scene was. Not only that, the person that he was clinging to was none other than Meng Xing, the head of the three honored Great God Tier Masters of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace.

“Uhm…” Zhou Weiqing sounded out awkwardly. Slowly, he put his feet back on the ground as he slowly detached himself from Meng Xing. He could even feel that the moment he released his tight embrace, the pair of bouncy flesh on her chest slowly bounced back into their original fullness. Of course, there was another thing that bounced up as well… A specific small thing that tented up in the area around his crotch.

He quickly held his breath with all his might so that his face would turn red at once. Usually, with his thick-skinned personality, he did not mind being glared at by others…

Standing on the spot, Meng Xing was in a daze. The color of her delicate face was oscillating between red and white. The woman who had always been elegant and noble was now breathing rapidly as if she would explode in anger at any second…

“Y-YOU –” As she lifted up her right hand, a terrifying surge of Heavenly Energy exploded out of Meng Xing’s body. The power suppression made Zhou Weiqing took a few steps backward before falling on his butt on the ground.

How powerful! Although he was faking his reaction, he could still clearly sense her power at this moment. It was far more powerful than he had expected.

If she really did give him a hard slap, as a Heavenly Jewel Master with a Fifth Jewel cultivation base which he was supposed to be, he would probably be smacked into pieces, and none of his bone fractures would remain.

“Please show mercy!” the four elders hurriedly said as they stepped forward. Such a young God Tier Master like Zhou Weiqing was extremely rare on the mainland.

However, Zhou Weiqing looked unconcerned as he noticed a few odd things. Although the four elders were asking her to show mercy, they did not seem to have any intention to stop her judging from their actions. Even worse, even the Palace Master of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace was just standing there quietly.

Taking a deep breath, Meng Xing’s hand that lifted high into the air trembled for a moment before she slowly lowered it down to her side again. The pair of beautiful eyes that were staring at Zhou Weiqing looked like they were about to spit fire out at him. With an angry snort, she turned and started to walk towards the dark ends of the valley.

The Palace Master of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace only shook his head helplessly. To Zhou Weiqing’s surprise, he actually turned around and followed her. It looked like he was trying to tell her something through a sound transmission.

The four Supreme Elders also let out a collective sigh of relief. Looking back at Zhou Weiqing’s face that was filled with terror, they were at a loss whether to laugh or cry. As they each gave another sigh, they flicked their sleeves before they proceeded to follow the two in front.

God Tier Master Nie Han was the only one who walked forward and helped him off the ground. With a low voice, he whispered, “Weiqing! How bold are you? You actually dare to take advantage of Meng Xing?”

Zhou Weiqing replied awkwardly, “I thought she was pulling me down to commit suicide! I’ve never tried jumping off a cliff before! I was just a little scared!”

Chuckling, Nie Han gave him an understanding look. “Don’t you know that all Heavenly King Tier masters can fly? Alright, just follow me! Don’t you provoke her again, alright? Otherwise, if she were to really explode in anger, even the Palace Master will not be able to save you!”

“Okay.” Zhou Weiqing nodded his head obediently. Oh well, he had already taken advantage of her anyway.

chapters.title: Chapter 708
chapters.body:
Chapter 708

Nie Han walked ahead of him. Zhou Weiqing first smelled the faint fragrance on his hand before secretly chuckling in delight as he followed from behind. At the same time, he began to observe his surroundings.
