Dongfang sighed, “A grown girl cannot be kept at home! That silly girl, doesn’t she know it’s impossible for them to be together?”

Elder Water said with a wry smile, “It looks like we should consider her points as well. We cannot let Zhou Weiqing come between the Palace Master and us. Furthermore, her points are not illogical! Perhaps she has seen the bigger picture.”

Dongfang was contemplative, “If Hanyue can advance into Heavenly God tier, a Spatial Teleportation Stone is nothing.”

…

Naturally, Zhou Weiqing did not know what had transpired in the Mysterious Heavenly Palace. With his Dragon-Tiger Transformation, he traveled in almost a straight line towards the Mysterious Heavenly Palace at maximum speed.

From afar, the mountain range which the Mysterious Heavenly Palace was built on was already in view. The whole time he was flying, his fury grew stronger and stronger. Not once did he stop trying to get in touch with Shangguan Bing’er but there was no response. The worry in his heart turned into burning rage. To save his love, he would not mind taking on the whole world.

However, no matter how angry he was, he could not raise his temper against Dongfang Hanyue. Could he sneak into the Mysterious Heavenly Palace? No, that was almost certainly impossible.

If Mysterious Heavenly Palace held Bing’er captive, they would definitely have thought about him sneaking in to rescue her. With so many powerhouses and the Blackfiend Dragon, it was almost impossible for him to succeed in rescuing her by stealth. Since that was the case, he might as well act arrogantly for once.

With that thought in mind, Zhou Weiqing was no longer hesitant and he flew towards the Mysterious Heavenly Palace. In his excitement, it felt as if the Saint Energy in his body was boiling over. After all, with his current cultivation, even if he had flown for a long time using Dragon-Tiger Transformation, he still had an abundance of Saint Energy. It did not burden him too much to do so.

The Mysterious Heavenly Palace appeared in his view from a distance. By the time he saw it, he heard people yelling from below. At least a hundred silhouettes leaped into the air trying to block Zhou Weiqing from approaching.

Zhou Weiqing was not too familiar with the Mysterious Heavenly Palace’s fighting power. However, as the only Saint Land in the Mysterious Heavenly Mainland, how could it not have Anti-Air skills?

Zhou Weiqing stopped in the air and looked down. The ones flying towards him were not only Heavenly Jewel Masters, but their Heavenly Beasts were also with them. The Heavenly Beasts were at different stages of cultivation but they were all strong flying Heavenly Beasts. Even the weakest of them had the cultivation of Zun-stage. All of the Heavenly Jewel Masters had at least five Heavenly Jewels too. It was clear that they rushed in as soon as they noticed Zhou Weiqing.

Zhou Weiqing hovered silently, allowing the “sky warriors” of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace to surround him. He ignored them as he yelled at the Mysterious Heavenly Castle directly, “Dongfang Hanyue, come out right now. Otherwise, don’t blame me for being merciless.”

Having filled his Dantian with Qi/energy, his yell, supported by his cultivation base of Nine Heavenly Jewels, fanned out. Some of the flying Heavenly Beasts in front of him were affected and became lopsided. His voice was full of wrath as it echoed throughout the valley and the abyss domineeringly.

The Heavenly Jewel Master who flew toward Zhou Weiqing did not attack immediately. The reason was simple. Among these people, there were those who knew Zhou Weiqing.

Zhou Weiqing had shone brightly at the banquet when he joined the Mysterious Heavenly Palace, surprising all the higher ranked officers. The generals of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace’s Air Defense had also attended the dinner, so they immediately recognized their Honorary Master.

What happened to Shangguan Bing’er had been kept a secret by the core members of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace. That was why none of them knew about the issue Zhou Weiqing had with the Palace.

“Honorary Master Zhou, why are you saying things like that? Please calm down,” a Heavenly Jewel Master at the Ninth Jewel cultivation base said gently after he approached Zhou Weiqing and saluted him. At the same time, his eyes were filled with shock upon seeing Zhou Weiqing.

The wings that appeared with Dragon-Tiger Transformation were spread out behind Zhou Weiqing. There were dark-purplish dragon tattoos on his skin and it gave him an authoritative aura. More importantly, Zhou Weiqing did not hide the number of his Heavenly Jewels. Nine on each arm! This was such a huge leap from the five Heavenly Jewels at the banquet. How could it not astonish the powerhouses in front of him?

Zhou Weiqing smiled and said, “This is none of your business. As long as you stay out of my way, I will not hurt you.”

The general was speechless. He thought, ‘We have over a hundred people here, and each of us is supported by our Heavenly Beasts. Even if you have Nine Jewels, there’s only one of you. How are you going to hurt us?’

Even though that was what he thought, he did not dare to order an attack. Who knew what happened to Honorary Master Zhou? If this was only a misunderstanding, and they hurt him, what would the higher-ups say? Not to mention, Honorary Master Zhou was a God Tier Master. Was there anyone who did not want to get some benefits from him!

Zhou Weiqing’s yell clearly worked. From within the Mysterious Heavenly Castle, at least ten Heavenly Jewel Masters came out. With their entourage in tow, Dongfang and the four Supreme Elders walked out.

As Zhou Weiqing stared at the people of the Mysterious Heavenly Castle, his face fell, and his fury grew even stronger. ‘Dongfang Hanyue is unwilling to come and see me? Is she feeling guilty or something?’ He thought.

“Honorary Master Zhou, please come down. Let us have a talk,” Dongfang who was wearing a mask waved at Zhou Weiqing.

As Zhou Weiqing landed he was followed by the whole army of sky warriors. He stood facing Dongfang, who was in front of the entrance of Mysterious Heavenly Castle, and said coldly across the abyss, “Are you the real Palace Master or the impostor? I will speak with whoever has the authority.”

Dongfang frowned, “Honorary Master Zhou, please calm down. We’re very glad that you’re back after the disaster, and we’re very grateful for your aid at the critical moment. What do you mean?”

Zhou Weiqing grinned brightly, “You’re grateful for my aid? Is that so? If so, what about my wife? Where is she? The way you repay my kindness is to lock her up, isn’t it? Let me tell you something. If Bing’er loses so much as a single strand of hair, I’ll rain blood onto the Mysterious Heavenly Castle today, completely erasing Mysterious Heavenly Palace from the Mysterious Heavenly Mainland.”

Zhou Weiqing’s speech angered Dongfang so much she almost lost it. She had already discussed with the four Supreme Elders. For her daughter’s sake, and also because they thought Dongfang Hanyue had a point, they had decided to mend things with Zhou Weiqing. After all, the Spatial Teleportation Stone had already been given to him. If Zhou Weiqing were to abandon Shangguan Bing’er, not only would they be unable to catch up to him, they would have made an enemy out of a future peerless powerhouse. It would be best if they returned Shangguan Bing’er to him, patch things up, and allow him to leave. He had to return to the Boundless Mainland anyway. Even if he wreaked havoc over there, it would not affect them here in the Mysterious Heavenly Mainland.

However, Zhou Weiqing had been so arrogant ever since his return. Dongfang was not the real Palace Master but she was still the second-in-command in Mysterious Heavenly Palace. In the years she had held that position, when was she ever reprimanded so bluntly? Not even Dongfang Hanyue dared to do so!

Even though she was shocked at Zhou Weiqing’s knowledge of Shangguan Bing’er’s captivity, her temper was also riled up.

‘Even if you have enormous talent. It’s still just talent. A kid like you who has not even achieved Heavenly King tier, how dare you say that you want to rain blood onto the Mysterious Heavenly Palace?’ She thought.

chapters.title: Chapter 737
chapters.body:
Chapter 737

Dongfang grinned under extreme rage, “This is great, this is so great. I want to see, with what capabilities will you rain blood onto my Mysterious Heavenly Palace. Let me inform you about your wife. She had been executed.”

The words were only spoken out of anger. However, to Zhou Weiqing, it was as if thunder had come out of nowhere in bright daylight. At that moment, Zhou Weiqing was stunned into silence.

Among the sky warriors who were surrounding him in mid-air and on the ground, those who were in front of him could clearly see Zhou Weiqing’s eyes rapidly turning terrifying blood-red.

His body was shivering and an unstable wave of energy burst out of Zhou Weiqing’s torso.

‘Terrifying’ could not even begin to describe the wave of energy. It was vast and deathly silent. One could even describe it as a gloomy bleakness. Zhou Weiqing’s bones were crackling throughout his whole body. Inside it, the Saint Energy that had been flowing slowly started to move with surprising swiftness.

A rich silvery-white light ribbon started to swirl out of Zhou Weiqing’s body. The galaxy-like brilliance that it radiated filled him with an intimidating aura.

‘Bing’er is dead?’ he thought. To Zhou Weiqing, this was no longer just a blow. At that moment, Zhou Weiqing was also thinking, ‘No wonder Dongfang Hanyue doesn’t want to come out and see me. They’ve killed Bing’er.’

“Bing’er, my dear Bing’er,” he lamented silently.

When he thought about how Shangguan Bing’er had died in this place and that he might not even find her body, Zhou Weiqing’s heart felt like it was going to explode.

Whenever anyone was pushed to the extreme, they would usually go into a catatonic state. They might not be reasonable by that point and they might not even have much time to think. However, they would definitely have their potential fully activated.

“Bing’er, I will turn the entire Mysterious Heavenly Palace into a blood sacrifice for you.”

“AAARGH!”

An extremely shrill howl came out of Zhou Weiqing’s mouth. Together with that, a silvery-white light ribbon with a hint of sanguine scent burst out of his body.

Within a split second, Zhou Weiqing’s most fearsome strength was unleashed as it enveloped him. Even though they did not plan to attack, the warriors who were still in the sky all simultaneously fell.

A frightening, almost perishing bloodline presence burst out of Zhou Weiqing’s body. How could Heavenly Beasts that were not even a Heavenly King tier resist? The sky warriors who never considered that Zhou Weiqing would attack were taken by surprise.

Zhou Weiqing did not even look at these people, as one after another dark golden light rays rose from his body. In the next moment, he clutched at the diamond-shaped pendant on his neck and forcefully yanked it off.

“Mysterious Heavenly Palace, oh Mysterious Heavenly Palace. I will not rest until you’re all dead.”

“Who’s being so rambunctious? I wanna see how you’re going to rain blood onto the Palace,” a deep gruff voice said. Following that, a massive dark silhouette rose slowly from the abyss. Its wings flapped, creating a gust of wind that caught the falling sky warriors, helping them land safely.

It was the Blackfiend Dragon, it had appeared!

Dongfang who stood in front of the entrance watching Zhou Weiqing was also surprised during his sudden transformation. However, when the Blackfiend Dragon appeared, she immediately relaxed.

It was only a kid who had not even attained a cultivation stage of Heavenly King tier. With him alone, what could he do even if he was furious? At this point, Dongfang had decided she wanted to capture Zhou Weiqing. He had behaved so badly. If they were to let him go, the reputation of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace would definitely be affected. No matter what, he had to be caught. What happens after that was not important.

The appearance of the Blackfiend Dragon pushed back the intimidating aura Zhou Weiqing had emitted. However, the Blackfiend Dragon was also shocked. Similar to the Dreadfiend Sea Naga, he recognized Zhou Weiqing’s aura had a hint of Dragon Emperor Bloodline. Not only that, there seemed to be another bloodline. It was fused with the Dragon Emperor Bloodline, and it seemed to have an even more powerful origin.

To the Blackfiend Dragon’s knowledge, it was impossible for something like this to happen, but it was happening right in front of him. It was not up to him to not believe it.

Zhou Weiqing’s Dark Demon God Tiger Bloodline was originally not as strong as his Dragon Emperor Bloodline. However, after he had activated the pure Essence of Demon God within the bloodline, it had undergone a mutation.

Staring at the Blackfiend Dragon, Zhou Weiqing’s expression did not change. Instead, the blood-red became even more intense. It looked almost similar to the Blackfiend Dragon’s crimson eyes.

“No one can stop me, not even you,” Zhou Weiqing’s stated coldly without any expression. At this point, he lifted his right hand with the Spatial Teleportation Stone. The galaxy-like, silver Saint Energy immediately rushed into the Spatial Teleportation Stone.

‘What is he doing?’ Everyone who saw his action thought in unison.

He had already made such a wild claim, was he trying to teleport away with the Spatial Teleportation Stone?

That should be the standard reaction. With so many powerhouses around, what chance did he have?

However, now that Dongfang decided to capture him, if he had left, it would be a huge concern in the future.

“Lord Blackfiend Dragon, please intercept him. Do not let him leave,” Dongfang asked with a little urgency in her voice. At the same time, she and the four Supreme Elders leaped up, flying towards Zhou Weiqing.

A surge of hair-raising energy streamed through the air. The five Heavenly Emperor tier powerhouses emanated their Heavenly Energy at the same time. What a spectacular scene it was. Even if a Heavenly God tier powerhouse were to take them on, they would not dare to be careless about it.

Zhou Weiqing hovered in the air quietly as if he was not aware of his surroundings. With intense stimulation from the Saint Energy, the pendant in his hand burst into a radiant silver light like a small silver sun. Its radiance was strong and intense, preventing people from looking at it directly.

The Blackfiend Dragon was also heavily injured after the battle with the Dreadfiend Sea Naga. It had only been a few days, so naturally, it had not completely healed. It only appeared because it was startled by Zhou Weiqing’s first yell. There was someone who dared to appear outside of Mysterious Heavenly Castle yelling Dongfang Hanyue’s name, and in such a rude way to boot. How could he not be surprised? How strong was this person that he was not afraid of offending everyone?

Hence, he hurried towards the ruckus. When it saw the perpetrator, however, it was only Zhou Weiqing. The Blackfiend Dragon did not harbor any resentment towards Zhou Weiqing. On the contrary, he liked the kid. After all, a few days ago, it was him who saved his life. Otherwise, he would never have made it back here alive.

Even so, it could see that Zhou Weiqing was clearly in a crazed state. He did not know what had happened, but he thought it would be best to restrain him for now. Whatever issues he might have with the Mysterious Heavenly Palace, they could deal with it themselves.

A darkness washed over the land as a huge black light screen fell on the valley, covering a large area ranging thousands of meters.

The Ward of Darkness, that’s right, it is the Ward of Darkness.

This was one of the Blackfiend Dragon’s strongest abilities. The other day, because he had to fight a powerhouse like the Dreadfiend Sea Naga, he needed help from outsiders to set up the Ward of Darkness. Facing Zhou Weiqing, he reckoned even if he was hurt, he would have enough strength to trap Zhou Weiqing.

Seeing the black screen of light trapping Zhou Weiqing, Dongfang and the four Supreme Elders all let out a sigh of relief. If they really let the kid get away, it would be problematic in the future. It could even be a ticking time bomb that could overturn the Mysterious Heavenly Palace.

With the Ward of Darkness completely set up, as long as the Blackfiend Dragon could maintain it, if the person using the Spatial Teleportation Stone did not have a higher cultivation stage than him, it would be impossible for the person to teleport away.

Zhou Weiqing’s gaze was cold as he continuously released his Saint Energy. Regarding everything else, it was like he did not even care. What mattered was the intense blood-red under his eyes that expressed his intent to die with his enemies.

The Blackfiend Dragon said in his deep voice, “I don’t know what happened. However, young man, you need to stay calm. I’m still here, I can’t let you wreck this place. Your cultivation is not bad among those in the younger generation. However, if you want to teleport away from my Ward of Darkness, I have to tell you it’s impossible. Surrender, and talk it out.”

“Surrender?” Zhou Weiqing had descended into semi-hysteria. “Asking me to surrender, you’re not strong enough. You think the Ward of Darkness can contain me? It’s too late.”

Hearing his chilly voice was like stuffing one’s ear with ice fragments. The weather was not cold, yet one still shuddered. Because of his killing intent, it was almost possible for everyone to see the bright scarlet color of blood.

For the sake of his wife, he had arrived alone and taunted the Mysterious Heavenly Palace on his own. This was already an impressive deed. But now, facing the Blackfiend Dragon, he was still on par in terms of aura. All these had left the powerhouses watching below with their mouths gaping.

At this moment, from the center of Zhou Weiqing’s palm, there was a clear crackle followed by a strong silver light pillar that shot out towards the sky.

The Ward of Darkness might be able to prevent the light pillar from leaving, but in the next moment, the silver light had filled the whole thousand-meter area.

A humongous and complicated symbol appeared in the sky. Rich, intense wave of the Spatial Attribute seemingly made everything else around it distort.

“This is bad. He’s not trying to flee, he trying to perform a summoning,” the Blackfiend Dragon yelped, he flapped his wings, sending a strong Darkness Energy towards the silver light pillar.

chapters.title: Chapter 738
chapters.body:
Chapter 738

However, just like Zhou Weiqing said, it was too late for the Blackfiend Dragon to do anything now. Even though he was a Heavenly God Tier powerhouse, it was too late for him to stop whatever Zhou Weiqing was doing. As the black glow approached the silver light, it was instantly repelled by the distorted silver light. It was surprising that the Blackness attribute could not break through the extremely powerful Spatial attribute.

Next, the powerful silver light transformed into an enormous vortex in a speed that could not be seen with naked eyes under the intense distortion. Looking at the vortex, even the Blackfiend Dragon was stunned as he flapped his wings to fly. The five Heavenly Emperor Tier powerhouses led by Dongfang did not dare to slow down. They could tell that it was a spatial turbulence!

It was not a skill of any sort but an actual spatial turbulence. Whoever that was at the center of it would be smashed into pieces. Even a Heavenly God Tier powerhouse would not dare to touch such a thing. Although someone at the Heavenly God Tier had a strong physique, who knew where the spatial turbulence would send one to?

At that point, nobody could stop Zhou Weiqing anymore. Meanwhile, the silverish white light that was emitting from his body was increasing. Because he was the one that started this and since this was also caused by the Spatial Teleportation Stone, he was unaffected by the spatial turbulence at all. After that, a terrifying wave of energy exploded, and a terrifying force spread out from the spatial turbulence. The intense wave of Heavenly Energy even caused the Mysterious Heavenly Castle to tremble and a gigantic shadow appeared in the middle of the spatial turbulence.

A dragon. Yes, it was a gigantic dragon. Its body was over hundreds of meters long, and its unfurled wings were like dark clouds hanging over one’s head. It was a gigantic dragon that was completely red. All of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace powerhouses were stunned. They did not expect that Zhou Weiqing would be able to summon a gigantic dragon with the Spatial Teleportation Stone. Besides, the Blackfiend Dragon could not be compared to the immense power of this gigantic dragon. Moreover, the Blackfiend Dragon was currently injured! With such a Heavenly God Tier gigantic dragon, no wonder Zhou Weiqing dared to say that he was going to rain blood onto the Mysterious Heavenly Palace.

At that time, Dongfang felt regretful to the very core of her stomach. She had never expected that her words would cause the scene that was currently unfolding before their eyes. Her daughter’s judgment was accurate! She had no idea that Zhou Weiqing had that in him. He could even summon a gigantic dragon.

That explained why he came here just for the Spatial Teleportation Stone. It was hard to believe that there was such secret skill. Even they had no idea that the Spatial Teleportation Stone could be used like that. The gigantic dragon that was summoned could compare to the combined abilities of the powerhouses that were present. It did not matter who won. As soon as they began their fight, it would be a disastrous attack to the Mysterious Heavenly Palace. It was impossible not to pay a painful price when fighting a powerhouse like that.

Those were the thoughts that were running through Dongfang’s mind However, she was not the one that was the most shocked. It was the Blackfiend Dragon. It was because the Blackfiend Dragon could clearly sense that the gigantic dragon had the purest Dragon Emperor Bloodline in it. That meant that it was the true descendant of the Dragon Emperor! He had commented in the past that even a Dragon Emperor’s descendant might not be able to defeat the Dreadfiend Sea Naga in the ocean but that was all just speculation. Among the members of the Dragon Clan, the most powerful ones were without a doubt, those who possessed the Dragon Emperor Bloodline. Moreover, the gigantic dragon that they were looking at was an adult.

The Blackfiend Dragon knew very well that under the suppression of the Dragon Emperor Bloodline, he would not be able to stand for long before this gigantic dragon even at his peak condition. Even worse, he was injured at the moment. My God! What kind of person did the people from the Mysterious Heavenly Palace offend to the extent that a gigantic dragon was summoned.

If the appearance of the gigantic dragon had caused the people from the Mysterious Heavenly Palace to be in great fear and distress, then what they saw next would put them in complete despair. The enormously silver spatial turbulence did not even disappear after the appearance of the gigantic dragon. As soon as the gigantic dragon appeared, it flapped its wings and flew to Zhou Weiqing’s back right away. Without a doubt, its gigantic dragon eyes were locked on the Blackfiend Dragon directly while powerful its Dragon Power exploded.

Next, another gigantic shadow slowly appeared in the middle of the spatial turbulence. As it appeared, the temperature of the mountain where the entire Mysterious Heavenly Castle was located, rose at an alarming rate. Surprisingly, the Blackness Attribute in the air disappeared right way and the Ward of Darkness was dismissed just like that.

Yes, that was another gigantic dragon and its body was more than double the size of the previous dragon. As it appeared with its terrifyingly enormous body, the Blackfiend Dragon almost fell from the sky under the power that it was releasing. The petrifying Dragon Power almost killed the four Heavenly Emperor Tier powerhouses that were standing across from it.

That, that was…

The Blackfiend Dragon’s eyes opened wide as his wings shook uncontrollably. He recognized it. He really did. It was the Dragon Emperor…

Dongfang and the four Supreme Elders were in complete shock. In the human world, they were Heavenly Emperor Tier powerhouses. They were truly mighty humans. Even Heavenly Jewel Masters respected them and dared not speak loudly to them. However, at the very moment, they were facing two Heavenly God Tier gigantic dragons that looked even scarier than the Dreadfiend Sea Naga. Faced with the terrifying gigantic dragons were unrestricted on land, they were in complete shock and despair.

Rain of blood. What he said was not merely out of rage but something he could really achieve. Yes, with the power of the entire Mysterious Heavenly Palace combined, they might be able to handle it if it was only one gigantic dragon. However, what they were facing were two adult dragons! Besides, the aura that the larger dragon was emitting was perhaps close to that of the Heavenly God Tier. It was not difficult for something like that to kill the Blackfiend Dragon, let alone kill them.

As the second gigantic dragon appeared, it flapped its wings while its enormous body moved quickly and soon, it appeared below Zhou Weiqing. It held up its enormous head up to support Zhou Weiqing’s body before an intense red glow lit up, bathing Zhou Weiqing in it. At that moment, the dragons’ majestic eyes were filled with excitement.

What was Zhou Weiqing’s reason for obtaining the Spatial Teleportation Stone from the Mysterious Heavenly Mainland? It was to teleport these two gigantic dragons they were looking at to prevent them from destroying the Luster Spatial Realm and affecting the entire Heavenly Jewel Island. Since he was going to teleport them, why did he choose to do it now?

The truth was, before this, Zhou Weiqing did not have the confidence to do it. It was his final trump card. He planned to do this when he encountered the second Dreadfiend Sea Naga at sea earlier. However, he did not have the confidence to do it. He was not sure if he could summon the two gigantic dragons from the Mysterious Heavenly Mainland that was tens of thousands of miles away. The Spatial Teleportation Stone could only be used for a few more times, he would never attempt this if he had no other choices.

However, the situation was different now. Bing’er was dead. Zhou Weiqing was so hurt that he was going insane. How could he retain his sanity under such a situation? His ability alone was far from enough to avenge Bing’er. How could he possibly fight the Mysterious Heavenly Palace on his own? That was why he had taken such a crazy action since he had no other choice. The truth had proven that he had succeeded.

At the time when Zhou Weiqing left the Luster Spatial Realm, Hui Yao the dragon had imprinted the coordinates of the Luster Spatial Realm in his mind. Hui Yao had also told Zhou Weiqing the way to summon him and Duo Si. In actual fact, Zhou Weiqing had thought too much. Hui Yao and Duo Si were not situated on the Boundless Mainland but in another realm. The concept of distance did not exist in this world when it came to teleportation from one realm to another. As a result, Zhou Weiqing had successfully summoned the two dragons.

Huo Yao’s eyes had a sparkle in them and it seemed to have completely healed. His majestic eyes were also locked on to the Blackfiend Dragon.

“Thank you, Weiqing. You’ve freed us. It seems like you’re in trouble. Tell us, what do you need us to do,” Hui Yao’s voice was deep but his voice echoed all over the mountain ranges as he spoke. The surrounding area was turning red.

The Dreadfiend Sea Naga and Blackfiend Dragon used Atmospheric Energy in a different way. When they were using it, they depended on their aura to maneuver it. However, dragon Hui Yao gave a whole new feeling to it. It seemed like the Atmospheric Energy had surrendered itself to him, allowing him to maneuver it as he wished.

The Blackfiend Dragon lost all hope when he heard what Hui Yao said. The Dragon Clan was a prideful clan. It was difficult for humans to command them. The reason why he stayed to protect the Mysterious Heavenly Palace was because the palace was the descendant of the Blackfiend Dragon’s Bloodline. However, it seemed like the two gigantic dragons that possessed the Dragon Emperor Bloodline had surrendered themselves to Zhou Weiqing. It was just too unbelievable.

How would they know that Zhou Weiqing had saved the lives of these two dragons? Without him and his women, Duo Si might have been dead and none of their children would have lived. If not for them, Hui Yao would not have been resurrected. Hence, no matter how arrogant the gigantic dragons were, they treated Zhou Weiqing as an equal. He was their friend, their partner.

Zhou Weiqing took a deep breath. Just when he was ready to release the scream of doom, a yell could be heard.

“Zhou Weiqing, no! Bing’er isn’t dead.” Two shadows dashed out of the Mysterious Heavenly Castle as the yell sounded. Two people rushed next to Dongfang and the four Supreme Elders. This time, it was Zhou Weiqing who was stunned. Although everything he saw through his eyes was a bloody-red, he could clearly see the ones who dashed out from the Mysterious Heavenly Castle.

Dongfang Hanyue wore a green dress. Next to her, Shangguan Bing’er was in her white dress. It seemed like Shangguang Bing’er was not hurt at all. She was as beautiful as she always was. Dongfang Hanyue’s beautiful eyes were opened wide with shock as she dashed out with Shangguan Bing’er.

Technically speaking, everything was a misunderstanding. Earlier, when Zhou Weiqing had screamed when he arrived, Dongfang Hanyue who was in the Mysterious Heavenly Castle heard it. She had no idea that Zhou Weiqing knew about Shangguan Bing’er being captured. Dongfang Hanyue was a little angry when she heard him screaming out there. ‘We’ve given the most precious thing to you. Can that even be compared to your wife?’ That was the reason why she did not leave the castle right away.

Just yesterday, after Dongfang had discussed with the four Supreme Elders, she had decided to listen to Dongfang Hanyue’s opinion and release Shangguan Bing’er. Dongfang Hanyue went to Shangguan Bing’er in a rush. To annoy Zhou Weiqing the meanie, she even joked with Shangguan Bing’er when she saw her that there was no rush for her to leave. She was afraid that Shangguan Bing’er would hold grudges so she had been talking to her for the past two days. They talked a lot but she had forgotten to return Shangguan Bing’er’s Spatial Ring to her. That was the reason why Zhou Weiqing had not been able to contact Shangguan Bing’er.

However, Dongfang Hanyue only realized that something was wrong when she heard Zhou Weiqing said that he wanted to rain blood onto the Mysterious Heavenly Castle when she was in Shangguan Bing’er’s room. So she brought Shangguan Bing’er out of the castle immediately. Everything sounded like they happened slowly but in reality, it only took five minutes from the time Zhou Weiqing arrived at the Mysterious Heavenly Palace until the time he summoned the two gigantic dragons.

The party was up when Dongfang Hanyue brought Shangguan Bing’er out of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace. In the end, Zhou Weiqing’s “Kill them all” was stuck in his throat and did not come out. In fact, Hui Yao and Duo Si were ready to attack by then. If Zhou Weiqing gave his instruction to kill everyone that was present, they were ready to do as he said. The terrifying aura lingered in the air and Zhou Weiqing’s eyes were still wide open. The indistinct, cold aura had melted away like snow together with the redness in his eyes.

‘Bing’er didn’t die! Bing’er didn’t die!’ At that moment, Zhou Weiqing’s tears were flowing down his cheeks uncontrollably. His body was shaking even more intensely now.

“Give back my Bing’er and I’ll let all of you go.” Zhou Weiqing said as his body shook. His voice did not sound convincing because he had two gigantic dragons by his side!

Dongfang Hanyue snapped out of her trance and felt pain in her heart as she watched Zhou Weiqing lose his manliness as he shed tears. At that moment, she behaved like a little girl, momentarily forgetting that she was the Palace Master of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace. She thought to herself, ‘If that were to happen to me, would he be this anxious?’

“I’m not returning her to you. You can kill me.” Dongfang Hanyue lifted her head and looked at Zhou Weiqing coldly. Zhou Weiqing was stunned. His felt like he was escaping rock bottom. When he saw that Shangguan Bing’er was alright, he did not seem as vengeful. He was speechless when he heard Dongfang Hanyue rejecting his request. He did not know how to deal with that. He felt sorry as he watched Dongfang Hanyue being stubborn.

At that moment, Shangguan Bing’er stepped up to the rescue. “Little Fatty, what are you doing! Hanyue has been treating me well, I’m alright!”

She summoned her Wings of the Wind God as she spoke then flapped her wings and flew towards Zhou Weiqing. Naturally, nobody stopped her. Dongfang and the four Supreme Elders were completely silent. They could clearly sense that if something had really happened to Shangguan Bing’er, Zhou Weiqing would definitely get the two gigantic dragons to destroy the Mysterious Heavenly Castle and turn it into a flatland. At that moment, even though they were sly and cunning, they had no idea how they should handle the situation.

The Wings of the Wind God was tremendously fast. Shangguan Bing’er got to Zhou Weiqing in just a blink of an eye. Zhou Weiqing did not care that people were watching as he wrapped her in his arms. His hands were touching her everywhere, making sure that his Bing’er was completely fine. Finally, he felt relieved. Although so many people were watching, Shangguan Bing’er did not resist at all as she hugged his waist tightly and buried her face in him.

Although she and Dongfang Hanygue had just come out, the both of them had been paying close attention to the Heavenly Energy outside. Hence, she could hear everything loud and clear even though she was in the Mysterious Heavenly Castle. A man who was not afraid of facing the entire Mysterious Heavenly Palace because of her. He even wanted to rain blood on this place and fight all on his own. How could she not be moved by that? That was her man, her Little Fatty!

Dongfang Hanyue’s eyes turned slightly red as she looked at Zhou Weiqing who was standing majestically on top of the gigantic dragon Hui Yao’s head. She knew that perhaps she would not be able to see this man anymore after today. She was jealous of Shangguan Bing’er, jealous of her for being able to be with him while Dongfang Hanyue herself had too many responsibilities. She had her father’s inheritance and the future of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace on her shoulders. All those were the heaviest burdens that she had to bear.

Zhou Weiqing and Shangguan Bing’er let go of each other slowly after hugging for a while. Surprisingly, none of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace powerhouses dared to interrupt them. The two Heavenly God Tier gigantic dragons’ suppressive powers were just too petrifying to them. At that moment, what they were concerned about was not the Mysterious Heavenly Palace’s pride but its survival.

“Little Fatty, you’ve misunderstood Sis Hanyue. She’s been very nice to me and told me many things. The Mysterious Heavenly Palace really did capture me as they were unsure of our intention here. However, they did not hurt me. Sis Hanyue came back immediately to convince the rest after she heard about it. We’re supposed to depart and look for you today.”

Zhou Weiqing scratched his head and sighed secretly in his heart. The ups and downs of his life happened too quickly. He could not help but felt a little embarrassed as he looked at Dongfang Hanyue who was far away.

“Hanyue, erm, it seems like this is a misunderstanding.” Zhou Weiqing mumbled.

Dongfang Hanyue bit her lower lips hard, trying to keep the tears in her eyes from overflowing but she could not stop it from happening.

Zhou Weiqing flapped open his wings on the back and flew towards the Mysterious Heavenly Palace while the dragon Hui Yao and Duo Si stayed where they were. Since they were there, they believed that nobody would dare to give Zhou Weiqing trouble. Shangguan Bing’er did not follow him. Instead, she stayed on Hui Yao’s head with an odd expression on her beautiful face.

Dongfang Hanyue did not keep what happened between her and Zhou Weiqing a secret. She told Shangguan Bing’er how she felt about Zhou Weiqing loud and clear. Shangguan Bing’er actually blamed Zhou Weiqing when she first found out about it. No matter how gentle she was, she was a woman after all. Moreover, she had two sisters at home. This Little Fatty scattered his love everywhere he went, he did not stop doing that even when he was in a foreign land. However, since Zhou Weiqing risked his life and did not care about the price he had to pay to rescue her today, the resentment that she had in her heart had faded away. On the contrary, she started empathizing with Dongfang Hanyue.

Dongfang Hanyue was the Palace Master of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace. Naturally, it was impossible for her to return to the Boundless Mainland with Zhou Weiqing. Does it not hurt the most when one was unable be with the person that one loved? Compared to her, Shangguan Bing’er was much more fortunate. Dongfang and the four Supreme Elders were now mere spectators. At that moment, they held Dongfang Hanyue in high regard. Although Dongfang Hanyue was affected by her feelings, she was not wrong in her assessment of Zhou Weiqing. Who would have thought that this young man would be able to summon two gigantic dragons?

If Dongfang Hanyue did not bring out Shangguan Bing’er on time, whatever happened today would really put the palace in a tough situation. The millennia of foundation of the Mysterious Heavenly Palace could have been completely destroyed!

Now that Shangguan Bing’er had returned to Zhou Weiqing, it seemed like they would not be fighting anymore. Dongfang let out a light sigh and waved her hand. She then brought the four Supreme Elders back to the Mysterious Heavenly Castle. She did that firstly, because their existence was unnecessary and secondly, to show that the Mysterious Heavenly Palace was no longer an enemy to Zhou Weiqing. Dongfang was not a dumb person. She knew that letting Dongfang Hanyue speak to Zhou Weiqing alone would be the best option at this time.

Zhou Weiqing kept his wings and landed before Dongfang Hanyue. His heart softened when he saw Dongfang Hanyue had tears streaming down her face with a hint of stubbornness on her face as she looked at him.

“Hanyue, what happened today is just a misunderstanding. It’s my fault. However, I’ve never doubted you. I just thought that the Mysterious Heavenly Palace was hurting Bing’er. No matter what, it’s all my fault.” One of Zhou Weiqing’s good qualities was that he always had the courage to admit it when he was wrong.

In the relationship between a man and a woman, most of the times many things were stuck due to stubbornness from both parties. As long as one side took the initiative to admit fault, it could be solved rather easily no matter how serious the matter was. Of course, that had to be built on the foundation of mutual love. Looking at Zhou Weiqing’s sincere face, Dongfang Hanyue took a quick step towards him and cried as she fell into his arms. She was crying not because Zhou Weiqing misunderstood her but she was afraid that they would not be seeing each other anymore after this. She was reluctant to let him go!

Zhou Weiqing was hit by a wave of emotions as he held Hanyue’s body that was as soft as cotton. The words slipped out of his lips. “Yueyue, go with me.”

Dongfang Hanyue proceeded to cry without responding. She was happy that Zhou Weiqing said that. However, could she really leave? The responsibilities on her shoulders were too heavy. The entire Mysterious Heavenly Palace needed her! Hence, she cried even more after hearing Zhou Weiqing’s sincere invitation as she continuously punched his shoulder.

Meanwhile, the Blackfiend Dragon felt unease in his body as he was being watched by the two Dragon Emperor descendants. He then attempted to extend an invitation to Hui Yao. “If the two of you are willing, you’re welcome to rest at my place. Seems like everything that happened today is just a misunderstanding.”

HuI Yao glared lightly at him and said, “We’re not going so that your cultivation isn’t affected. Since it’s a misunderstanding, we’ll leave soon after the explanation. I guess this isn’t the Boundless Mainland.”

The Blackfiend Dragon was secretly relieved. It was great that they were not going with him as the Fire Attribute in the Atmospheric Energy triggered by these two were just too powerful. However, the place that he was staying in was filled with Blackness Attribute. If they really went with him, perhaps it would take more than one or two days to restore the place to its previous state. He invited them just to show his sincerity.

“Yes, this is the Mysterious Heavenly Mainland. I’m afraid it’s tens of thousands of miles away from the Boundless Mainland.” The Blackfiend Dragon said respectfully. Hui Yao had a concerned look in his eyes. He and his wife were filled with excitement when Zhou Weiqing summoned them. First, because they had finally managed to come to the outside world and second was because the Luster Spatial Realm would not be destroyed anymore. After all, it was their ancestors who built it, it was best if it was not destroyed.

However, after a fleeting moment of excitement, their hearts were filled with how much they were missing their children. Moreover, they were a little concerned about the unknown powerful enemy. Faced with such an opponent, would they be able to bring back their children safely even if they managed to find the enemy?

Zhou Weiqing touched the curve on Dongfang Hanyue’s back as he spoke to her softly, “Don’t cry anymore, Hanyue. Your tears are breaking my heart. I don’t want to let you go, too! But you know that I’m just like you. I’ve many responsibilities that I need to handle. I still have to rescue my parents, I’ve many things to do. I would love to stay with you but…”

“Stop talking.” Dongfang Hanyue held her head up as she looked at Zhou Weiqing with her eyes that were red and swollen from crying.

“I’ll only ask you this. Are you willing to come back to see me after you’re done with everything that you need to do?”

Seeing desperation and determination in her eyes, Zhou Weiqing said instantly almost without any hesitation, “I’m willing. Of course I am. The soonest could be five years and the longest could be 10 years but I’ll definitely come back to see you. By then, I won’t only be here to see you, I’ll definitely bring you back with me. I believe by then, nobody on the Mysterious Heavenly Mainland can stop me anymore. Even if I need to kidnap you, I’ll kidnap you with me.”

Zhou Weiqing had a domineering aura when he said that. Dongfang Hanyue finally had a trace of happiness on her face that was filled with sadness. “Really? Don’t lie to me, or else I’ll bring the Mysterious Heavenly Palace to fight the Boundless Mainland.”

Zhou Weiqing smiled forcefully. “My best quality is the same as my biggest weakness. I’m soft-hearted, especially when it comes to my woman. Don’t worry, I’ll definitely do what I’ve promised.”

Dongfang Hanyue nodded lightly. “I’ll wait for you. I’ll wait for you even if it’s five years, ten years, even if it’s twenty years or longer. I’ll just consider you dead if you don’t come get me in 10 years. I’ll bring the Mysterious Heavenly Palace powerhouses myself to the Boundless Mainland for revenge.”

Zhou Weiqing’s heart shook a bit. Looking at the determination in Dongfang Hanyue’s eyes, his reluctance to leave became even more intense. Although the time that they spent together was short, the affection that he saw in Dongfang Hanyue’s eyes was no lesser compared to his other women. She was a good woman that was worthy of his love!

“Don’t worry, I’ll definitely live. For you and for the sake of all my wives, I’ll definitely live well.”

Dongfang Hanyue scoffed, “I heard from Bing’er that you’re a lecher. Hmph, I’ll be your last. Do you hear me? If not, I’ll kill those additional ones when you bring me back. Perhaps I might break through to Heavenly God Tier in five to 10 years time. I’m not joking with you.”

“I won’t! I won’t dare to do that.” Zhou Weiqing said.

He scratched his head and thought to himself, ‘Now that I have you, I’ve no idea how I should explain myself when I get back. Seems like I must behave myself. I need to stay far away from women no matter how beautiful they are. Or else, they’ll definitely kill me in the future!’

Dongfang Hanyue could not help but laugh out loud as she saw Zhou Weiqing’s naive expression as if he was being bullied. However, tears started dripping from her beautiful eyes again after a while. “You… You go. I’m afraid I won’t be able to help myself and leave together with you if you don’t leave now.” Dongfang Hanyue looked deep into his eyes and reluctantly turned around. Her back was facing him as she was unwilling to see him leave.

Zhou Weiqing took a deep breath and forcefully suppressed the feelings in his heart. He clenched his teeth and took a step forward. He then turned Dongfang Hanyue’s body around and gave her a deep kiss on her red lips. That passionate kiss almost melted Dongfang Hanyue. A silver light sparked and in the next second, Zhou Weiqing appeared far away in the sky. He moved again and landed on top of Hui Yao’s head. “Let’s go.”

Hui Yao and Duo Si who were husband and wife looked into each other eyes. They flapped their wings at the same time and drove their gigantic body up into the sky. Then, they flew far away.

Looking at them leave, Dongfang Hanyue’s eyes were all blurry from her tears. “Weiqing, you must come back! I’ll be waiting for you.”

Zhou Weiqing stood on top of Hui Yao’s head as he tried to get his feelings under control. Shangguang Bing’er stepped aside without interrupting him. She was a nice lady who would always think about others all the time. She felt Dongfang Hanyue’s pain deeply earlier. Wasn’t it the same as when she had to leave Little Fatty at that time?

Hui Yao and his wife flew towards the west. They might seem extremely slow but in reality, they were moving extremely fast. Zhou Weiqing took exactly two days to get back to Mysterious Heavenly Castle but this time around, they saw the ocean again after a couple of hours.

Hui Yao slightly retracted his wings, allowing his body to land and float on the ocean. He then asked Zhou Weiqing, “Weiqing, how did you guys come to the Mysterious Heavenly Mainland? If possible, it’s best that Duo Si and I don’t fly over the ocean. The Water Attribute in the ocean is too dense and is unfavorable to our cultivation. Apart from that, the creatures in the ocean below would be greatly affected as well. The shock might even cause a considerable amount of deaths. I don’t want to see that happening.”

Zhou Weiqing snapped out his thoughts and thought for a while before he spoke, “We have a way to go back on our own and it won’t be too slow. But what about the both of you? You guys have such large bodies…”

Hui Yao let out a smile. “Don’t worry about that. Have you forgotten about the Spatial Teleportation Stone? We can temporarily hibernate in there. You can summon us anytime you need us. The Spatial Teleportation Stone doesn’t seem to be that big of a problem, I’ll try to fix it by melting it. Otherwise, we’ll have to this scrap this precious stone after a couple of uses.”

Zhou Weiqing chuckled and said, “That’ll be great. If that’s the case, the both of you can let us down.”

As he spoke, Zhou Weiqing shook his hand and the Neptune Shuttle flew out into the ocean with its cabin cover opened. Hui Yao then let the both of them down. Just like what Hui Yao had said, his existence had caused the ocean below to turn slightly red. The intense Fire Attribute caused many fishes in the ocean to float on the surface from their death. Apart from that, they looked like they had been cooked. No wonder Hui Yao was reluctant to fly over the ocean. Although they were from the powerful Dragon Clan, they were reluctant to kill needlessly.

As Zhou Weiqing and Shangguan Bing’er entered the Neptune Shuttle, Hui Yao looked into his wife’s eyes. As the rich red glow faded away, their gigantic bodies transformed into two red glows and entered the Spatial Teleportation Stone on Zhou Weiqing’s chest. A great and vast force was inserted, and before Zhou Weiqing could feel it carefully, Hui Yao and Duo Si vanished into thin air the very next moment.

As soon as they disappeared, everything turned back to normal. There was no red anymore and after the Neptune Shuttle’s cabin cover was closed, Zhou Weiqing turned around and looked at Shangguan Bing’er who standing next to him. It had been almost a year since they came here. Their mission was finally complete, and it was finally time to head home.

Zhou Weiqing held Shangguan Bing’er’s tiny hands and said with a pitiful expression, “Bing’er, I know it’s my fault. I’m at fault. I promise this is really the last one. I’ll never touch any other women anymore, alright?”

Shangguan Bing’er let out a light sigh and said, “You better be grateful. Little Fatty, I just want to tell you that there are too many kind women in the world. It’s impossible to make all of them yours. I can forgive you but you still have Tian’er, my two sisters as well as the Little Witch who sacrificed herself to save you.”

Zhou Weiqing scratched his head and said, “I know, it’s my fault. From now onwards, if I have a relationship with any other women, I won’t complain even if you guys neuter me.”

Shangguan Bing’er burst out laughing and said, “You’re the one who said that. Don’t regret it.”

“Err… Can I take it back? Even so, will you guys be able to bear doing that to me?” Zhou Weiqing smirked.

Shangguan Bing’er scoffed and said, “Why can’t we bear to do that? All you do is bully us.”

Zhou Weiqing then pulled her into his arms. “How is this bullying? It should be love. You see, it’s been a long time since I’ve loved you. I’ve gotten rusty. Let me see if my Bing’er was tortured for the past few days in the Mysterious Heavenly Palace. Did you lose weight…”

chapters.title: Chapter 739
chapters.body:
Chapter 739

With this delay, more than an hour had gone by again. Finally, the two of them launched the Neptune Shuttle and headed straight into the deep sea.

In the entire year that Zhou Weiqing was living in the Mysterious Heavenly Mainland, he managed to gain himself a lot of benefits. Not only did he manage to complete his mission, his cultivation base had made considerable progress as well. His Saint Energy had been elevated to the 38th-tier, leaving him a step closer to solidifying his Saint Nucleus Core. Zhou Weiqing could faintly feel that if he succeeded in solidifying his Saint Nucleus Core, his cultivation base would most likely take another substantial leap. By then, he would be able to fight against a Heavenly Emperor-tier master, or maybe, even a Heavenly God-tier master.

The Neptune Shuttle was extremely fast. Under the guidance of Zhou Weiqing’s Saint Energy, it sped in the sea like a flash of lightning. At this rate, Zhou Weiqing predicted that he would be able to return to the Heaven’s Expanse Palace with Bing’er in two months time at most.

Soon, a day had gone by. The Neptune Shuttle that they drove had now entered the deep sea.

As Zhou Weiqing continued to infuse his Saint Energy into the Neptune Shuttle, some changes suddenly took place in the sea in front of them. Because he was using his Saint Energy to run the shuttle, his perception was extremely keen. The shuttle was like an extension of his body. Right now, the shuttle seemed to have crashed into a huge invisible net. The strong force of restraint immediately slowed down their speed.

There seemed to be no changes on the outside and the sea water still remained as clear as before but the force of restraint was awfully strong. Gradually, the Neptune Shuttle came to a halt.

SH*T!

Zhou Weiqing secretly cried in his heart. He blasted more Saint Energy out and in that instance, a blinding silverish white light exploded from the shuttle. Instead of moving forward, it pierced through the water upwards and in a “whoosh”, it suddenly stumbled out from the water.

As soon as they charged upward, a horrendously big mouth unexpectedly clamped shut at the place they were just at a moment earlier. If they had even been a second slower, they would have most likely been swallowed by that horrendously big mouth.

Zhou Weiqing and Bing’er had already leaped out of the Neptune Shuttle before quickly putting it away into the Sumeru Ring. They were both hovering in the air at the moment.

Both of them instantly flapped open their wings at the same time, climbing higher into the air as they stared at the spot below.

At this moment, a huge vortex with at least a kilometer wide diameter suddenly appeared on the surface of the sea. It was also at this time that a deep, grievous voice sounded from below the vortex.

“I can’t believe it! It’s actually you people! Boy, let’s see who is going to save you now!”

A ferocious and gigantic head emerged slowly from the center of the vortex. It was none other than the Dreadfiend Sea Naga that Zhou Weiqing and Dongfang Hanyue had brutally injured last time.

When Zhou Weiqing laid eyes on it, he was taken aback. He thought to himself, ‘How clingy can this guy be? I’m already driving the Neptune Shuttle so fast and he still manages to stop me in time. What’s with my luck…’

If the conditions were similar to when he traveled from the Boundless Mainland to the Mysterious Heavenly Mainland, Zhou Weiqing would never forget this little detail and he would most likely take a longer detour. However, since he was accompanied by two giant dragons right now, he did not bother trying to avoid anything on the way back. Still, it came as quite a shock to him that he would come across the Dreadfiend Sea Naga midway.

It had only been a few days but it seemed like this fellow had not only fully restored his health, he also appeared much larger than he was before. Apart from that, his cultivation base also seemed to have increased substantially.

In fact, Zhou Weiqing was the fool right here. Had he not driven the Neptune Shuttle, no matter how powerful the Dreadfiend Sea Naga was, it would not have been able to discover them in such a vast open sea. The Neptune Shuttle was made from the Nucleus Core from the father of two Dreadfiend Sea Nagas. The aura that the shuttle released was too familiar to the Dreadfiend Sea Naga. How could he possibly not notice them?

Having felt such a familiar aura all of a sudden, the Dreadfiend Sea Naga would naturally rush over immediately. As for the increase in his cultivation base, it was not that he had gotten a blessing in disguise during the battle. What happened was, even though his brother had self-detonated in the previous battle, he did not blow himself into pieces. Because of that, part of his Nucleus Core remained intact as it fell into the sea. So, how could the Dreadfiend Sea Naga before them not be able to find it?

It was all thanks to his brother’s remaining Nucleus Core that he could restore his body in such a short time. It had also helped in improving his cultivation base greatly.

“Looks like lady luck is on our side,” Zhou Weiqing told Bing’er who was by his side. He completely ignored the Dreadfiend Sea Naga below. Instead, he led her as they continued flying in the sky, trying to put some distance between them and the Dreadfiend Sea Naga.

Right now, Bing’er was a little bit nervous. After all, the Dreadfiend Sea Naga was a Heavenly God-tier master, the overlord of the ocean. Not only that, it had quite a ferocious appearance as well.

“Is that the Dreadfiend Sea Naga?” She asked worriedly.

Zhou Weiqing nodded his head as he replied, “Don’t worry, relax! I’m here!”

The Dreadfiend Sea Naga did not even feel the slightest bit of anxiety as he watched them soar higher and higher in the sky. Without warning, his gigantic body thrust upwards from the sea surface. Even though it had no wings, it was able to fly with the help of its tyrannical cultivation base.

When he was in the sea, his perception ability was mightily potent. He had long noticed that Dongfang Hanyue was not by Zhou Weiqing’s side. Instead, there’s a human beside him that had a far weaker cultivation base. For this reason, he did not feel anxious at all.

The Dreadfiend Sea Naga hated Zhou Weiqing to the core. He would never stop until he could torture Zhou Weiqing to death. He also wanted the torturing process to be lengthy as well.

Zhou Weiqing and Bing’er were flying at full speed. In just a short while, they had managed to travel a kilometer away. Still, the Dreadfiend Sea Naga was hard on their heels. Right now, the sky had completely turned azure blue. The water element in it was slowly turning richer and more intense. The restraining power was constantly increasing as well as it slowed down Zhou Weiqing and Bing’er’s flying speed.

All of this was because the Dreadfiend Sea Naga wanted to scare them and raise their fear bit by bit. Zhou Weiqing was all alone now. Even though previously Zhou Weiqing suddenly exploded and launched a fearsome attack on it, who did you think the Dreadfiend Sea Naga was? How could he not notice that it was just a fleeting explosive ability? This time he had come prepared. He was absolutely confident that he would be able to crush Zhou Weiqing to death easily this time.

The sinister energy ripple continued to fluctuate in the air. At this time, even Zhou Weiqing started to feel uneasy. The reason why he felt unease was not because he was worried that he would not be able to flee from the Dreadfiend Sea Naga. Instead, he was anxious that he might not be able to kill the Dreadfiend Sea Naga off completely later.

“Boy, you won’t stand a chance today! I’ll skin you alive and make you suffer inch by inch! Oh yeah! The energy in your body seems to be quite special and it might be a little useful to me. I guess I’ll just devour all of them! You don’t even have to bother trying to resist me”

The pressure brought by the water element in the air increased dramatically. The disconcerting energy ripple suddenly amplified as it increased its pressure. It made it impossible for Zhou Weiqing and Bing’er to continue soaring up the sky with their flying ability.

The Dreadfiend Sea Naga’s body that had lengthened to 100 meters long was now hovering in mid-air. It was completely unnecessary for his body to be immersed in the sea when dealing with Zhou Weiqing alone. Furthermore, this was just above the sea after all. The Water element in the air was still as intense as usual.

Staring at the Dreadfiend Sea Naga, Zhou Weiqing suddenly burst out laughing, “Hey big guy! Don’t think that you’ve already won the battle. The game has only just begun!”

Without a doubt, Zhou Weiqing and Bing’er were no match for the Dreadfiend Sea Naga. Considering the dangers in the ocean, he usually would not choose to use such a direct route to travel back to the Boundless Mainland. However, he had his options, of course. Compared to when he was in the Mysterious Heavenly Palace, he was a lot more confident than before. After all, he was still unsure whether his summoning would be successful or not when he was in the Mysterious Heavenly Palace. However, he no longer had to worry about that any longer.

Two rays of red light blasted out from Zhou Weiqing’s chest almost at the same time. One headed to the sky while another headed to the sea. Before the formidable Dreadfiend Sea Naga could figure out what had just happened, the sky and the sea started to change color concurrently.

Before the Dreadfiend Sea Naga appeared, Hui Yao had already spoken to Zhou Weiqing. How could the two gigantic dragons not notice the Heavenly God-tier powerhouse’s aura? Zhou Weiqing luring the Dreadfiend Sea Naga up to the sky was actually carried out under Hui Yao’s instruction as well. If the sea naga was in the sea, even though they could easily beat him, they could not completely stop him from escaping. After all, the geographical position was obviously on his side. However, the situation was completely different now that he had come up to the sky. Although they were still above the sea, the sky was the domain of the Dragon Emperor Bloodline. How could they possibly let the Dreadfiend Sea Naga run rampant?

When the disturbing red light blossomed, it blotted up the sky and covered up the earth. The Dreadfiend Sea Naga suddenly panicked. He immediately tried to plunge down towards the big sea.

“Come back!” Duo Si’s disdainful voice resonated all of a sudden. In a violent rumble, the Dreadfiend Sea Naga’s body was thrown back up violently.

When the red lights appeared, a warm gush of energy had already shrouded Zhou Weiqing and Bing’er in it. The next moment, their bodies were lifted up high in the sky. They could no longer clearly see whatever was happening below them. All that they could see was an endless shade of red.

Zhou Weiqing and Bing’er could faintly feel the potent energy ripples that were being shadowed by the red ray. However, it was merely a surge as they were barely affected by the ripples from where they were at.

There was no doubt that a battle among three gigantic dragons would be a remarkably thrilling one. However, in order to ensure Zhou Weiqing and Bing’er’s safety and to prevent the Dreadfiend Sea Naga from resorting to desperate measures when he was pushed to the brink, Hui Yao did not allow them to watch the battle.

Very quickly, ten minutes had gone past. The surging red cloud slowly died down and all of a sudden, the red lights converged as everything below re-appeared before Zhou Weiqing and Bing’er’s eyes.

The Dreadfiend Sea Naga that was originally brutal and insolent suddenly lost all of his Heavenly God-tier aura. Although his body was monstrous, he still paled significantly in comparison to Hui Yao.

At this time, Hui Yao’s two front claws were latched on to his neck and spine respectively as he lifted the Dreadfiend Sea Naga high up in the air. His body had shortened by a third now. The tail on the lower half of his body had completely disappeared and there were also traces of violent burning. The ferocious-looking spikes on his entire body were flattened almost by two-thirds. In front of the two Dragon Emperor’s descendant, along with the fact that they were in the sky, the Dreadfiend Sea Naga stood no chance at all.

The sea naga was not yet dead. It was merely restricted by Hui Yao’s insolent dragon force. Right now, his eyes no longer had any viciousness in them. Instead, they were filled with intense fear.

Zhou Weiqing spread his hands out, “See? I told you earlier that I have the Dragon Emperor Bloodline but you didn’t believe me! You can’t possibly escape now, you know. This time, although we’ve taken the Spatial Teleportation Stone from the Mysterious Heavenly Palace, we helped them to solve their trouble as well. Hmm, not bad! Sir Hui Yao, just kill this fellow off and save him from creating nuisance in the sea in the future!”

Hui Yao chuckled, “There’s no hurry to kill him off yet. He is still of some use to us!” Although they were all dragons, there were actually multiple dragon clans. On top of that, Hui Yao who was the descendant of the almighty, prestigious Dragon Emperor had repeatedly owed his life to Zhou Weiqing. He had always wanted to repay his kindness and now was just the perfect time.

“There’s still some use? Could it be that you want him to carry us back to the Boundless Mainland, Sir?” Zhou Weiqing asked curiously.

Hui Yao shook his head, “How’s that possible? Just because he looks slouchy with his head hanging down, he’ll be completely different the moment he’s released back into the sea. One of the natural ability of the Dreadfiend Sea Naga is to absorb energy from the sea to restore his own health. Although his injury is quite heavy now, as long as he enters the sea, he can flee immediately using his secret technique. It won’t be long before he returns to a lively state. For this reason, we can never let it touch sea water again.”

The Dreadfiend Sea Naga who was in Hui Yao’s clutch had a look of desperation and despair in his eyes as he listened to Hui Yao’s words. Right now, under Hui Yao’s grip, he could not even detonate his Nucleus Core even if he wanted to.

Unconvinced, Zhou Weiqing asked, “Then, what do you mean by that?”

Hui Yao let out a chuckle, “You brat! Sometimes you’re smart but sometimes you can be so obtuse. It’s not easy to get such a good target you know. Or could it be that your Demonic Devour is only there for decoration purposes?”

The moment he heard that, Zhou Weiqing was taken completely by surprise. Demonic Devour. Could it be that the reason why Hui Yao kept the Dreadfiend Sea Naga alive was to let him devour it?

That time, when they were in the Luster Spatial Realm, he did indeed devour Hui Yao and Duo Si’s dragon energy but that was only a partial devour that was under the control of the two giant dragons. Hui Yao had said that he would need several years to restore himself after Zhou Weiqing had devoured his energy. However, now that he thought about it, it must have been a joke so that he would feel relieved while he set off to look for the Spatial Teleportation Stone.

It was exactly because he had devoured their energy before that Zhou Weiqing was even more aware of the atrocity of the gigantic dragons’ Heavenly Energy. That was by no means a small amount of energy. Moreover, if he were to devour the Dreadfiend Sea Naga’s Heavenly Energy, he did not need to think twice like before. Instead, he could directly devour his ultimate source of energy. How ghastly would a Heavenly God-tier Heavenly Beast’s entire Heavenly Energy along with its ultimate source of energy be? Even Zhou Weiqing found it to be somewhat difficult to imagine.

Hui Yao nodded his head at him, “Stop standing there blankly and get started right away! I’ve sensed your body and it seems like your cultivation base has increased again. Your body has also become much tougher now. There shouldn’t be any problem for you to devour this Dreadfiend Sea Naga. If you find the energy to be too much for you, you can share a little of it with your little girlfriend there.”

Zhou Weiqing was not a pretentious person so he did not try to disguise the excitement in his heart. After giving Hui Yao a deep bow, he immediately went in front of the Dreadfiend Sea Naga in a flash.

When the Dreadfiend Sea Naga saw Zhou Weiqing approaching him, the Dreadfiend Sea Naga’s eyes instantly lit up with hatred again. Ever since he came across this man, he had always been accompanied by back luck. What was he going to do now?

Before the Dreadfiend Sea Naga could think about it any further, a sharp pain suddenly could be felt on his neck. The bloodcurdling coercion force left him with no opportunity to even resist.

In order to ensure Zhou Weiqing’s safety and prevent the sea naga from acting defiantly, Duo Si had also flown close and clutched onto his body from the other side, firmly holding it in the sky.

In that situation, let alone the Dreadfiend Sea Naga, even his elder brother and possibly his father would be helpless under the clutches of two Heavenly God-tier gigantic dragons at the same time. After all, this was the powerful suppression of the Dragon Emperor’s two descendants.

Zhou Weiqing flew non stop to the front of the Dreadfiend Sea Naga before coming to a halt. At the same time, he motioned for Bing’er to hover by his side. Once his body could no longer receive the energy, he would transform the Dreadfiend Sea Naga’s Heavenly Energy into Saint Energy before infusing it into Bing’er’s body, dividing some of the energy and giving it to her.

Although Zhou Weiqing’s cultivation base had been elevated to the Ninth Jewel, his trip to the Mysterious Heavenly Mainland could be considered as extremely dangerous. Be it infiltrating the Mysterious Heavenly Palace or facing the Dreadfiend Sea Naga later on, the powerhouses that he encountered all had the strength to put him to death.

Now that he was going back to the Boundless Mainland, the situation in the Boundless Mainland was much more complicated than the Mysterious Heavenly Mainland. Even though the powerhouses that Zhou Weiqing faced at one time in the Boundless Mainland were not as many or concentrated as it was in the Mysterious Heavenly Mainland, in truth, there were more powerhouses in the Boundless Mainland compared to the Mysterious Heavenly Mainland. Not only that, there were still the owners of the Destruction Energy and only God knew where they were now. Not to mention the possible crisis that the unknown Netherworld would bring to the world.

For this reason, what he needed now was to strengthen his own power. With such a good opportunity presented in front of him, he would naturally not let it slip away. There was nobody else in this world who had such opportunities.

The Demonic Devour technique was the only one in the entire Boundless Mainland. Coupled with the assistance from these two dragons, even the Heavenly Snow Mountain Lord would not be able to encounter such thing.

Zhou Weiqing directly stepped on the Dreadfiend Sea Naga’s gigantic head. Reaching out with his hands, he grabbed onto the two sharp spikes on the sea naga’s head that had not been destroyed yet.

Earlier, the spikes could shoot devastating jets of the water element. However, at this moment, it was unfortunate that they had become inanimate objects under Hui Yao and Duo Si’s pressure.

Taking a deep breath, Zhou Weiqing first calmed his mind down. At the same time, he mobilized the Saint Energy inside his body to make the process more harmonious.

He was not in rush to cast the Devour technique just yet. After all, the energy that he was about to devour was just too tremendous. If he was a little careless, there could be adverse effects instead. Zhou Weiqing was a smart person. He would never make such a careless mistake.

After 15 minutes, he had already adjusted his physical condition to the best state and maintained his body in the Dragon-Tiger Transformation. The silver light on his body loomed distinctively on his skin’s surface and the Saint Energy aura that was filled with a sense of creativity was unleashed from his body.

The feeling that the energy radiated was not too strong but it did have a kind of fair and mild but awe-inspiring power. As the energy was running, even the Dreadfiend Sea Naga that was about to be devoured did not feel any threat from them at all. He did not understand what Zhou Weiqing was trying to do. However, in the next moment, he started becoming extremely restless.

The soft silverish white light suddenly changed color as a faint virtual image gradually rose up behind Zhou Weiqing. It was the Demon God’s Mirror Illusion.

Both of Zhou Weiqing’s hands had turned pure grey. Intense grey rays were circulating in the air. The strong evil aura gave off a bloodcurdling sense of pressure. Without warning, a terrifying suction force immediately appeared on both his hands. The formidable suction energy directly siphoned the Dreadfiend Sea Naga’s pure Heavenly Energy from his body into Zhou Weiqing’s own body.

Being able to reach the Heavenly God-tier meant that all of the Heavenly Energy in its body was at its most concentrated and purest state. The Dreadfiend Sea Naga’s entire body was like a huge block of solid energy. Under the support of the Saint Energy’s Ninth Jewel cultivation base, Zhou Weiqing’s devouring speed was extremely fast but the Heavenly Energy in the sea naga’s body was so tremendously huge that it felt like the energy was flowing out very slowly.

Just as the gigantic dragon Hui Yao had said, the current state of Zhou Weiqing’s body was far from being comparable to how it was before. Even though he had managed to raise his cultivation base up to the Ninth Jewel after devouring the Heavenly Energy from the two dragons, that was merely a direct boost to his energy. At that time, he had already reached the limit that his body could bear.

Along with the completion of his Immortal Deity Technique, his body was now filled with the Saint Energy that could recirculate on its own. In that one year after devouring the energy, Zhou Weiqing’s body was constantly improved by the Saint Energy. During this process of improvement, his body had become more and more refined. The impurities in his body were constantly being dispelled by the Saint Energy through respiration. One could say that right now, the scent of Zhou Weiqing’s body was so pure that it could even be compared to a baby. Not only that, his body’s toughness had become so high that even many Heavenly King and Heavenly Emperor-tier powerhouses were no match for him.

This was also one of the reasons why when he first encountered the Dreadfiend Sea Naga’s attack, he did not suffer much from any serious injuries.

Without a doubt, the continuous improvement of his body also heavily affected his meridians. The meridians that he possessed had already reached a level where it could completely sustain solid energy.

The Saint Energy was the most powerful attribute and it could even create heaven and earth. How could its effect be compared to other ordinary energies? On top of that, Zhou Weiqing himself also possessed the fusion between the Dark Demon God Tiger and Dragon Emperor bloodlines. Before this, he had just recently been baptized by the Demon God Energy. It elevated his Saint Energy to another level.

Under such circumstances, one could say that Zhou Weiqing’s cultivation base was constantly being improved secretly every day. His body’s physical strength was so strong that he had reached a level that he himself did not know of.

Two waves of Heavenly Energy poured out from his palms into his body. However, this time, Zhou Weiqing did not feel the kind of unbearable feelings he had when he devoured Hui Yao’s energy that time.

After the pure Heavenly Energy flooded into his body, it was instantly disintegrated by his 36 major Death Acupuncture Points Chi current. After the energy was disintegrated, the 36 major Death Acupuncture Points turned into 36 funnels as it rapidly completed its filtration and conversion process.

This was the advantage of raising his cultivation base. When Zhou Weiqing was devouring Hui Yao’s energy, there was only one slightly large whirlpool that carried out the conversion process. However, this time, although the whirlpools that the 36 Death Acupuncture Points formed were not as enormous as that one last time, the number of whirlpools were far greater and the conversion speed was, without a doubt, very alarming.

At the same time, the galaxy-like Saint Energy that was accumulated in Zhou Weiqing’s Dantian also began to move rapidly. With no sense of humility, they took the Saint Energy that was obtained from the devouring process for themselves. To his surprise, the galaxy-like Saint Energy also started to run on its own as it formed the 37th whirlpool in his Dantian.

However, this ultra Saint Energy whirlpool was not merely absorbing the energy. Instead, it began to carry out a secondary filtration as well.

That was right, a secondary filtration. Once again, it filtered and concentrated the Saint Energy that was already filtered before this. Droplets of Saint Energy that was as dazzling as the galaxy oozed out from the bottom of the whirlpool before it merged into the whirlpool again.

The Heavenly Energy of a Heavenly God-tier powerhouse was indeed pure and concentrated. However, after undergoing the double refinement process by the Saint Energy in Zhou Weiqing’s body, the volume became much smaller.

This felt wonderful to Zhou Weiqing. He could literally feel his strength constantly being elevated with every passing second.

Not only that, this kind of elevation was completely without any side effects. It was totally different from Dongfang Hanyue’s infusion-like cultivation base elevation method.

This was all thanks to the Saint Energy! Had it not been for the existence of the Saint Energy, even supposing Zhou Weiqing managed to devour the Heavenly God-tier’s Heavenly Energy and managed to raise his cultivation base, there would still be a certain degree of adverse effects on his body. In fact, the effects on Dongfang Hanyue was actually considered mild.

The Saint Energy was the ultimate source of energy for the Heaven and Earth. One could say that all of the attributes were derived from the Saint Energy. For this reason, after the external energies went through the purification process, no impurities would be left in them at all. Moreover, Zhou Weiqing’s body had been purified by the Saint Energy for so long that he was now like a gigantic Saint Energy furnace. Under such circumstances, it would naturally not cause him any problems.

Hui Yao had actually been observing Zhou Weiqing’s condition. With his cultivation base, he could naturally feel the changes in Zhou Weiqing’s body. In fact, he was quite taken aback by it. After all, Zhou Weiqing’s current speed of devouring the Dreadfiend Sea Naga’s Heavenly Energy was much, much faster than the speed he used last time. Yet, after the huge pure Heavenly Energy entered his body, the amount that was converted into Saint Energy was almost next to nothing. What a terrible amount of energy he needed to do just that. How did he manage to condense the energy to such a level?

Although Zhou Weiqing’s current cultivation base was still far from being worthy in Hui Yao’s eyes, something did cross Hui Yao’s mind. If Zhou Weiqing managed to reach the Heavenly God Tier later, how strong would he be at that time? Maybe even ten Heavenly God-tier powerhouses of the same level could not defeat him even if they were to go at him at the same time.

Indeed, this was a fact. To put it simply, Zhou Weiqing’s cultivation base was at the Ninth Jewel right now. However, if there were ten other people whose cultivation base was also in the Ninth Jewel, were to have a go at him, there was nothing much that they could do to him. Even a Heavenly King-tier powerhouse would probably be unable to win against the current him as well. After he possessed the Demon God’s Possession technique, it made him so strong that he could even challenge a Heavenly Emperor-tier powerhouse now.

Along with Zhou Weiqing’s constant devouring, the grey virtual image behind him gradually turned more solid. Even though there was no face yet on the grey virtual image, with its gradual solidification, the aura that it was emitting was so formidable that even the two gigantic dragons started to feel a sense of inexplicable pressure.

Hui Yao and Duo Si exchanged a look. They could clearly see the astonishment in each other’s eyes. After all, it had only been one year since they last parted ways with Zhou Weiqing.
