Though it looked like this was the Six Ultimate Godly Light Formation that was modified from one of the Six Ultimate Heavenly Emperors, Long Shiya’s Six Ultimate Heavenly Path Formation, Zhou Weiqing had always had Saint Energy as a base for all his techniques. For this reason, the technique that he had just used was completely different from those of the Six Ultimate Heavenly Emperors, Long Shiya.

Put simply, though they were still the Fetters of Wind, the one that Zhou Weiqing cast was at least three times more powerful than other Heavenly Jewel Masters who were in the same tier as him. He could elevate a seven-star rated technique to become one that was equivalent to the level of ten-stars. Now that he had just cast twelve Fetters of Wind onto Shangguan Tianyue in a row, even a Heavenly Emperor-tier master like him would not be able to break free from it so easily.

Even though they could not mobilize any Atmospheric Energy from the outer world, the Atmospheric Energy here itself was already extremely rich. After he had cast the twelve Fetters of Wind, Zhou Weiqing did not stop for even a second. Instead, he turned his palms and faced them towards each other. All that the spectators could see was the bluish-purple light that suddenly flashed in between his palms. At the next instant, a giant lightning dragon burst out from his palms, charging straight towards Shangguan Tianyue.

The lightning was so fast that even after it had transformed to become a dragon, it still retained its speedy characteristics.

Shangguan Tianyue who constrained had been completely thrown into utter chaos by Zhou Weiqing’s Fetters of Wind. Before he could break free from the bindings, Zhou Weiqing’s lightning dragon had already appeared right before his eyes.

The true power of the Heavenly Emperor-tier powerhouse could completely be seen at this moment. Though he had not yet fully broken free from the shackles of the Fetters of Wind’s, a glimpse of light flashed across Shangguan Tianyue’s eyes and without warning, a crystal clear ice shield materialized before him. The ice shield had a diameter of about three meters and completely shielded his body behind it. Being unable to move physically did not mean that one could not cast any techniques at all.

However, Zhou Weiqing’s control of his techniques was not that simple as he thought. Just as the lightning dragon was about to crash onto the ice shield, it suddenly changed its path and went around the side of the ice shield before slamming down hard onto Shangguan Tianyue.

In the midst of the loud crash, a bluish-purple light suddenly radiated from Shangguan Tianyue’s entire body. After a great deal of struggle, he had finally broken free from the constraints of the Fetters of Wind. At once, a strong stinging numbness spread throughout his entire body.

The lightning dragon was actually formed by Zhou Weiqing after multiple simulations of the Lightning Suffering Skill. In fact, even Long Shiya who possessed the Lightning Attribute would not be able to cast this kind of attack. After all, he did not have any Saint Energy at all!

A black light suddenly appeared without warning. As a matter of fact, this black light actually emerged directly from below Shangguan Tianyue’s feet. A black hexagram was formed as it emerged.

As a Heavenly Emperor-tier powerhouse, Shangguan Tianyue possessed quite a stout body. For this reason, he did not suffer from any injuries although he was attacked head-on by Zhou Weiqing. However, the black light suddenly appeared too suddenly. Still suffering from the numbness, he could not manage to break free from this in time. A blackish-red light suddenly flashed across his head, forming a strange sigil above of him.

This was the Curse of Doom. Naturally, it was an advanced version as well.

While casting all of these spells, Zhou Weiqing did not show any sign of hesitation at all. It could be said that all of these spells were unleashed one after the other without pause. Not only that, each and every one of them was so extremely powerful.

After the Curse of Doom was unleashed, he paused his movement for a while. Both his hands were clasped before his chest. A rich, intense, silver light suddenly broke out from his hand and as he turned both of his palms inward at the same time, he made a gesture like he was casting something. The moment his palms were opened again, a Silver Emperor rose up to the sky before picking up speed as it continued to soar. The Silver Emperor Lightning Pierce was cast before it was closely followed by the fusion technique of Spatial Rend and the Silver Emperor Wing Slash — the Silver Emperor Spatial Rend. In an instant, the Silver Emperor had already appeared in front of Shangguan Tianyue’s eyes.

From the start of their battle until this moment, the sandalwood stick had just only burned a little. However, in this short amount of time, Zhan Lingtian’s back was already completely drenched in sweat. Other than his bewilderment, there were no other emotions in his heart. It had never crossed his mind that Zhou Weiqing’s strength was now so immensely powerful to the point that he could even suppress Shangguan Tianyue. Zhan Lingtian was not a weak person. He was very familiar with the two palace masters here. Naturally, it was clear to him that other than his Consolidated Equipment, Shangguan Tianyue had already used up all his might in this battle. Be that as it may, he was still being suppressed by Zhou Weiqing under such circumstances.

Ever since the smile vanished from Shangguan Tianyang’s face who was now standing beside Zhan Lingtian, it had never reappeared again on his lips. What he could see was naturally much more profound than that of Zhan Lingtian. He also possessed all the techniques that Zhou Weiqing cast, but all of these techniques that were cast in the battle were actually released by the Six Ultimate Godly Light Formation. In other words, he was merely imitating all these techniques. and yet Zhou Weiqing’s imitation techniques were no less weaker than the real ones he possessed.

At this moment, a dazzling golden light erupted from Shangguan Tianyue’s body, more specifically, from his chest. As the golden light dispersed, it covered his entire body with a saint-like aura. Within seconds, he eliminated the numbness of his body as well as the Curse of Doom’s effects. A glimpse of light flashed across his eyes. Without warning, a golden ray was shot out from his mouth, transforming into a golden blade before it collided with the Silver Emperor head-on.

In a thunderous crash, the Silver Emperor was thrown backward instantly. Shangguan Tianyue’s shoulder was also wavering slightly. After all, this technique of his was cast in a dire situation with all his might. It was a pity to him that he was not able to destroy the Silver Emperor in just one blow.

On the other side of the arena, Zhou Weiqing maintained the pace of his onslaught of attacks. After the Silver Emperor was sent flying, two different lights emerged from his hands and the back of his body.

The light that emerged from his back was burgundy in color while the one that was released from his hands were dark purple in color. When the two lights were being released, it stunned his movements but just as Shangguan Tianyue blasted the Silver Emperor backward, he had completed casting his technique.

Six wings flapped vigorously as the Hell’s Angel rose up to the sky. That was the consolidated matter that was formed by the dark purple ray. It took a step forward and floated five meters in front of Zhou Weiqing. Countless dark purple light orbs smashed toward Shangguan Tianyue relentlessly. On the other hand, the Silver Emperor flew towards him from the side.

At the same time, a strange seductive creature that had a human torso with the lower body of a snake also appeared from behind Zhou Weiqing. A flash of burgundy rays shot out from its eyes, aiming directly toward Shangguan Tianyue.

In just a short amount of time, Zhou Weiqing had completed his resurrection of the Silver Emperor, Hell’s Angel and Demonic Dragon Lady. Three strong powerhouses, launching their attacks at Shangguan Tianyue at the same time.

After completing the three resurrections, Zhou Weiqing finally slowed down his attacks. Resurrecting the Silver Emperor and the Hell’s Angel was not a big deal for him because after all, these two were only at the Heavenly King Tier. With his cultivation base, he could easily revive them like he was taking a stroll in the park. However, the Demonic Dragon Lady was a Heavenly Beast who was at the pinnacle of the Heavenly Emperor-tier. Resurrecting it put a slight toll on Zhou Weiqing’s body. The Starcrux Saint Nucleus Core had somehow dimmed a little.

However, Zhou Weiqing’s strength was now even more apparent to the others. Although the Starcrux Nucleus Core had somewhat dimmed, the golden color radiating from his body was obviously enhanced. The Atmospheric Energy with all kinds of attributes in the air was now rushing towards him at a speed that defied all comparisons. Even Shangguan Tianyue’s cultivation base of a Heavenly Emperor-tier did not have such influence over Atmospheric Energy like he did.

The moment he saw the emergence of the Hell’s Angel and the Demonic Dragon Lady after he had managed to strike off the Silver Emperor in one blow, Shangguan Tianyue had a momentary lapse in the impression he had toward his opponent. For a moment, he felt like the person that he was fighting against right now was the one of the Six Ultimate Heavenly Emperors himself.

Though originally, this match was conducted with the aim of having Zhou Weiqing lasting 30 minutes in his hand from mercy but in truth, he was completely beaten in a passive position ever since the match began. He did not deliberately lose to Zhou Weiqing at all. It was just that Zhou Weiqing’s speed of casting his techniques was far too fast for him. On top of that, he had used different attributes in his techniques and each of them was cast in an extremely controlled manner. Zhou Weiqing had completely thrown Shangguan Tianyue off his guard.

As an elder, he originally had the intention to show his junior a little color but now the situation seemed to have completely reversed. This kid was so insanely powerful to the point that it had far exceeded his previous judgment.

Had it been a normal Heavenly King-tier master who went against a Heavenly Emperor-tier master, the former would most likely be shaken to his core before the match even began. However, it was not the same for Zhou Weiqing at all. When he first came back from the Mysterious Heavenly Mainland, he had already battled it out with a Heavenly God-tier master, let alone a Heavenly Emperor-tier master. He did not have any fear at all in his heart.

At the same time, Zhou Weiqing was actually feeling a little dissatisfied as he thought to himself, “The Heaven’s Expanse Palace is trying to use this method to stop me from marrying Xue’er right? Alright, fine! I’ll just use my strength to prove them wrong and shut their mouths!”

A faint hazy golden halo radiated from Shangguan Tianyue’s body, blocking the attack from the Hell’s Angel. Concurrently, he clasped both of his palms together. When he finally removed them apart, a golden sword had already appeared on his right palm.

This sword was three feet and six inches long with a width of three fingers. A gigantic dragon’s silhouette also appeared behind Shangguan Tianyue. The dragon circled behind him and a golden ray shot out from its mouth, countering the Dragon Silencing Seal Laser that was shot out from the Demonic Dragon Lady’s eyes.

The Heavenly Jewels that Shangguan Tianyue’s possessed were also of many different attributes. Among them, the attribute that was the most powerful was no other than the Light Attribute. The sword in his hand and the light dragon behind him were the most powerful techniques that he possessed, having obtained them from the Heavenly God-tier Heavenly Beast — the Lustersaint Dragon. The Lustersaint Dragon was the palace guardian of the Heaven’s Expanse Palace, its position was equal to the Mysterious Heavenly Palace’s Blackfiend Dragon.

With the assistance of these powerful techniques, he was able to stand firm and barely had to resist any of Zhou Weiqing’s attacks.

After all, a true Heavenly God-tier technique was not something that could be matched by the Demonic Dragon Lady, the pseudo God-tier technique. Not only that, be it the partial Evil Attribute of the Demonic Dragon lady or the Darkness Attribute of the Hell’s Angels, both of them had to have a certain degree of restraint when they came face to face with the Light Attribute. Immediately, Shangguan Tianyue’s aura increased greatly as an almighty force spread out from his body, forming layers of solid golden light that were fluctuating towards the two resurrected Heavenly Beasts.

Still, Shangguan Tianyue did not choose to attack at the first opportunity. After all, he also needed to catch his breath after taking on the onslaught of attacks from Zhou Weiqing earlier. Especially at the speed of how Zhou Weiqing was madly consuming Atmospheric Energy from the air earlier, he would lose his chance to replenish his energy if he did not do so now.

The Silver Emperor flew by his side while the Demonic Dragon Lady and the Hell’s Angel were blocking his vision in front of Zhou Weiqing. What exactly was he doing now?

With his palms slightly curved as they arched before his chest, a circular space was formed in between his palms. The golden light on his body was slowly getting stronger now. Strips of golden light ribbons began to appear and spread out from Zhou Weiqing before it swirled around his body.

Although Shangguan Tianyue’s almighty force was cast under the assist of his Heavenly God-tier technique, it did not seem to have any effects on Zhou Weiqing at all. When these golden light ribbons materialized from the air, the air of the entire arena seemed to shake violently.

Taken aback, Shangguan Tianyang immediately released his own Heavenly Energy to maintain this realm. Still, he could clearly feel the bloodcurdling suction energy that had just erupted from Zhou Weiqing’s body. Even his own Heavenly Energy was being sucked by him now.

At the same time, Shangguan Tianyue was even more astonished than the rest. This was because when the realm was shaken just now, he realized that he could no longer absorb Atmospheric Energy from this realm. The Atmospheric Energy here seemed to have found their master and all of it was rushing madly toward Zhou Weiqing now.

A Heavenly Emperor-tier master who was robbed of Atmospheric Energy. This was something that had completely surpassed Shangguan Tianyue’s knowledge.

He did not dare to make an attempt at replenishing his energy any further. In reality, without Atmospheric Energy, there was nothing that he could use to replenish his energy any longer. No matter how Zhou Weiqing managed to do all these, a prompt and short battle was the most advantageous route for Shangguan Tianyue now.

Another golden light flashed across. Resisting the Demonic Dragon Lady and the Hell’s Angel’s attacks, Shangguan Tianyue lunged forward head-on. The powerful force from the Lustersaint Dragon’s effects allowed him to completely overwhelm the two resurrected techniques before him.

A sky-shattering blade of light suddenly flew past them. The Hell’s Angel was the first to receive the blow. In an instant, it vanished into nothingness in the golden light. Darkness and light were completely antagonistic to each other. The difference in their level left it with no ability to resist at all.

However, just as the Hell’s Angel perished by the blade, a gush of monstrous Evil Attribute exploded from behind it.

In the beginning, Shangguan Tianyue had already gained the upper hand with the help of the Lustersaint Dragon in terms of power. He forced the Hell’s Angel and the Demonic Dragon Lady to be unable to release their full powers. However, right this moment, all that he could feel was that his breathing had suddenly become stagnant. A devilish Evil aura that shook his soul immensely to the core smashed down on him from the sky like a direct blow on the head.

W-What was this?

The color drained from Shangguan Tianyue’s face. The Demonic Dragon Lady’s aura? I-Impossible! This was impossible! Even the true Demonic Dragon Lady could never take him on as his opponent, let alone exude these horrendous energy ripples.

If it was not the Demonic Dragon Lady, what it was then?

Immediately, a grey phantom began to enlarge gradually behind the Demonic Dragon Lady. The moment the grey figure materialized, the area around the entire arena began to tremble as if it was in great fear.

Zhou Weiqing was still hovering in the air. One could clearly see that the strips of light ribbons spiraling out from his body were constantly absorbing the Atmospheric Energy without stopping. Even the other energies in this realm were sucked by it while the Evil Energy continued to be released from behind him. It was all due to the appearance of this figure that the light radiating from Zhou Weiqing’s body that was originally a pale golden color had now completely changed to a grey color. A grey that was decorated with stars.

This did not happen only to Zhou Weiqing. Even the Demonic Dragon lady in front of him had now been dyed with the same grey color. Her body was trembling ever so lightly and a look of intense excitement could be seen on her face. The force radiating out of her body seemed to have grown by many folds. She no longer seemed to fear the Lustersaint Sword on Shangguan Tianyue’s hand nor the Lustersaint Dragon’s aura that was being emitted from his body.

“You better watch out, Father-in-law,” Zhou Weiqing’s voice suddenly reverberated in the air calmly. Then, another burgundy-colored laser was shot out from the Demonic Dragon Lady’s eyes. This time, the dazzling light that was blasted out from the Lustersaint Dragon’s mouth could not even stop the burgundy light. The light was heading directly onto Shangguan Tianyue now.

chapters.title: Chapter 743
chapters.body:
Chapter 743

The burgundy light disappeared after a brief flash. Next, a purplish symbol appeared on Shangguan Tianyue’s forehead as the effect of Lustersaint Dragon’s possession abruptly.

It was only a simple strike, but the effects were like the heavens and earth had clashed. Why? Tang Xian, Shangguan Bing’er, and Zhan Lingtian were stunned in confusion, unable to comprehend how Zhou Weiqing’s Demonic Dragon Lady could shatter a Heavenly God tier defensive ability.

Shangguan Tianyang did manage to gather what had happened. After the strike, the Demonic Dragon Lady’s body had become illusory and disappeared into thin air. Undoubtedly, with the Dragon Silencing Seal, it had used its full strength. However, this was not the key element. It was the intense Evil Attribute that Zhou Weiqing emitted during the attack. The presence of the Evil Attribute not only deterred Shangguan Tianyue, it also amplified the Demonic Dragon Lady’s power.

Using an ability to amplify another ability’s power? Not to mention it was an ability that could almost pass for a Heavenly God tier ability, how much of the Evil Attribute does one need to be able to do that?

As everyone was in shock, Zhou Weiqing flapped his wings in the air and shot toward Shangguan Tianyue. As that was happening, one by one, pieces of dark golden-colored armors appeared on his body. Having delayed until now, Zhou Weiqing finally used his Consolidated Equipment.

“This cunning rascal,” was what everyone thought.

He had not been using his Consolidated Equipment, that was because he was afraid Shangguan Tianyue would use his without hesitation if he did so too early. Now that Shangguan Tianyue’s Jewel Stored Skills and Consolidated Equipment were sealed by the Dragon Silencing Seal, he would not second-guess the decision to use it, amplifying his power to the maximum.

Not only that, the large phantom behind Zhou Weiqing’s back also zoomed alongside him, catching up mid-air and was absorbed into Zhou Weiqing’s body by becoming a grey-colored light. At that moment, Zhou Weiqing and his Ringless Ground Purging Set armor turned into a translucent grey figure.

The dual hammers were raised and slammed toward Shangguan Tianyue’s head. At the same time, one after another, flashes of lights appeared on his torso.

Absolute Delay, Fetters of Wind, Curse of Doom, and Spatial Collapse were all skills that specialized in control and powerful attacks. It could be said that at that moment, Zhou Weiqing was like six or seven Heavenly King tier powerhouses using their abilities simultaneously. His attack speed was so high, it was impressive to watch, to say the least. Not even Shangguan Tianyang could claim he had the skill to do that.

For a split second, Shangguan Tianyue’s torso was glowing with all sorts of different colors. Limitations and amplifications of different qualities all worked together, preventing him to even evade regardless of his Heavenly Emperor tier cultivation base. He could only manage to lift his arms and do his best to deflect Zhou Weiqing’s attack with all his Heavenly Energy.

Zhou Weiqing’s eyes had become a fog of grey, and the arena felt as if the temperature inside had been lowered by dozens of degrees due to the Evil Energy.

Boom!

The Dual God Strength Hammers struck Shangguan Tianyue directly, without flourishes of any kind. What was surprising, was that even with Shangguan Tianyue’s endurance and the abundance of his Heavenly Energy, he was still thrown backward with this strike.

Zhou Weiqing’s right foot stomped on the ground, chasing after Shangguan Tianyue. At the same time, his right leg flung around in the sky in a dreamlike motion, creating hundreds of crystalline energy balls all around Shangguan Tianyue, which then all slammed against him, exploding as they came in contact with Shangguan Tianyue.

That was not some standard lightning pearls! On every pearl, there were blue-, black-, and grey-colored shines on them, they were Dark Demon God Lightning he had not used for a while. At that time, he relied on Dark Demon God Lightning to defeat Shen Little Demon with his cultivation base of three jewels. Now, there were hundreds of balls of light. Under his Heavenly King tier cultivation base, the power of these Dark Demon God Lightning could be easily imagined.

In mid-air, Shangguan Tianyue grunted, much of his clothes were tattered. Zhou Weiqing appeared with his Dual God Strength Hammers in front of Shangguan Tianyue and slammed the hammer into his chest.

Boom!

Shangguan Tianyue was thrown against the ground. The arena was a different subspace, but even so, Shangguan Tianyue was still smashed into the ground as he spat blood.

“Tianyue!” Tang Xian cried out in anguish, ignoring the rules and charged toward Shangguan Tianyue. In mid-air, she couldn’t resist the urge to kick Zhou Weiqing who had just finished his attack.

Zhou Weiqing did not evade, he even parted his dual hammer, letting his mother-in-law kick him in the chest. Having such a strong endurance, Tang Xian’s kick could not even scratch him, so there was no harm letting her express her dissatisfaction.

Before she could do anything else to Zhou Weiqing, Tang Xian had reached Shangguan Tianyue. At this point, her face was pale as paper, her tears trailing down her face along with her grief.

Shangguan Bing’er stood there, stunned. Her hands covering her mouth, unable to make a sound.

All this happened in such a short time. From Zhou Weiqing’s warning to Shangguan Tianyue lying on the ground in heavy injury, it all happened within the span of several breaths.

Tang Xian caressed Shangguan Tianyue’s slightly bashed-in chest and turned around at Zhou Weiqing fiercely, “You little sh*t! How could you hit your father-in-law so hard, you…”

Zhou Weiqing looked at her innocently, “You taught me that, didn’t you? When I first met you, you taught me to learn as much control skills as possible. Even just now, you asked me to beat him up, I was worried if I didn’t do it enough, you might still forbid Xue’er, Fei’er, and Bing’er from marrying me. I’m not at fault here!”

Tang Xian was immediately speechless. As Shangguan Tianyue was injured, she could not spend any more of her attention on Zhou Weiqing. Turning around, she carefully lifted Shangguan Tianyue from the depression.

Feeling Tang Xian’s gentleness and the tenderness in her actions, Shangguan Tianyue’s pale face smiled with difficulty, “Xian’er, I’m fine. I wasn’t strong enough to win against this kid. Weiqing was able to attain this level of cultivation at his young age, we should not be worrying about our daughters marrying him anymore. Don’t blame him, he’s right. You asked him to beat me, did you not? So can you forgive me now? For so many years, I had wanted to say sorry to you, to repent in front of you, but I didn’t have a chance.”

“Stop talking, does it hurt?” Tang Xian’s gaze was complicated, but if anything was absolute, it would be the concern in her eyes.

Shangguan Tianyue shook his head, grabbing Tang Xian’s hands, “Whether it hurts or not doesn’t matter. Xian’er, did you know something? Those days when you were gone, every single day had hurt more than this. It was only after you came back that I felt better. However, even then, you were still unwilling to meet with me, those days were so torturous. If you decided not to forgive me, then there’s no need for me to tend to my injuries, I’d rather die. I could no longer bear the torment of missing you. I really want my gentle, lovable Xian’er back!”

At this point, Shangguan Tianyue’s tears had crawled all over his face. For his age, he cried like a baby. Between the sniffles, he coughed out blood.

“I forgive you, I forgive you, I won’t throw a temper at you anymore! Tianyue, don’t scare me like that!” Tang Xian held Shangguan Tianyue in her arms, her suppressed emotions finally bursting out.

Shangguan Bing’er finally reacted to the scene and wanted to rush over to check on her father, but was stopped by Zhou Weiqing.

“Unhand me,” Shangguan Bing’er said angrily.

Zhou Weiqing tugged at her even more, he even hushed her with a gesture and gave her a look.

Shangguan Bing’er was a little startled. Even though her father was hurt, and that filled her with worry, but her mind cleared up as soon as she saw Zhou Weiqing’s look. That’s right! No matter how rash Little Fatty could be, for her sake, he would never hurt her father! Was there something wrong with this scenario?

As she was thinking, Zhou Weiqing had turned to Shangguan Tianyang, glanced at the incense that was still a little short of half-gone, and smiled, “Uncle, I don’t think we need to continue this fight, I should have won by now.”

Unexpectedly, Shangguan Tianyang smiled and nodded, he said, “A grown girl cannot be kept at home, I will keep my promise. Let us proceed with her betrothal to you today.”

Zhan Lingtian who stood beside Shangguan Tianyang could not say anything to object to the betrothal. Looking at Zhou Weiqing, Zhan Lingtian’s eyes were filled with disbelief. Just a while ago, he could still feel his superiority over Zhou Weiqing, but now? Zhou Weiqing had risen beyond his level.

Disregarding the fact that he was already a Heavenly King tier, he defeated Shangguan Tianyue who was a Heavenly Emperor tier. There were some elements of “cheating” in that Shangguan Tianyue wasn’t able to use his legendary armor set, sure, but Zhou Weiqing’s strength was undeniably witnessed. What else could he say? Was he to say that he was better suited for Shangguan Xue’er?

Zhan Lingtian was a little self-important, but he was an upstanding person and truly a manly man. He would never be able to express emotional words like that, so he sighed, lowering his head. He knew he had already lost, and would forever lose to the guy in front of him.

Having heard Shangguan Tianyang’s words, Zhou Weiqing bowed to him respectfully, “Thank you, uncle, for agreeing to my request.”

Shangguan Tianyang glanced at the Shangguan Tianyue couple, waved his sleeve, and said, “Let us talk in another place.”

Light flickered. With Shangguan Tianyang’s help, everyone left the arena quietly. This did not include the couple, Shangguan Tianyue and Tang Xian, naturally.

Everyone returned to the meeting hall except for Zhan Lingtian, he had left without a word. There was only Shangguan Tianyang, Zhou Weiqing, and Shangguan Bing’er in the hall.

chapters.title: Chapter 744
chapters.body:
Chapter 744

“You planned this out, didn’t you? I can’t believe Tianyue would actually make that choice,” Shangguan Tianyang muttered while sighing softly.

Zhou Weiqing chuckled, “I knew I couldn’t hide it from Uncle Tianyang.”

Shangguan Tianyang shook his head and said, “It has nothing to do with hiding it anymore. Even though you have planned this out, I could see, in the battle just now, Tianyue did lose. Even if he had used his legendary armor set as soon as the battle started, he couldn’t have beaten you within the span of lighting one incense. Weiqing, you’re much stronger than how I imagined you to be. From here on out, you will surely gain a position of power on this mainland.”

Shangguan Bing’er stood on the side, watching them with confusion. She whispered to Zhou Weiqing, “How am I not understanding what you’re talking about?”

Zhou Weiqing chuckled and said, “I will explain it to you when we get back. Uncle, since you can tell our battle was genuine, don’t eat your words!”

Shangguan Tianyang smiled wryly, “An effective threat. Rather than let you kidnap three of my dear nieces, I will agree to your proposals. However, remember what you said before. No matter who the first child will be born to, he must become the heir to the Heaven’s Expanse Palace. Looks like I am going to be busy for the next few decades.”

Zhou Weiqing laughed, “No problem, uncle. You’re a very capable man.”

Shangguan Tianyang said in a more serious tone, “So that’s that, I will arrange the necessary. However, you must handle your own things as soon as possible. Within the past year when you’re gone, the mainland had changed quite a bit.”

Zhou Weiqing’s face changed, “Our Heavenly Bow Empire…”

Shangguan Tianyang waved his hand, saying, “Don’t worry. The Heavenly Bow Empire is still doing fine. Everything is normal, and it was developing well. Xue’er and Fei’er aren’t here because they went to help out with the Heavenly Bow Empire for their upcoming battles. As of now, most of the Heavenly Bow Empire’s land had been recovered. Its army was still confronting with the armies of the Kalise Empire and Bai Da Empire. They haven’t been able to launch the attack, they could be waiting for your return before proceeding.”

As Shangguan Tianyang said that, Zhou Weiqing sighed in relief, “So when you said the mainland had changed quite a bit, what do you mean? Could it be that the Wan Shou Empire is going to make a move?”

Shangguan Tianyang sighed and explained, “If it’s the Wan Shou Empire, I wouldn’t be worried. Even though they are powerful, we are fighting them with the help of the Fei Li Empire and Bao Po Empire, so it was not easy to invade our land. The real problem lies within the mainland itself!”

“Dandun Empire made another move?” Zhou Weiqing asked in surprise.

Shangguan Tianyang nodded, “Not just a move, a large move. The Geritimo Empire had been completely wiped out.”

“What?” Zhou Weiqing was shocked to hear the news. Even though parts of the Geritimo Empire had already been invaded by the Dandun Empire before he left, through mediation from the Zhongtian Empire, the Dandun Empire had not made any move since. However, the apparent destruction of the Geritimo Empire had proved that the Dandun Empire no longer care about the Zhongtian Empire’s opinion, it could even be said that it had made an enemy out of the Zhongtian Empire.

After all, the Geritimo Empire was one of the larger empires on the Boundless Mainland, its imperial power would not be weaker than the Fei Li Empire. Being destroyed by the Dandun Empire in such a short time, it could be said that the Dandun Empire was strong enough to threaten the Zhongtian Empire.

“Was the Bai Da Empire involved in this?” Zhou Weiqing asked the question he was most worried about.

“Yes, not only that, the whole thing had already been clarified,” Shangguan Tianyang looked worried. “The moment the Geritimo Empire was lost, the Bai Da Empire announced that they would be changing their name to the Bai Da Kingdom and that they would become the Dandun Empire’s vassal state. The two empires had officially formed an alliance. Including the Geritimo Empire’s lands, they had already surpassed the Zhongtian Empire in total area. As of now, they are invading the smaller countries between the Dandun Empire and Zhongtian Empire without mercy, their area had been getting larger and larger.”

Zhou Weiqing listened in on the report with his jaw dropped. He did not think such a huge change would happen within a year. The Dandun Empire could be said to be on the rise. With its overpowering strength, it forcibly united the whole Southern areas of the mainland.

“Is the Zhongtian Empire not doing anything to counteract this?” Zhou Weiqing said in disbelief.

Shangguan Tianyang smiled wryly, “Most of our military forces are on the northern border. Even if we could move them, we could barely manage to protect ourselves, so we couldn’t help the smaller countries. My worries right now is that after the Dandun Empire had finished uniting the South, they would attack us with the help of the Wan Shou Empire. If that is the case, I’m afraid that even the Zhongtian Empire would be in trouble.”

What he did not reveal was that if it weren’t for the tension on the mainland, he might not have agreed to Zhou Weiqing and Shangguan Xue’er’s marriage so soon, he might not even have agreed to it at all. However, in this critical time, the Zhongtian Empire needed the Heavenly Bow Empire which was getting stronger to keep the Dandun Empire in check. If they had lost this ally, the Zhongtian Empire would really be surrounded by enemies.

Zhou Weiqing’s brows furrowed and he said, “It looks like I really need to get back to the Heavenly Bow Empire as soon as I can.”

Shangguan Tianyang responded, “Weiqing, on the matter of manpower, we the Zhongtian Empire are also having difficulties so we can’t help you much. However, don’t fret on the supplies, I will ask Tianxing to send them over without stopping. I do wish you will be ready for battles soon. The reason for my request is because it would help in saving your family. At the same time, we need you to be prepared to act in the Southwestern areas. If there are any conditions you would like to request for, please do.”

Zhou Weiqing had a long thought before shaking his head and said, “I’ve got no conditions I would like fulfilled, but I would like Xue’er, Fei’er, and Bing’er to stay with me. I would only be at ease if they could be by my side. Also, if I had utilized my power as a Heavenly King tier master, I’ll need your help in dealing with the other mainland Heavenly Jewel Masters.”

Shangguan Tianyang nodded and said, “No problem, I will deal with them, naturally. After all, with such destructive energy appearing in Blood Red Hell, it might possibly be related to the Nether Realm, so don’t you worry about what the public would think. However, be wary, because the Blood Red Hell might also send strong people after you. I wouldn’t be able to help in that regard as well, as more than half of the Heaven’s Expanse Palace’s powerhouses had been sent to the southern border to fight against the Dandun Empire, that is our main battlefield, we can’t move from there.”

Zhou Weiqing smiled slightly, saying, “As long as I can use my full strength, I am confident.”

Shangguan Tianyang said, “At this point, I can’t afford not to let you fight with your full strength.”

Zhou Weiqing said, “If that’s the case, we’ll take our leave from the island. The sooner we return, the better for us who are handling these things. Don’t worry, we will definitely launch an attack against the Kalise and Bai Da Allied Forces.”

Shangguan Tianyang smiled, “It doesn’t have to be so soon, you’ve only got here, might as well let Bing’er and Tianyue have a few more days of reunion before leaving.”

Zhou Weiqing chuckled, “I’m afraid my father-in-law is not in the shape to care for his daughters. It’s better that I leave soon, or else my mother-in-law would kick my door down if it means she could give me a beating. I was the villain after all!”

Having heard his words, Shangguan Tianyang chortled as well, “You aren’t completely villainous, aren’t you? Witnessing the couple reconcile, I feel like I’ve set down a burden.”

Zhou Weiqing said with a smile, “If that’s the case, we’ll take our leave.” It can be said that he was eager to go home. With his country under siege, the Heavenly Bow Imperial Army was going to recover their lands, his feeling was a complicated one. However, no matter what, it was of utmost importance for him to save his family.

Zhou Weiqing held Shangguan Bing’er hands, bid farewell to Shangguan Tianyang, and left the Heaven’s Expanse Palace. Zhou Weiqing did not act courteous, he brought Shangguan Bing’er and leaped directly into the sky, flying toward his home country on the southwest.

“Little Fatty, did you plan that out with my dad?” Shangguan Bing’er was not stupid, after listening to Zhou Weiqing and Shangguan Tianyang’s discussion, she could guess what happened.

Zhou Weiqing giggled and said, “I think it counts? It’s just that the plan got a little derailed by some changes. But don’t you worry, I’m your husband, how would I really hurt your father? Yes, he was hurt, but it was more because of himself.”

When Zhou Weiqing met with Shangguan Tianyue, they had silently exchanged a few words secretly, it was just that no one else had noticed.

This stratagem of self-injury was the result of the father-son-in-law duo.

Of course, Shangguan Tianyue knew about Shangguan Tianyang’s intention, but more than that, he cared about Zhou Weiqing. First and foremost, he was also a father. Xue’er’s inheritance of the Heaven’s Expanse Palace and her becoming of the future Heaven’s Expanse Palace Master placed her as one of the most important people in the world. However, Shangguan Tianyue understood what the most important thing for a woman is.

That was why, even if his brother might get upset at him, Shangguan Tianyue still informed Zhou Weiqing of Shangguan Tianyang’s intention.

Whatever that happened after had already been part of Zhou Weiqing’s plan. However, Shangguan Tianyue did not expect Zhou Weiqing had already cultivated enough power to duel with him.

In the beginning, when they had just started, Shangguan Tianyue had wanted to let Zhou Weiqing have the upper hand. However, as Zhou Weiqing showed his might, Shangguan Tianyue had to defend with his full strength. Having lost the upper hand, and not having a chance to use his Consolidated Equipment, he had lost to Zhou Weiqing.

chapters.title: Chapter 745
chapters.body:
Chapter 745

Regarding the final clash between Zhou Weiqing and Shangguan Tianyue, the first one had been real, the second one was not. Simply put, Zhou Weiqing had used the ‘crying-face’ hammer for the first hit, and the ‘smiling-face’ hammer for the second one. Shangguan Tianyue’s dire injury had been mostly self-inflicted.

Shangguan Tianyue had told Zhou Weiqing beforehand that he wanted to decide how heavy his injury would be.

The reason Zhou Weiqing used his full strength when fighting Shangguan Tianyue was that he was worried Shangguan Tianyang might see through their foil, but also because he wanted to test his own strength. Since there was a willing Heavenly Emperor Tier powerhouse who had no harmful thoughts toward him, it was a good time to do so.

The truth is, the older the wiser. Even if they had been fighting for real, Shangguan Tianyang still saw through it, because of Shangguan Tianyue’s performance at the end. He did not stop it, however.

When he witnessed Shangguan Tianyue’s confession to Tang Xian, Zhou Weiqing nearly laughed out loud. ‘Who was the one who said I’m good at acting? Compared to my father-in-law, I have got a ways to go!’

Shangguan Bing’er listened to his explanation with her jaw dropped, her expression was a mix of different emotions.

Zhou Weiqing cackled, “They won’t have time to worry about you now, so it’s better that we leave as soon as possible. Otherwise, if your mother came bearing vengeance, I won’t be able to do anything about it! For the sake of your father’s happiness, I had become a total jerk this time. I still don’t know how to explain to your mother in the future.”

Shangguan Bing’er’s eyes widened, “You’re such a swindler, you teamed up with my father to lie to my mother. You two are bullies!”

Zhou Weiqing sighed and said righteously, “How does this count as swindling? It was a white lie. Do you want to see both of them not talk to each other forever? Can’t you see how much agony your father was in? This way, once that ice wall of theirs melted, it would help their relationship so much, maybe you would even get another younger sibling even.”

Shangguan Bing’er blushed, her face turning as red as a tomato. “Don’t speculate about my parents, you’re such a rascal,” she said, but she was relieved.

A lady’s worst fear is to see her man being in a conflict with her family. Not to mention, it was Zhou Weiqing who had hurt Shangguan Tianyue. When it happened, Shangguan Bing’er really did not know what to do. Now that she found out it was all a show, she was finally at ease.

No longer worrying about her parents, even though Shangguan Bing’er did not say this, she was surprised at how strong her Little Fatty had become.

The two traveled rapidly, Zhou Weiqing barely rested before they had arrived, even their meal was eaten in mid-air.

Shangguan Bing’er did not ask for a stop at all, Zhou Weiqing was smiling the whole way through, but she could tell that he was worried from the look in his eyes. At this moment, it is imperative for her to fully support her man.

After only three days, they had arrived at the Heavenly Bow Empire territory. Zhou Weiqing only needed to ask around for a little to find out where the army had gone.

Just as Shangguan Tianyang said, the Heavenly Bow Imperial Army was camping near the Stars Forest outside of the Heavenly Bow City. They had formed a half-moon formation toward the city, ready to launch an all-out attack. Other military details were not known by the people he asked.

After getting this news, Zhou Weiqing led Shangguan Bing’er straight toward the frontline.

Traveling through flight was fast, and the Heavenly Bow Empire was not that large, so it was only an extra day of journeying before Zhou Weiqing could see the Heavenly Bow Imperial Army’s camp from afar.

With clouds shielding him, Zhou Weiqing was not worried anyone else might see him. It was easier to see the army camp from above anyhow.

After a few moments of studying, Zhou Weiqing was getting really impressed. Ming Yu was deserving of the title of Fei Li God General, Zhou Weiqing himself would not be able to arrange for formations like this.

From the sky, there were at least ten thousand people camped outside of the Stars Forest, and there were some more camping inside the forest, numbers unknown.

The whole camp was set up to help each other. Watchtowers were everywhere, teams of patrolling cavalry covered the whole ground. If there were any movements, even if the whole army was mobilized, there would not be any disorganization if they followed the formation. It mattered not if it were the patrols or the soldiers practicing drills, everything showed a strict order.

It was barely two years since Ming Yu’s enlistment into the Zhongtian Empire. In such a short time, he had already developed the Heavenly Bow Imperial Army into the current state, projecting their powerful combat abilities. If it were Zhou Weiqing, he could not even muster the confidence to say he could do the same thing.

The current Heavenly Bow Imperial Army not only had the strength to recover their home country, they might even be able to fight back.

“Little Fatty, let’s descend,” Shangguan Bing’er said softly.

Zhou Weiqing nodded, hugging her waist. Both of them descended from the sky but did not go directly to the camp to avoid unwanted misunderstanding. They landed directly in front of the encampment and walked directly toward it.

“Who goes there?” Before the two even walked a hundred meters, four soldiers leaped out from the side.

Zhou Weiqing had naturally noticed them before, but these four people had not been in their sights before.

Now that they were out of their hiding spots, it could be seen that they had dug four holes in the ground. There were plenty of covers on top, and there were straws and weed woven onto their shields, so it was hard to notice where exactly they were.

These people were the hidden guards.

Noticing the four shiny blades, Zhou Weiqing laughed and said, “Stand down, we’re on the same side.”

“On the same side?” The leader of the four looked at Zhou Weiqing, perplexed, then looked over at Shangguan Bing’er before broke out into a shudder. Without hesitation, he genuflected and said to Shangguan Bing’er in utmost respect, “I’m the Sun Pao, Scout of Fourth Regiment’s Twenty-seventh Company, reporting for duty, Chief Instructor.”

Everyone else followed suit, greeting Shangguan Bing’er.

Zhou Weiqing rubbed his nose and said wryly, “Looks like my Commander status is not as well-known as you, Chief Instructor.”

Shangguan Bing’er laughed out loud, saying, “Who asked you to be so lazy and not appear in public that often? This also proved how hard my sisters are working for you.”

Zhou Weiqing laughed heartily and said, “Alright, everybody up. To avoid misunderstanding, two of you should lead us into the main tent to meet Ming Yu.”

Zhou Weiqing did not soften his voice on purpose, so the scouts all heard him. ‘Commander? What does he mean by that? All of them were confused, however, they had seen Shangguan Bing’er beside Zhou Weiqing from afar. The Chief Instructor’s fame could only be rivaled with Commander Ming Yu. Just who is this young man?’

Seeing the four of them hesitate, Zhou Weiqing said, “Forget it, I’ll do it myself.” He was impatient about the current situation, so he no longer wanted to wait.

As he spoke, Zhou Weiqing raised his right hand, stretching his fingers out in the air. Instantly, the air started to rumble as a dragon formed by lightning soared into the sky, causing the four scouts to stare with their eyes wide. A loud crash mixed with the strong lightning energy wave spread out at the same time.

The lightning dragon circled in the air for a little while, and finally emitted a chain of thunder crashes and lightning flashes and dissipated.

Before the flashes of lightning were even gone, a response had already arisen from the Heavenly Bow Imperial Army camp as about a hundred silhouettes leaped into the air, speeding over to where they were.

They were still far away, but Zhou Weiqing could tell that these people were his Peerless Air Force.

After a year, when he saw the Peerless Air Force he had founded from scratch, his heart was filled with warmth that tells him he was finally home.

The hundred-people Air Force quickly arrived at the site, every single bow was drawn to the maximum. Surprisingly, all hundred of these Jewel Masters had cultivation base of at least five jewels, their leader was Kou Rui.

They did not arrive together. While in the air, they had already fallen into their formation, approaching in a half-circular formation. With about a hundred Jewel Masters locking on, the area was filled with tension.

Kou Rui was stationed in the middle, his cultivation base had also attained five jewels.

“Kou Rui, come down here,” even before Kou Rui could see who it was, a powerful suction came from the ground, pulling him downward forcefully.

Kou Rui was caught by surprise and fired an arrow instinctually. As soon as he fired, all hundred of the Peerless Air Force members immediately fired along without hesitation. The arrows made a ‘whoosh’ sound as they pierced through the air and scaring the four scouts standing in front of Zhou Weiqing and Shangguan Bing’er as if they had lost their souls.

With a hundred arrows from the Peerless Air Force, their Consolidated Bows’ explosive attribute could blow the place up into a crater within a hundred meter radius!

However, by the next moment, everyone was stunned.

The whooshing sound only sounded for half the distance before they had stopped. All hundred arrows froze in mid-air. What was even more astonishing was that all the arrows flew back into their own quivers without missing even one.

Kou Rui, on the other hand, was still dragged onto the ground, landing in front of Zhou Weiqing.

“We’d only just seen each other, you already wanted to gift me an explosion show? Can’t you at least look clearly before you act?” Zhou Weiqing asked with a grin.

When Kou Rui saw his comrades’ arrows were all blocked, cold sweat broke out of his skin, he thought, ‘We’re finished!’ However, when he saw the one who pulled him down, his terror turned into awe

chapters.title: Chapter 746
chapters.body:
Chapter 746

“Boss, you’re back,” Kou Rui was ecstatic and ran over to give Zhou Weiqing a bear hug. However, before even a second had passed, he remembered something. He loosened the grip and turned around, yelling into the air, “don’t attack, he’s one of our own.”

The truth is, even if the Peerless Battalion’s Air Force wanted to do anything, they could not. Every one of them was frozen in the air, unable to even move, not to mention fight back.

Zhou Weiqing waved his arm in a wide gesture, loosening their bind, and these Air Force landed one by one.

Kou Rui did not approach for another hug. He took a few steps back, genuflected, and said respectfully, “Kou Rui wishes the Admiral good health.”

Zhou Weiqing waved his hand as a gentle gust lifted Kou Rui to an upright position, “We’re all brothers, no need for such etiquette. Besides, I’m just someone with too much time on my hands.”

Right about now, most of the Air Force had already landed. Normal scouts did not know who Zhou Weiqing is, but how could the other fighters in Peerless Battalion not recognize him? A majority of them were brought over from Zhongtian Empire by Zhou Weiqing!

“It’s the boss, the boss came back,” the people surrounded him in no time. They were all from the Ruffian Battalion, and Zhou Weiqing did not usually carry himself with much authority. At the sight of him, these people had forgotten their manners, swarming in to surround Zhou Weiqing.

However, they only managed a few steps before showing signs of terror and stopped to say in earnest respect, “Praise be, chief instructor.”

Zhou Weiqing suppressed his urge to laugh and said, “What did your chief instructor do to you? Every single one of you looks so scared.”

Kou Rui giggled, “It was nothing. It’s just that we have spot checks occasionally, to ‘compare notes.’ ”

Zhou Weiqing felt a little speechless. Without a doubt, the person who wanted to ‘compare notes’ must be Shangguan Fei’er, Shangguan Xue’er would not do something like that.

“Okay, let’s all go back to the camp. Tell me, during this period while I was away, what had happened here.”

“Yes, sir.”

Kou Rui led the whole squad of the Peerless Battalion’s Air Force to cluster around Zhou Weiqing as they walked toward the camp.

It was not after a quarter of an hour that the four scouts from before reacted. The four scouts exchanged glances with each other, not knowing what to say. They, however, remembered clearly the Air Force that they respected so much calling the man ‘boss’, and Scout Leader Kou Rui called him Commander. Who is he?

“Could he be the Marshal Zhou who’s like the dragon god; we might see its head, but we’ll never see its tail?”

When Zhou Weiqing had left, he had passed on the title of Commander to Ming Yu, while taking on a sleeping role as a Military Department Chief. However, in the eyes of the Elders in the Heavenly Bow Empire, his reputation was especially unshakeable. That was why everyone still called him their Commander. Because of that, two commander titles were given throughout the Empire, Commander Ming Yu, and Commander Zhou.

On their way to the camp, Kou Rui gave him a simple verbal report on the development of the Heavenly Bow Army in the past year.

In the one year, after the Heavenly Bow Army laid low for about half a year, they started reclaiming the lands in Heavenly Bow Empire and was successful in their mission within a short time, there was barely any resistance.

Ming Yu’s timing to launch the reclamation was excellent, it was when the Dandun Empire made a move on the Geritimo Empire. Because of that, the Kalise Army and the Bai Da Empire only settled in Heavenly Bow City, they and did not execute any military actions against Heavenly Bow Empire.

At the moment, the army of Heavenly Bow Empire already had compiled 100 thousand soldiers in its First Field Army Group, and 70 thousand soldiers uncompiled in Second Field Army Group for a total of 170 thousand soldiers. They didn’t have to take into consideration the issue of being on defense, so among the whole 170 thousand soldiers, 150 thousand were mobilized and stationed where they are.

The original Peerless Regiment were all included in the First Field Army Group and were reshuffled. Within the ten regiments of the First Field Army Group, each regiment had two hundred Peerless Air Force and a hundred Peerless Heavy Cavalry added to them. The ones left behind would serve directly under Ming Yu’s command as the most elite fighting force within the whole field army group. In total, there were four thousand Peerless Air Force and three thousand Peerless Heavy Cavalry. With Ming Yu’s coordination, the reserve armies of Berserker and Gold Crow Tribes had become active duty army as well. For that reason, the Peerless Heavy Cavalry was bumped up to four thousand soldiers, and both Air Force and Heavy Cavalry armies were fully equipped. The Snow Deer Cavalry had also been absorbed into the Peerless Heavy Cavalry with all five hundred of them getting the same treatment with the other Peerless Heavy Cavalry members, with suitable armors and weapons being custom made for them.

According to Ming Yu’s plan, the attack should be launched as soon as a month ago. However, due to some unforeseen circumstances, the attack was delayed. The ‘unforeseen circumstance’ was actually from the Blood Red Hell.

The Blood Red Hell appointed a Heavenly King tier Heavenly Jewel Master with Darkness Attribute who was stationed inside the Heavenly Bow City. He would not participate in the battle, but the Kalesi Empire had already warned them, if the Heavenly Bow Empire dared to launch an attack, they would not hesitate to unleash the Fate Denying Seal by Admiral Zhou and kill off all the royalty within the Heavenly Bow Empire.

Even though doing this would be a huge sacrifice on the Darkness Attribute Heavenly Jewel Master’s side, it was still not something the Heavenly Bow Empire could endure.

After all, although a part of the Heavenly Bow Army was brought over by Zhou Weiqing from the Zhongtian Empire, most of them were formed by the Heavenly Bow Imperial Army as well as conscription from within the Heavenly Bow Empire. If the royal family of the Heavenly Bow Empire was killed, it would be a massive blow to the morale of the army. So even if Ming Yu usually makes decisive choices, he dared to not order an attack easily. Especially when it concerns the lives of Zhou Weiqing’s parent. Even if he did, it would be difficult to get the attack executed.

Therefore, both the armies were at a stalemate here.

Ming Yu understood very clearly the intention of Bai Da Empire and Dandun Empire. They wanted to stall for time until the Dandun Empire could unify the South. When they had done that and had made necessary arrangements, they would naturally have enough manpower to deal with the Heavenly Bow Empire. The Dandun Empire had not been paying much attention to the Heavenly Bow Empire, because the Heavenly Bow Empire was just a small fry, there was no need to worry about them so much.

After listening to Kou Rui’s report, Zhou Weiqing frowned. The Dandun Empire was really cunning, they had only sent one person here, and that was enough to keep more than 100 thousand soldiers in check.

“Boss, don’t you worry. The old geezer is back, so even if you’re not here, we’ll still proceed with our plan in the next few days.”

Zhou Weiqing’s heart jumped. Of course, he would know which ‘old geezer’ Kou Rui was referring to, it was his teacher, Six Ultimate Heavenly Emperor Long Shiya! He asked excitedly, “Teacher is back?”

Kou Rui nodded and smiled, “The old geezer had just arrived a few days ago, you two practically read each other’s mind.”

As soon as he knew his teacher was back, Zhou Weiqing could not wait any longer. He had not seen Long Shiya for a long time, he missed him dearly. No matter Mu En or Hua Feng, or if it was Long Shiya, every one of them was his most-respected, most important people in his life. He had already viewed them as his family.

“Good, then we’ll hasten our pace, I want to see my teacher.”

As Zhou Weiqing was talking, a deep, booming voice echoed, “You rascal, do you even remember where your home is! Doing pretty well for a slacker!”

A light of six colors zoomed in and out of their sights, and the next moment, a person stood in front of them, who else was that other than Long Shiya?

Long Shiya was still plump, his facial complexion was a healthy pink, his words were one of reprimand, but his face was smiling the whole time.

“Old geezer,” Kou Rui greeted him immediately. The Peerless warriors started to laugh, they were really close with Long Shiya. After all, before Long Shiya had left, his biggest hobby was to join the Peerless warriors and to have a drinking contest with them. Long Shiya did not project an air of importance about him, so the Peerless warriors liked hanging out with him a lot.

“Teacher,” Zhou Weiqing stepped forward excitedly and immediately kneeled without prompt, preparing to kowtow at Long Shiya. Shangguan Bing’er who was by his side also kneeled.

Long Shiya lifted his arm and caught Zhou Weiqing’s shoulder, “What are you kneeling for, did I even follow this many customs? It’s only been a year, how did you become such a kowtow worm?”

Zhou Weiqing stood up and smiled. He rubbed his nose and said, “I needed to do something.”

Long Shiya slapped him across his shoulder with a playful smirk, “You insolent child, you’re still the same kid who needs a good beating. Hey…” Long Shiya was happy to see Zhou Weiqing, but suddenly, his face changed, contorting into a despicable-looking face.

An intense green light almost immediately burst out of his body, as a strong Fetters of Wind landed upon Zhou Weiqing, at which point Long Shiya also raised his hand, grappling at Zhou Weiqing’s face.

The sudden change caught Zhou Weiqing and other people by surprise. No one would imagine Long Shiya to attack Zhou Weiqing. Right before that, they were still joking around.

Zhou Weiqing was the most surprised. If it was before, he wouldn’t have been able to evade Long Shiya’s grapple, but his cultivation base was no longer like before. As soon as the Fetters of Wind hit him, the Starcrux Saint Nucleus Core in his body reacted by unleashing a surge of pale golden light. The green Fetters of Wind melted away almost immediately and with a silver flash, Zhou Weiqing had moved about three meters away with his Blink ability.

Long Shiya did not say anything. His grapple missed, making his face even sterner. He stepped forward with his right foot, causing the whole area to emit a low grumbling sound. He did not retract his right arm, but turning into a fist and punched at Zhou Weiqing’s chest from afar.

The six-colored light formed a huge ball of light and charged at Zhou Weiqing.

Since he had already fallen into a defensive position, when he was faced with Long Shiya’s immense pressure, Zhou Weiqing could only assume a passive defense position. Both Shangguan Tianyue and Long Shiya were Heavenly Emperor tier powerhouses, but Long Shiya’s pressure was much stronger. He was praised as number one after the Heavenly God tier after all.

Left without a choice, Zhou Weiqing shielded himself by putting both his arms in front of his chest. In a split second, both his palms turned gray as a whirlpool formed in front of him. As soon as Long Shiya’s six-colored light ball touched the gray whirlpool, a third of it melted before hitting Zhou Weiqing’s palms.

This was Long Shiya’s attack. If it were another person without Consolidated Equipments and Jewel Stored Skill, even a Heavenly Emperor tier powerhouse’s attack would have been dissolved by the Zhou Weiqing’s external Devour Skill. However, Long Shiya was not like everyone else. His Heavenly Energy was a mix of six attributes. Even though it could still be dissolved, it was significantly harder to completely devour it.

With a dull boom, the golden light enveloping Zhou Weiqing evidently flickered brighter as he was pushed a dozen steps backward before he stopped.

“Teacher, what are you doing?” Zhou Weiqing finally said after having managed to regain his balance.

Long Shiya stared at the grey whirlpool between Zhou Weiqing’s palms, a little startled. He did not follow up with another attack, but his face was still burning in rage. He said, “Who are you? How dare you pose as my disciple?”

Zhou Weiqing was perplexed, and he said, “I’m your dearest disciple Little Fatty Zhou! What could I even pose as?”

Long Shiya growled, “Bullsh*t, even if Weiqing, that rascal, had advanced his cultivation base level, it would be impossible for him to reach the Heavenly King tier in a little more than a year, who are you kidding? Let me tear away this human skin mask from your face.” He felt a presence of a Heavenly King tier powerhouse, which was the reason he had come outside. He was afraid the Peerless warriors couldn’t handle it, but it was Zhou Weiqing who showed up. In his joy, he had forgotten his initial objective.

However, when he patted Zhou Weiqing’s shoulder, he felt something wrong. Zhou Weiqing’s body naturally produced a wave of countershock, the Atmospheric Energy in the air was also trying to stop him, this was something only a Heavenly King tier powerhouse could have! How old is Zhou Weiqing? No matter how he looked at it, he refused to believe the kid could rise to that stage in such a short time. Furthermore, the energy around Zhou Weiqing was something he could not see through! That was the reason for his sudden change in attitude, he wanted to catch the impostor before anything else.

However, Zhou Weiqing’s Evil Attribute and the Devour Skill confused Long Shiya even more, even though the strength of the Devour Skill was much stronger than before, the source would not change. Long Shiya had never seen anyone else other than his dearest disciple who could use the Devour Skill. That was why he stopped.

Zhou Weiqing stared at Long Shiya, unsure if he should laugh or cry, “Teacher, be sensible, will you! Everyone hopes for their disciples to be strong, why would you hope for your disciple to be weak! Everything else could be faked, but not this. I, your disciple, am unique.”

As he spoke, Zhou Weiqing made a circle with his hands in front of him, and two triangles immediately overlaid each other, forming the Six Ultimate Godly Light Formation.

Looking at the colorful lights that appeared below Zhou Weiqing’s feet, Long Shiya’s face was immediately stuck in its pale, green color. Zhou Weiqing was right, everything else could be faked, but the Six Ultimate Godly Light Formation could definitely not be imitated!

Zhou Weiqing’s Six Ultimate Godly Light Formation was an extension of Long Shiya’s Six Ultimate Heavenly Path Formation. The unique skill could only be learned when one has six attributes, and the cultivation method was only known to Long Shiya and Zhou Weiqing.

Even if someone could pretend to be Zhou Weiqing, the attributes would not lie. Zhou Weiqing’s six-attribute combination was so unique, and including the Six Ultimate Heavenly Path Formation, it would definitely be enough to prove his identity.

“You’re really Little Fatty?” Long Shiya asked in confusion.

Zhou Weiqing’s face twitched, “Teacher Fatty, how am I not your Little Fatty? My strength had increased a lot, that’s true, but you need to give me time to report!”

Long Shiya’s gaze quivered and said, “Wait a minute, tell me this then. When you fused with the dragon and tiger bloodlines, who became your sacrifice at the final moment?”

Zhou Weiqing was speechless, he peered at Shangguan Bing’er on his side and said helplessly, “It was Little Witch Wu Yuehan, you made her my responsibility, remember?”

After hearing his words, Long Shiya was like in a trance, his killing intention dissipated immediately, and he looked at Zhou Weiqing in disbelief.

“You rascal, it was you! You’re a Heavenly King now. God dammit, it was so unfair! When I became a Heavenly King, I was already over fifty years old. How old are you now!”

Zhou Weiqing smiled wryly, “How could teachers be envious of their disciple. Teacher, this is your fault.”

Long Shiya giggled loudly, his fatty cheek squeezing his eyes into near-disappearance.

Zhou Weiqing huffed and said, “I’m not going over there, what if you hit me again?”

Long Shiya scoffed, “Come here immediately, so what if I hit you? I’m your teacher, isn’t it normal for teachers to discipline their disciples?”

Without a choice, Zhou Weiqing walked over. Long Shiya gave him a quick once-over and laughed, “Good! You’re certainly a manly man, deserving to be my disciple. I’ll show Xue Ao’tian that old geezer for acting cocky in front of me. My disciple had stolen his daughter and became a Heavenly King, haha, ha ha ha ha ha!”

Looking at his teacher’s classless laughing fit, Zhou Weiqing was speechless. What is this! It was hard enough to finally see his teacher, but his teacher dealt him a head-on blow at their first encounter. Fortunately, his cultivation base was good enough to block it, if he had not blocked it, the injury sustained from the hits would have been severe.

It was not only Zhou Weiqing who was speechless, the Peerless warriors were basically clutching at their convulsing hearts, especially Kou Rui. The ruckus between Zhou Weiqing and Long Shiya was still not something outrageous, however, Long Shiya had just confirmed Zhou Weiqing to be a Heavenly King! A Heavenly King, the boss is already at the Heavenly King tier.

Among the whole of the Heavenly Bow Army, only Long Shiya and Duan Tianlang had a cultivation base of Heavenly King tier and above. However, from another perspective, they were still not part of the Heavenly Bow Army but were mere guests. The Heavenly Bow Empire’s biggest weakness was that it doesn’t have enough powerhouses, especially not higher-tiered ones. However, when Zhou Weiqing became a Heavenly King, everything had changed. The Heavenly Bow Empire finally had its own Heavenly King!

“Let’s go, let’s return to the camp, I need to show off to Old Geezer Duan, haha! The best decision I’ve made in my life was to take you as my disciple.”

Six Ultimate Heavenly Emperor had always does what he wanted, he would not hide his feelings. Happiness is happiness. To the Peerless warriors, Big Fatty was just asking for a beating. Of course, no one was reckless enough to say it.

After all the drama, everyone had finally arrived at the camp. Kou Rui had immediately taken off to report to the management of the Heavenly Bow Empire. while Long Shiya had taken Zhou Weiqing and Shangguan Bing’er toward where Duan Tianlang is.

“Hey, Weiqing, you’re back,” seeing Zhou Weiqing, Duan Tianlang was surprised. Zhou Weiqing had wanted to greet him, but he was stopped.

“It was good that you’re back. The Heavenly Bow Empire could not lose a mental support like you. It was an important battle to reclaim the Heavenly Bow Empire’s glory, so your return is timely. Everything you asked me to prepare, I have already done.”

As he was speaking, Duan Tianlang waved his hands, and three boxes appeared on the table. Undoubtedly, everything inside was God Tier Consolidated Equipment Scrolls.

“Thank you for your effort,” said Zhou Weiqing. His respect for Duan Tianlang was not less than his own teacher. Duan Tianland’s sacrifice for his Strength Legacy, as well as the help he offered to Zhou Weiqing, was completely altruistic.

Long Shiya chuckled proudly, “Old geezer Duan, your legendary armor set was not good enough.”

Duan Tianlang replied, “Not good enough? How is it not good enough? Isn’t Weiqing at nine jewels? When he left, he was at six jewels, so having three legendary armor pieces is just nice!”

Long Shiya raised his hand, wiggling a finger in front of him in overbearingly, and said, “Nine jewels? He was my finest disciple, and it had already been a year, how can he still be at nine jewels? It should be ten jewels.”

Seeing Long Shiya’s cockiness, Shangguan Bing’er could not contain it any longer and broke out into giggles. After all, not long ago, Long Shiya had attacked Zhou Weiqing because of his cultivation base, but now it had suddenly become within his expectation.

However, no matter how cocky Long Shiya was, Duan Tianlang was surprised. He stared at Zhou Weiqing with a wooden expression and said, “Weiqing, you have advanced into Heavenly King? So soon?”

Zhou Weiqing tittered, “I got lucky.”

Duan Tianlang gave Zhou Weiqing a weird look, “You are such a prodigy! Luckily I have been keeping myself busy this last year. I had wanted to keep this from you so you could be inspired to strive for Heavenly King. It looks like I can give them to you now.”

As he spoke, he raised his right arm and two additional wooden boxes appeared on the table.

At this point, Long Shiya’s grin disappeared, “Old geezer Duan, have you already finished his Ringless Ground Purging Set?” Zhou Weiqing had collected five pieces of the Ringless Ground Purging Set, having five more pieces would mean the armor set was complete!

Duan Tianlang made a sound in irritation and said, “One shall try one’s best to do what was entrusted to him by others. I’m not like some people who became a teacher but went away to slack off. As soon as Xue’er, Fei’er, and the others brought back enough materials, I had started working on them. I am glad to have been entrusted with this. Luckily, Weiqing’s set only needed one scroll per piece to complete the process, otherwise, I really can’t finish them on time.”

Looking at Duan Tianlang, Zhou Weiqing’s eyes began to water. When he had first met Duan Tianlang, he still looked young, however in a mere few years, his hair had become like salt-and-pepper. His eyes were still bright, but the deep exhaustion in his eyes broke Zhou Weiqing’s heart.

“Junior Master.” Zhou Weiqing stepped up, holding Duan Tianlang’s hand.

Duan Tianlang raised his other hand and tapped on Zhou’s shoulder. He said, “We are a family, I consider you as half a disciple and another heir of my Strength Legacy. Even though you are not progressing into the field of Consolidating Equipment Master, but I will keep my promise. Plus, to complete the Ringless Ground Purging Set was one of the biggest dreams in my life. Now that I have both Hiltless Sky Purging Set and Ringless Ground Purging Set under my belt, I have no regrets.”

Holding Duan Tianlang’s hand, Zhou Weiqing could clearly feel that though his Junior Master looked normal on the surface, he was already very weak as if he could pass away at any time.

His tears finally flowed uncontrollably down his face. Zhou Weiqing opened his arms and gave Duan Tianlang a big hug.

Long Shiya was not laughing as well. He looked at his old friend with a worried look. He knew Duan Tianlang’s physical condition the best, during the time when he left, it was to look for the herbs and medicines that could help Duan Tianlang regain his health. He didn’t think Duan Tianlang could finish the Ringless Ground Purging Set in such a short time. Now that his dreams were fulfilled, he might no longer have much will to live! The cures he brought back might be of no use at this point.

At this moment, a layer of golden light rose from within Zhou Weiqing’s body. Something strange was happening. Golden light spots floated from his body, permeating the room with a sense of peaceful calmness. They were like starlights, transforming the tent into the night sky. The balls of light hovered around, then slowly moved toward Duan Tianlang’s body. They were not fast, but with every dot of light that enters, Duan Tianlang uncontrollably shivered.

“Weiqing, don’t!” Duan Tianlang yelped in a low voice, but he could no longer stop Zhou Weiqing. In Zhou Weiqing’s arms, he could not move at all.

When comparing cultivation base, Duan Tianlang would, of course, score higher than Zhou Weiqing, he was an old-time Heavenly King tier powerhouse after all. However, Zhou Weiqing was not any Heavenly King tier powerhouse, he had his Saint Energy! If Duan Tianlang could still escape from his grip, Zhou Weiqing could quit being a Heavenly King tier powerhouse right there and then.

A rich wave of Saint Energy was rolling around in the air as bits of starlights kept seeping into his body, Duan Tianlang noticed suddenly that his heart and pulse, weak from the drain on his life force, slowly becoming more sturdy, and every part of his body was rejuvenated by the bits of starlights, These starlight Saint Energy were not invasive to him, even the Heavenly Energy in his body could accept this foreign source of energy with no objection.

Starlight had started appearing in his Heavenly Energy too. At this moment, Duan Tianlang felt as if he was bathing in a warm spring, it was very comfortable. Everything inside his body felt like they were recovering. His internal organs, his bones, his muscles, his tendons, everything felt like they were becoming youthful. Zhou Weiqing did not give him his life force, but he used a strange way to bring a miracle to his body.

Humans were created by nature, and what Zhou Weiqing had given Duan Tianlang’s body was this vigor of creation. It was a much better gift than just gifting his life force and watch it flow away again.

Duan Tianlang’s eyes were blurry. He only felt as if he became young again. A lot of things he could only do when he was young had been resurrected. It seemed like he could do many of the things he used to be able to do.

At this point, he thought of a joke Long Shiya used to tell him. Long Shiya used to say, “What are brothers? Brothers are the ones who, when you’re ill and has laid down in bed, would pour you tea and water, feed you, and bathe you, even if none of these had any meaning anymore. And at the end of the day, he would bring you a pretty lady. By that point, you would say, ‘let me try, help me get up.’ ”

Perhaps, he could really try now.

The starlights shone for at least ten minutes before they disappeared back into Zhou Weiqing’s body. Slowly, Zhou Weiqing loosened his grip and smilingly looked at Duan Tianlang, who looked spaced out.

Long Shiya who was standing aside could tell the difference clearly. He saw Duan Tianlang’s peppery hair magically turned black starting from the roots. As the hair was turning black, the sagging skin on his face seemingly became toned and elastic, it looked as if he was ten years younger in an instant!

Long Shiya stared, in disbelief, at Duan Tianlang who looked younger by the second, and walked over to Zhou Weiqing silently, and whispered, “Weiqing, are you okay? Did it take a lot of your energy?”

Zhou Weiqing chuckled and shook his head, “It’s fine, it was nothing. I only borrowed the Atmospheric Energy, turned it into Saint Energy to reactivate Junior Master’s body. It doesn’t count as being decades younger, but he can at least live for a few decades, no problem, heh heh.”

“It really doesn’t take a lot from you?” Long Shiya’s eyes widened, pushing out from the rolls of fat that hid them.

Zhou Weiqing nodded, “Teacher, don’t worry. I’d never done anything I can’t guarantee of.”

Long Shiya’s grin turned toadyish, “Well, would you do it for me as well? I’d love to be young again, maybe I could even bring home a wife!”

Zhou Weiqing laughed heartily. He put his arm around Long Shiya’s shoulder and said, “Of course, how could I forget about you? You definitely can experience this.”

Saint Energy was mysterious, and as Starcrux Saint Nucleus Core had been solidified, and slowly showing Zhou Weiqing what it can do. What Zhou Weiqing did for Duan Tianlang was just an experiment in his emotional state. As proven, his experiment had succeeded. Duan Tianlang’s vitality had been restored by him.

This experiment allowed Zhou Weiqing to realize, he actually obtained the power to extend people’s life. With it, it would be very advantageous when it comes to developing the Heavenly Bow Empire!

Long Shiya patted Zhou Weiqing’s back satisfactorily. He was only joking with his disciple, but inside he sighed. It seemed like a long time ago when he first saw the kid. His cultivation base at the time was effectively that of an ant. Within only a few years, the kid had grown into someone even he had to pay attention to. The kid was even bestowed with so many unique powers. This was no longer talented, he was blessed!

Duan Tianlang’s dazed state continued for about ten minutes before he came out of it slowly. As he looked at Zhou Weiqing again, his gaze projected an unreadable expression. He sighed, saying, “Weiqing, why would you do that? I don’t understand what ability you’ve used, but wouldn’t it be taxing on you?”

Zhou Weiqing shook his head fervently and said, “Definitely not. Look at me, am I not still alive and jumping? Creation, it’s the special ability my Saint Energy has. Junior Master, you have given so much to me, let’s not even talk about harmless things, even if I had to sacrifice a little bit, I would still do it without hesitation. Besides, I’m still waiting for Junior Master to create more miracles.”

Duan Tianlang gasped, “Create miracles? What miracles?”

Zhou Weiqing said seriously, “Junior Master, I have gone to Mysterious Heavenly Mainland not long ago, and over there, I saw an eleven-piece legendary armor piece.” He quickly summarized his journey, giving more attention to Dongfang Hanyue’s Blackfiend Dragon Set.

Having heard Zhou Weiqing’s description, surprise kept flashing through Duan Tianlang’s eyes, “Combining with a dragon? There’s such a fantastical legendary armor set in Mysterious Heavenly Mainland?”

Zhou Weiqing nodded and said, “The Mysterious Heavenly Palace Master had only a mid-tiered Heavenly Emperor cultivation base, but with the armor set, it could fight against a Heavenly God tier powerhouse, one could only imagine how much power the armor set could provide. Our Strength Legacy had been around for a long time, so why can’t we have a set of eleven-piece legendary armor set? If our ancestors could create Ringless Ground Purging Set based on the foundation laid in Hiltless Sky Purging Set, I believe only you would have the mastery to create its eleventh piece.”
