The surreal nebula in the sky lit up abruptly, the dazzling lights seemed to instantly fuse with Zhou Weiqing into a single body. The next moment, before the Heavenly Emperor Meng Gui had the chance to scream, he had already reduced to ashes in the sky.

The blinding starlight made the nearby Long Shiya shut his eyes, not daring dare to look at it directly. The pressure by the starlight was not strong, but all Atmospheric Energy had disappeared upon the appearance of the mysterious stars.

Meng Gui’s body had vanished, but his golden shining Heavenly Nucleus Core was still floating mid-air. With a wave of Zhou Weiqing’s hand, it fell into his palm.

Mystical lights shone in Zhou Weiqing’s eyes. He stared at the night sky, remaining perfectly silent for long, and seemed to have entered a special state of enlightenment.

Raising his right arm, he waved in the air, and the Heavenly Nucleus Cores of the six Heavenly Kings he had killed flew from different directions each. While Dark Demon God Lightning had murdered the three Heavenly Kings in its explosion, their Heavenly Nucleus Cores had been preserved. The six Heavenly Nucleus Cores suddenly transformed into six beams of light rays, shooting out into the sky. From the appearances of the stars, it seemed just like six stars were rising from six different directions.

Along with the rise of the six beams of starlight, six beams of faint golden starlight had also descended from the sky and fell onto Zhou Weiqing’s body, enveloping his dark golden Ringless Ground Purging Set with dazzling golden starlight.

Showered in the starlight, the nearby Long Shiya could sense that the energies in Zhou Weiqing were rising. One could also tell from the observation that the colors of the ball of light on his chest had become purer.

Next, another beam of golden light was released form Zhou Weiqing’s hand – it was Heavenly Emperor Meng Gui’s Nucleus Core. It was obvious that the rising speed of this golden light was far quicker than that of the six previous beams. With a blink of the golden light, the nebula responded by illuminating a beam of starlight on Zhou Weiqing.

The golden pillar of light this time had a diameter of half a meter and showered in the starlight. Zhou Weiqing’s body shivered suddenly. The aura exploding from his body had also changed.

Upgraded. Had he been upgraded just like this?

Long Shiya had been staring in a jaw-drop silence, and thought, “Since when did Heavenly Jewel Masters upgrade like this? Let’s not mind the speed, but isn’t the process just too fascinating?”

He did not know that this was the secret of the Starcrux Saint Nucleus Core. Of course, it also had something to do with Zhou Weiqing’s Demonic Devour ability.

What Saint Energy possessed was creativity; it was not just the mere creativity of humans, but the greatest sense of creativity from the heavens and earth. This world had been created from the most primal part of this ability, and all the stars in the sky had been created in this manner.

Zhou Weiqing was right – every single Heavenly Nucleus Core can become a star of the sky, it just required an endless process of transformation and upgrades. Of course, the Heavenly Nucleus Cores of these Heavenly King-tier and Heavenly Emperor-tier powerhouses were not true stars, but they had the aura of the same attribute of those stars nonetheless.

Therefore, even the Heavenly Nucleus Core of a Heavenly God-tier powerhouse would not be on the same standing as Zhou Weiqing’s Starcrux Saint Nucleus Core.

Of course, with his current cultivation, he would not be capable of releasing the true powers of the Starcrux Saint Nucleus Core. His own cultivation was insufficient, and the levels of the Starcrux Saint Nucleus Core’s upgrading was limited.

However, this did not affect him from being able to borrow the Starcrux Saint Nucleus Core’s powers. What he had done earlier was igniting the powers of the stars in the night sky using his Starcrux Saint Nucleus Core, and interacting with the faraway stars, effectively reflecting Star Energy back to his body. On the other hand, when he had released the energies from the Heavenly Nucleus Cores of the six Heavenly Kings and one Heavenly Emperor, it was the same as returning these pure energies of stars back to the stars in the sky, effectively receiving Star Energy fed back by these stars.

These Star Energies might not be as strong as the seven Heavenly Nucleus Cores, but the purest Star Energy could be utilized by stacking onto the existing Star Energy of his Starcrux. On top of the fact that Zhou Weiqing had just devoured much Heavenly Energy, under the combined escalation, his cultivation had been instantly upgraded from the Middle Level to Upper Level of the Heavenly King Tier. If Demonic Devour was said to be the most amazing method of upgrading one’s cultivation in the human world, then, the method of Star’s Reflection would also be considered insanely ideal in the world of Gods!

When Zhou Weiqing had been condensing the Starcrux Saint Nucleus Core, he already had the enlightenment – albeit not as profound. However, after the previous process, he had slowly begun to master the essence of Star’s Reflection.

It could be said that Heavenly Emperor Meng Gui’s fate had occurred within Zhou Weiqing’s predictions. With Demon God’s Possession, Zhou Weiqing had sealed all of Heavenly Emperor Meng Gui’s senses of the external world. At that time, Long Shiya could feel that the Atmospheric Energy in the air had a unique fluctuation.

Zhou Weiqing had been talking with Heavenly Emperor Meng Gui. In fact, he had been delaying time as a long accumulation process was required for him to use Star Energy. It would be very challenging to use it in battle. Back then, when he had been condensing the tenth pair of Heavenly Jewels, his tenth Elemental Jewel had been fully occupied by his Star Energy. Similar to the seventh Elemental Jewel, its skills could not be stored. Star energy was the source that brought about this mystery in the world.

Reality had proven that Zhou Weiqing had succeeded, after the Star Energy had been activated by him, never mind the already injured Heavenly Emperor Meng Gui. Under such situation, even the Heavenly Emperor-tier powerhouses would not be able to withstand the Star Energy’s strike, and even the Heavenly God-tier powerhouses would have to keep their distance.

The biggest weakness of this Star Energy was that its accumulation time was too long. Of course, this was also associated with Zhou Weiqing’s current cultivation base. At the very least, it would not be too practical for the time being.

‘Master, please retreat a few steps,” Zhou Weiqing said to Long Shiya courteously.

Long Shiya still felt surreal. Nevertheless, he subconsciously moved away further, clearing out the space above the palace.

Zhou Weiqing put away his Ringless Ground Purging Set and brought his hands together in front of his chest. His whole being turned clear and bright once again, and a gentle Star Energy descended from the sky and gradually landed on the Fate Denying Seal.

A mysterious scene occurred. Under the Star Energy, the Fate Denying Seal was actually melting away slowly. Indeed, it was melting, just like ice coming into contact with water. It may not be melting very fast, but it was continuously decreasing in size.

At the same time, a bright silver light flashed across the diamond-shaped pendant on Zhou Weiqing’s chest. The silver light shot out and landed on the land below, forming a massive magic circle.

Countless silhouettes gradually emerged from the magic circle one after another, amounting to thousands of people.

Zhou Weiqing swung his arm downward, and a beam of Star Energy flashed across the group of silhouettes. A beautiful girl in a white dress rose into the sky and appeared by his side – she was none other than Tian’er.

At that point, nervousness appeared on Zhou Weiqing’s face, who was maneuvering Star Energy. He looked at Tian’er and nodded at her sternly.

When Shangguan Bing’er had left home, he had joined the Heavenly Bow Empire’s Imperial Army. Then he joined the Heavenly Bow Battalion and later joined the Royal Military Academy. Later, when he had led the Fei Li Battle Team to victory in the Heavenly Jewel Tournament on Heavenly Jewel Island, he had achieved the first brilliant accomplishment of his life. However, it was short-lived when he learned about the destruction of his hometown. For Zhou Weiqing, it was too heavy a blow.

Nevertheless, he was not depressed due to that. Instead, he put in immense effort to make his country prosperous. With his own abilities, he had made the Heavenly Bow Empire rise again, to be even stronger than before.

Today, he had finally returned to his home country which he had left for long; back again to the sky above the royal palace of the Heavenly Bow Empire.

When it was time to remove the seal, as long as the Heavenly Bow City was retrieved, it meant that the reclamation of Heavenly Bow Empire was a success.

Every single one of the three thousand warriors below was all from Heavenly Bow Empire’s most brilliant Peerless Regiment. One thousand Peerless Heavy Cavalry and two thousand Peerless Archers. After they had been sent here, they immediately searched for their ideal position.

No army of Kalise Empire had been stationed inside the Royal Palace of Heavenly Bow Empire as it had been guarded by several Blood Red Hell powerhouses. The aura of the Fate Denying Seal had its effect on the human body.

At this moment, the Kalise Empire’s armies outside had heard the commotion. They had not launched their attack solely because of the existence of the few powerhouses. Zhou Weiqing assigned three thousand people to this location to ensure that the Royal Palace would be safe and sound after he had removed the seal himself. It was also to ensure that he could give his all in recusing the lives of his family.

Under the illumination of Star Energy, the darkness brought by Fate Denying Seal was being eroded continuously, but during this process, unstable emotions kept flashing across Zhou Weiqing’s face.

The more he had removed the Fate Denying Seal, the clearer he could sense the aura within the seal. Those were terrifying energies of countless negative emotions such as despair, unwillingness, fury, killing intent, and blood. Even a Heavenly Emperor-tier powerhouse with Darkness Attribute like Heavenly Emperor Meng Gui would not dare to remove the seal casually. Upon the destruction of the seal, the individual would be struck by the backlash of the people’s negative emotions within the seal. Even if one’s body could withstand it, there would be a negative imprint on one’s soul – imposing a massive harm toward one’s cultivation in the future. This was the true terror of the Fate Denying Seal.

Of course, Zhou Weiqing would not be affected by these negative emotions. Other than the combination of his Star Energy and Starcrux Saint Nucleus Core giving him immunity of the Fate Denying Seal’s backlash, his own mood would never be affected by negative emotions! Activated by his father as his final strike, it encompassed all his efforts and his own life. Amidst the negative emotions, all he could feel was endless sorrow.

The darkness surrounding the palace had begun to fade while the stars in the sky had shone even brighter. Tears flowed uncontrollably from Zhou Weiqing’s face. At this moment, he had seen a huge silhouette clearing hovering five meters above the ground right in front of the palace,

Broad shoulders, a proud and straightened back, pitch-black armor, and that unwavering spirit. That was his father, who was once the strongest of the Heavenly Bow Empire. One who had been willing to sacrifice everything for the sake of his country – Admiral Zhou, Zhou Shui Niu.

Within the coverage of the faint black light, there were still many people, Zhou Weiqing next saw his mother Ling Zihan, who was not far from his father. He then saw his godfather, Emperor of Heavenly Bow Empire, Di Feng Ling. The Emperor, Di Feng Ling was acting in an unbelievable manner. In Zhou Weiqing’s eyes, he was kneeling in front of Zhou Weiqing’s father. Others who had kneeled down in unison were the officials of Heavenly Bow Empire headed by Xiao Ru Se’s father, Xiao Yunchen, and also the Marquis and Finance Minister of the Empire. They had even fallen to their feet to worship his father.

All of a sudden, the Star Energy’s melting of the seal had paused. In a flash, Zhou Weiqing had appeared in front of his father who had been frozen within the seal.

Although he had been extremely calm during his earlier battle with the three Heavenly Kings and one Heavenly Emperor, he was now shivering uncontrollably.

The darkness of the Fate Denying Seal would automatically melt away upon contact with his Saint Energy Galaxia. Looking closely at his father whose eyes was filled with an unwavering will, Zhou Weiqing outstretched his arms wide and hugged his father tightly.

“Tian’—er–,” a sobbing voice sounded in the air. The next instant, all of the heavens and earth were filled with dazzling golden light.

The very instant Zhou Weiqing embraced his father, the Star Energy spun violently, and all the blackness brought upon by the Fate Denying Seal had vanished. The stars in the sky could then no longer be seen and were replaced by a massive golden virtual image of an angel.

Six wings flapped, and concentrated golden light mixed with silvery white Saint Energy descended from the sky. The palace which had long been engulfed in darkness and overwhelmed with dark aura was now showered with a layer of divine golden light.

The sacred energy waves circulated in the air, transforming into dots of golden starlight which shone onto each person, enveloping them with a layer of golden mist.

The sacred energy blended into their bodies little by little, eliminating the concentrated dark aura brought by the Fate Denying Seal. The Saint Energy which was full of creativity continued to nurture their bodies, awakening the life within them.

There was only one exception, and that person was Admiral Zhou. The latter was in the tight embrace of Zhou Weiqing.

Admiral Zhou’s Heavenly Jewel Attribute had always been Darkness, resulting in a certain level of repulsion against Divine Attribute. Furthermore, as the caster of the Fate Denying Seal, his death would be certain upon the safety of others under normal circumstances. With Tian’er’s cultivation, it was insufficient to rescue the life of her to-be father-in-law whom she had just met for the first time.

As for Long Shiya, his cultivation was sufficient. However, his attribute would worsen the situation. To heal a person of Darkness Attribute using Light Attribute would only speed up the person’s death. As for Water Attribute, it might be able to save the life of Admiral Zhou for now, but no one could guarantee how long his life could be sustained. At the very least, Admiral Zhou might also become crippled.

Thus, Zhou Weiqing had to make his move. Under his command of Star Energy, chances would be best only if he did it himself.

The instant he hugged his father, Zhou Weiqing had cleared all his other attributes, leaving only the purest Saint Energy Galaxia. It enveloped the fragile body of his father who might just collapse any time, simultaneously eliminating all negative energies of the Fate Denying Seal.

Admiral Zhou, at this point, was akin to a building constructed by wood blocks, albeit a slanted one, about to collapse anytime now. On the other hand, Zhou Weiqing’s Saint Energy Galaxia was like a cover, gathering these wooden blocks together to stop its shape from changing, effectively preventing its collapse.

Apart from that, these Saint Energy Galaxia were continuously entering Admiral Zhou’s body, reshaping it with the purest and gentlest Creation Energy.

Indeed, he was being reshaped, not healed.

After casting the Fate Denying Seal, it could be said that Admiral Zhou’s body had long collapsed. The reason he was still able to sustain his current state was solely due to the effects of the previous seal. Once the seal had vanished, he would also turn into ashes. The reason why Zhou Weiqing had the chance of reshaping him was because the soul of Admiral Zhou was still present.

Tian’er who was releasing divine energy could clearly sense that huge amounts of Atmospheric Energy were flowing toward Zhou Weiqing, including the energies she was releasing. Unfortunately, his Saint Energy Galaxia was decreasing at a shocking speed.

This was not as simple as solidifying the energies of Purgatory Angel upon the activation of the skill. It could be said that Zhou Weiqing was really creating a physical body for a soul now!

Although the original body of Admiral Zhou was being used as the foundation, the entire creation process had depended on his Saint Energy Galaxia for the body to take shape. Only by doing so, there would not be any future negative implications. For the sake of his father, why would Zhou Weiqing mind his efforts?

The three thousand warriors of Peerless Regiment had fallen into their respective positions, defending against the external forces while fixing the palace as the center. The palace of the Heavenly Bow Empire was not huge, thus three thousand of them were perfectly sufficient. However, they were fixating their gazes in the air. To them, the sacred light radiating from Tian’er’s body was simply too astonishing.

Other than that, due to Tian’er’s high position, whatever the faraway armies of the Heavenly Bow Empire could see, was also seen by the armies of the Kalise Empire and the Bai Da Empire.

Holy Faith which was capable of being on the same standing as Demonic Devour had begun to take effect. While staying mid-air, Tian’er continuously transformed these powers of religion into the purest divine energy and showered them below. Not only were the fellow people of the Heavenly Bow Empire healed, Zhou Weiqing’s energy consumption was being supported at the same time.

Right then, the Shangguan Triplets were all amongst the warriors. It had been such a large commotion here, but the army union of the Kalise and Bai Da Empire had yet to show any signs of attack. Thus, they had not received any pressure as of now.

It was Heavenly Emperor Meng Gui who had ordered normal soldiers were not allowed to interfere regardless of the situation. In fact, the only ones capable of causing any commotion were the Heavenly King-tier powerhouses, for the ordinary armies would only bring them death. Therefore, his command was not wrong either. It was only that the warriors brought by Zhou Weiqing were relaxed.

Shangguan Xue’er nodded at Shangguan Fei’er, and said, “Launch the signal.”

Shanguan Fei’er agreed and raised her right hand. A beam of light shot to the sky and exploded into dazzling fireworks upon reaching the highest pinnacle. This firework signified that the palace’s rescue was a success. As for the details regarding the methods of attack outside and the assembly of troops, those were the matters of the Heavenly Bow Military God, Admiral Ming Yu.

Shangguan Xue’er stared at the faraway Zhou Weiqing up in the sky who was giving his all to bring his father back to life; her eye somehow looked a little lost.

Back then, his cultivation had been far weaker than hers were! However, he had now reached a level where she would need to look up to him. Heavenly King Tier who was many years younger than she was, had become a Heavenly King first, and even possessed the Saint Nucleus Core!

Shangguan Bing’er had informed Shangguan Xue’er of Zhou Weiqing’s bet with the brothers, Shangguan Tian Yang and Tian Yue. When Shangguan Xue’er discovered that Zhou Weiqing had faced immense pressure for her sake and had finally emerged victorious, shedding the heaviest burden on his shoulders, she was lost and dazed for a few hours.

These few days, she had been avoiding Zhou Weiqing and did not dare to meet him. The emotions in her heart were indescribable. She was not clear on how she should face Zhou Weiqing and felt rather guilty. For the sake of the Heaven’s Expanse Palace, she had considered giving up this relationship! Amongst the Shangguan Triplets, the time she had spent with Zhou Weiqing was the shortest, but it did not mean that her feelings for Zhou Weiqing would be any less than how she felt for the two younger sisters.

On the contrary, she had been engaging in intense training in Heaven’s Expanse Palace since she was young. For someone like her, whose heart had been as pure as a blank sheet of paper, there were only traces left by a single person, and he was Zhou Weiqing. Furthermore, there was no one else on the white piece of paper.

With all his efforts, Zhou Weiqing had finally gotten a chance to be with her, but what had she done previously? She had been constantly avoiding him, giving in to her father and uncle. Due to such a responsibility, she had thought of giving up on him, albeit not just once. However, he too had not once given up on her.

Even her two younger sisters were unaware of her complicated and contradictory feelings. It would only be possible for her to overcome her guilt after she had organized her thoughts.

However, there was one thing which Shangguan Xue’er was no longer concerned about. It was the fact that she was no longer the heir of Heaven’s Expanse Palace. She intended to have all her thoughts focused on her man – she would be wherever he was.

Outside Heavenly Bow City, Ming Yu stared at the divine light which was radiating continuously from the faraway Heavenly Bow City and had been waiting in silence.

Finally, a smile crept up his face when the huge fireworks rose into the sky.

All the military leaders and soldiers had let out deafening cheers at the same time, including him. They did not mind alerting the Kalise armies who were on guard.

An hour ago, Ming Yu had released an order and had spread the news of the rescue. Furthermore, he had also informed the officers of the Heavenly Bow Empire regarding the type of fireworks appearing upon the successful rescue and had asked for them to deliver the news.

This was a little trick of Ming Yu, which aimed to raise the morale of the Heavenly Bow Empire’s soldiers to the highest point by using the opportunities presented by the successful rescue of the Heavenly Bow Empire royalties.

The loud cheer had made it clear to him that his trick had succeeded.

“Action,” with a swing of his arm, Ming Yu relayed his command to attack.

The armies of Heavenly Bow Empire had begun to move. They did not directly launch their offense, but instead, they operated in a scattered formation, and passed through the forests, slowly closing in on the Heavenly Bow City.

chapters.title: Chapter 750
chapters.body:
Chapter 750

Looking at the dazzling divine light in the night sky, although it was already nightfall, the morale of the Heavenly Bow Empire soared. This especially occurred to the warriors who originally belonged to the Heavenly Bow Empire, they had been waiting for this day for far too long.

Three thousand of them floated into the sky taking advantage of the night sky. Under the cover of the night, they took the lead by flying towards the Kalise and Bai Da union army who had been stationed near the Heavenly Bow City. Among the 10,000 elite in the Peerless Regiment, the Peerless Archers occupied five thousand of them. Zhou Weiqing took two thousand with him while the remaining 3,000 had been gathered by Ming Yu since the beginning.

Ever since the Heavenly Bow army was recovered, the Peerless Archers had not really showcased their flying skills in combat. The reason being that they wanted it to be their ultimate weapon to defeat their enemies in the last battle. Three thousand of them arrived thousands of meters up in the sky quickly, taking advantage of the cover of night. Night time aside, even if it was during the day, it was difficult to notice their presence if one was not looking intentionally.

Ming Yu then released his second order. “First, second, third, fourth and fifth Strongbow Battalion get ready. Peerless Heavy Cavalry and Snow Deer Cavalry set out. First and second calvary teams move forward.”

Ming Yu had gotten many epiphanies from Zhou Weiqing. For the Heavenly Bow Empire army, he wanted the real elite army. Although it was impossible for him to train an army like the Peerless Regiment, with Zhou Weiqing’s full financial support as well as the material supports from the Fei Li and Zhongtian Empire, one could say that the Heavenly Bow Empire Field Army Group was all set.

The Strongbow Battalion was not so simple that they were only equipped with ordinary longbows. They were fully equipped with actual strongbows made from Purple Dawn Wood. Besides, every Strongbow Archer would be equipped with a crossbow as well. As soon as they went into combat, their fingers would always be on the trigger. Regardless if it was for defense or to kill enemies, this would increase the archers’ battle ability tremendously. The Strongbow Archers’ were equipped with leather armor for defenses. Although such defenses meant nothing on the battlefield, it would be an entirely different concept if it were combined with the Heavy Infantry and Cavalry.

In the Heavenly Bow Empire, archers were what they were lacked the least. It was the Heavenly Bow Empire after all! Therefore, among the 10 or so regiments, Ming Yu intentionally picked out five thousand of them and formed five Strongbow Battalions. Apart from these, there were exactly five regiments of archers which occupied almost a third of the army’s forces while the rest were made up of none other than the elite armies.

There were no Light Infantries in the Heavenly Bow Empire. There was only one type of infantry; the Heavy Infantry. Moreover, their Heavy Infantry was equipped with horses to increase their movement speed on the battlefield. The only thing was that they were trained differently from the Heavy Cavalry and their horses did not have armor on them. The Light and Heavy Cavalry were Ming Yu’s champions. With the leadership of the Peerless Regiment, it was not difficult to develop and train an army. Of course, sufficient resources were of utmost importance or it would have been impossible for Ming Su to develop such a strong army in such a short period of time.

All of the armies in the Heavenly Bow Empire were up and running. They were moving forward, following Ming Yu’s arrangement. Although their morale was at its peak, none of them dared to leave the team out of impulse. That was what the military discipline meant. Three thousand of them arrived at their destination slowly by air with Ming Yu holding his head up high, looking far away all the time.

The Kalise and Bai Da union army had woken up ever since they detected movement in the city. Their commander was not an idiot, if something was happening in the Royal Palace of the Heavenly Bow Empire, it would most probably mean that the Heavenly Bow Empire was in action. The commander woke up the rest that was resting in the camp and got them to reform their team.

However, the effort did not work out. Moreover, nobody expected the attack from the Heavenly Bow Empire’s to come so quickly. It had been some time since the threat was sent and the Heavenly Bow Empire Field Army Group had been very quiet. Everything came without any warning. A massive amount of black items fell from the sky. Soon, there were intermittent screams in the Kalise and Bai Da union army camp.

The ear-piercing noise of things getting crushed broke the camp’s peace.

“What’s that! It broke into my tent.”

Crushing noises were heard from time to time.

“That smells pungent, why does it smell like kerosene? That’s not right, run quick.” Finally, a smart person could at least determine what the black items were.

Unfortunately, as the black items fell from the sky, a large number of flares sparked. Naturally, the Kalise and Bai Da union army had scouts with them. They would have discovered the Heavenly Bow Empire Field Army Group if they approached the camp since the beginning. However, the attack came from above. No matter how elite the scouts were, it was impossible for them to have their eyes in the sky at all times!

Three thousand flaming arrows came from above. They did not have to aim as long as they were shot in the directions where they tossed the kerosene bottles. Three thousand Peerless warriors brought four bottles of kerosene each, tossing them into the sky and so they were scattered around. They targeted the tents and places that were easily burned.

Kerosene was inflammable itself and over the span of ten breaths after the fire arrows were fired from above, the entire Kalise and Bai Da union army camp were covered in flames.

It was a camp of more than ten thousand soldiers! The Star Forest was not that big. In order for them to be able to protect Heavenly Bow City, their camp was built close to one another and each tent had many soldiers in them. The unexpected fire that came out of nowhere felt like it managed to light the entire camp into flames all at the same time. At that moment, the soldiers received their instruction and got up to prepare themselves to regroup. However, everything was too late.

Humans were afraid of death. The huge fire that came out of nowhere caused the soldiers who were sleepy to be panicked. Furthermore, they were no elite armies. The Bai Da Empire soldiers were slightly better while the Kalise Empire’s soldiers were all in a panic. Sudden, screaming was heard all over the camp. People were being stepped on and burned; the entire camp was in a mess.

“Kill them!!” Ming Yu said with a cold tone. Then, the same voice spread all over the regiment.

They had been waiting for this day for way too long. Ming Yu had at least three complete plans for this round of combat. God knew how many times he had gotten the Peerless Airforce to spy on the condition of their enemies.

As the saying went ‘fire and flood has no mercy’, the fire attack was just too sudden to the Kalise and Bai Da union army. The raging fire made them lose faith as an army. Under such circumstance, how could they defend the Heavenly Bow Field Army Group whose morale was soaring? Although the Heavenly Bow Field Army Group’s vanguards had arrived within the range of the enemy scouts, they were shocked as well. The camp at the back was burning out of nowhere, would that piece of information be useful when it was sent back?

Some of them returned while most of the scouts chose to escape. At least they could still find means they could use to escape. The team that first reached the frontline was the Peerless Heavy Cavalry. Aside from the one thousand Heavy Cavalries that Zhou Weiqing brought with him, there were still three thousand Heavy Cavalries that were made up of the Berserker and Gold Crow Tribe as well as the 500 Snow Deer Cavalry.

The Snow Deer Cavalry had equipment was no different from those of the Peerless Heavy Cavalry aside from their mounts and weapons. Naturally, the Snow Deer Cavalry were riding on a huge snow deer which was much bigger than the Ghost Demon Horse while they used a kind of heavy deer horn as weapons. The Snow Deer Cavalry could be ranked among the top three in the entire Wan Shou Empire so one could imagine how powerful they were. The Peerless Cavalry had competed with one another in the past and they needed at least two Peerless Cavalry to go against one Snow Deer Cavalry. Perhaps, the gap between them would not be so big if we were talking purely about strength. However, when it comes to battle technique, the Snow Deer Cavalry were far superior to the Peerless Cavalry.

At that moment, the 3,500 Heavy Cavalry stood in a line on the battlefield and marched forward slowly. There were approximately five meters of distance between two Heavy Cavalries. These gaps were not empty as they were filled with five Heavy Infantries between them. After the five Heavy Infantries were five Strongbow Battalion archers.

The Kalise camp was in a mess and the Peerless soldiers began to push them back with full force. The Kalise army aside, it was difficult for the Bai Da army to form proper teams. Even if they managed to form a group under normal circumstance, could they fight an army like the one from the Heavenly Bow Empire?

Massive amounts of soldiers could be seen running out of the camp continuously. Suddenly, a striking whistle was heard. The Strongbow Battalion warriors and the Peerless archers in the air launched the actual killing blow. It was the perfect combination; an air-land lockdown where arrows would be shot the moment people appeared. Perhaps the officials of the Kalise and Bai Da union army could not imagine that Ming Yu would only send the forces of three regiments to the frontline. Of course, the three regiments were made up of the most elite soldiers in the entire Heavenly Bow Field Army Group.

These aside, all Light and Heavy Cavalries as well as archers, had been divided into two groups since the beginning before they launched an attack and flanked the enemy from both sides. They were all equipped with horses and among them, the Heavy Cavalry had traveled further away last night by taking advantage of the cover of night. Ming Yu’s intention was obvious. He did not only want to win the battle, he also wanted to kill all of the enemies to achieve the ultimate victory.

In actual fact, there was no suspense in this battle from the moment the Kalise and Bai Da union army’s camp caught fire. The conclusion was set the moment the Kalise and Bai Da union army, with close to 200,000 soldiers got surrounded by the Heavenly Bow Empire’s 150,000 armies.

In Heavenly Bow City, before the palace’s main hall. The fellow people of Heavenly Bow Empire who were bathed in Divine Energy were waking up from being sealed one after the other. The warm Divine Energy moisturized their bodies, giving them an indescribable comfort. When they opened their eyes, they were surprised to find out that they were covered in a brilliant, golden light. As the golden light was too strong, they could not see what was outside clearly.

The years were nothing but a dream to them. A moment ago, they had just seen Admiral Zhou using the Fate Denying Seal, disregarding its cost. After a long, deep sleep, it felt like they had just woken up after a short while. Di Feng Ling looked around like he was slightly lost and was not able to even utter a word at that time while he watched his ministers who were recovering their abilities to move one after the other. His state of mind was the same as the time when Admiral Zhou was determined to release the Fate Denying Seal. He mumbled to himself as pain and grief grew in him, “It’s me who is useless, Admiral… brother…”

Di Feng Ling then looked for Admiral Zhou by instinct but all he could see around him was a golden light.

Ling Zihan had just woken up and surprised to see the golden brilliance around.

“Could it be that we’ve arrived in heaven? This can’t be hell. Shuiniu, Shuiniu where are you?” Ling Zihan was almost screaming out her last sense. Recalling that her husband chose to use the Fate Denying Seal as the last straw to save the empire, the tears in Ling Zihan’s eyes poured down.

“Sister-in-law, please calm down. Something’s not right! Di Feng Ling held Ling Zihan who almost fell down from attempting to look for Admiral Zhou.

Di Feng Ling was emperor of the time. Naturally, he was much calmer than ordinary people. He pinched himself hard earlier, the intense pain told him that he was still alive. Although they were surrounded by golden brilliance, it was still his palace when he turned around! Suddenly, the golden brilliance around him dimmed, revealing the dark night sky. The ministers of the Heavenly Bow Empire looked at the sky together and saw the goddess-like Tian’er in a white, long dress.

Silver hair, purple eyes with a golden sparkle shining brightly within. Could she really be a goddess sent from heaven? Besides, the striking golden brilliance was fading towards her direction. The Heavenly Bow Empire ministers were stunned. Was it her who saved us? The ministers aside, even Di Feng Ling almost wanted to kneel as he felt the rich Divine energy that was emitting from Tian’er.

At that moment, a deep voice was heard, “Don’t kneel.”

Colorful lights were shining in the sky, the Six Ultimate Heavenly Emperor Long Shiya came to Tian’er. He held her body as without any skill support, Tian’er’s cultivation base was not still insufficient to fly. One must know that the most powerful Heavenly Jewel Master in the Heavenly Bow Empire was Admiral Zhou. Admiral Zhou had just broken through Ninth Jewel Realm when he used the Fate Denying Seal. The Heavenly Bow Empire ministers had never seen any powerhouses who could fly so they were not sure if what they were seeing was good or bad.

Di Feng Ling was quite calm as he saw Admiral Zhou on his second glance. However, Admiral Zhou seemed like he was being held by somebody right now. Moreover, there were bright lights sparkling everywhere. Naturally, that was not something that they could intervene.

“Sir, may I ask who are you?” Di Feng Ling asked Long Shiya with respect. Naturally, Long Shiya did not allow them to kneel because of Tian’er. How awkward would it be if she let her father-in-law and mother-in-law kneel for their daughter-in-law?

Long Shiya chuckled as he pulled Tian’er from the sky and landed in front of everybody.

“Don’t be scared and there’s nothing to worry about. I’m that bastard Zhou Weiqing’s teacher. I’m here to save the Heavenly Bow Empire with him.”

A simple sentence from Long Shiya got Di Feng Ling all stunned and his body was shaking. Really, you guys are really here to save us?

Ling Zhihan had her eyes opened wide while tears flushed out of her eyes.

“Weiqing, my Little Fatty. Where’s my Little Fatty? Old sir, where’s Weiqing?”

Long Shiya pointed to the sky, “Isn’t he there? He’s saving his father now. You must be Weiqing’s mother I guess, you’ve given birth to a good son.”

Long Shiya was old enough to be Ling Zhihan’s grandfather. However, because of Zhou Weiqing, she could only treat him like someone from the same generation. Naturally, the Six Ultimate Heavenly Emperor had always done whatever he wanted so he did not think too much about it.

Everyone was looking at the group of lights that were still shining in the sky. Ling Zhihan clenched her fist subconsciously and bit her lower lips. Those were two most important men in her life! Suddenly, the three people dashed toward them at a tremendous speed. Within several moments, they arrived at the people. Tian’er’s facial expression slightly changed when she saw the three people but she returned to normal soon after. Weren’t those three who dashed here the Shangguan Triplets? Ling Zhihan was stunned to see the Shangguan Triplets. She knew of Shangguan Bing’er but how could she not be shocked to see three Shangguan Bing’er appearing all at once?

Shangguan Bing’er nodded to her two sisters and bowed with respect.

“Pleasure to meet you, your Majesty. A pleasure to meet you as well, aunty.”

Di Feng Ling was stunned, Shangguan Bing’er was the Heavenly Bow Empire’s hope! How could the three of them who looked exactly the same come out of nowhere?

Ling Zhihan looked at one of them and proceeded to another, she could not find the difference between the three of them. Shangguan Bing’er then said immediately, “Aunt, I’m Bing’er. These two are my sisters, Shangguan Bing’er and Shangguan Fei’er.”

“Oh, oh, great. Good girls. How long has it been!” Ling Zihan asked what was on Di Feng Ling’s mind.

Shangguan Bing’er let out a soft sigh, “Your Majesty, aunty, it had been almost three years since the Heavenly Bow Empire was attacked. All of you had been sealed in the Fate Denying Seal. With Weiqing’s leadership, we’ve finally accumulated sufficient force to launch a counterattack against the Heavenly Bow Empire. Our Field Army Group has attacked the Heavenly Bow Empire and I believe that victory will be upon us soon.”

“What.. what you’re saying is real?” Di Feng Ling looked at Shangguan Bing’er in excitement. He could not believe everything was real. He was a despaired overthrown monarch just a moment ago!

Shangguan Bing’er nodded in all seriousness and said, “It’s real, it’ll be proven to you soon.”

At that moment, the bright sparkling light descended slowly and landed before the people. Suddenly, all of the chatter stopped as everyone had their eyes on the light. The light faded away and Zhou Weiqing let go of his arms that were holding onto his father. He had excitement in him as he stood back slowly. He had done everything that he could, everything depended on what they were witnessing whether his father could keep his life or not.

As the light faded and revealing Admiral Zhou’s body slowly, the muscles of his majestic face twitched.

chapters.title: Chapter 751
chapters.body:
Chapter 751

At this moment, everyone has their gazes focused on Admiral Zhou, thus, even if there were minute changes to his body, it would be clear for all to see.

The instant they saw Admiral Zhou’s facial muscles twitching, almost everyone’s heartbeat stopped. They held their breaths and stared at him from time to time.

The most nervous would naturally be Zhou Weiqing and his mother, as well as Di Feng Ling and his people. To them, the safety of Admiral Zhou was extremely important. If they could not revive Admiral Zhou, everything that Zhou Weiqing had done would be left with no meaning. He had given his all, and was really afraid that all his efforts would be in vain. If that was the case, he might not be able to take it.

Admiral Zhou’s facial muscles twitched again, and little shivers appeared on his body, upon seeing this, Zhou Weiqing hugged his mother tightly. He was close to not being brave enough to see what happens next. After all, his father’s body had almost completely collapsed due to the Fate Denying Seal’s destruction. Under such circumstances, how easy would it be to aid his father in recovering his body? Prior to this, he was just trying his best to channel his Saint Energy Galaxia into his father to have the creative energies injected. He was not entirely sure if he could resurrect his father, how could he not be nervous?

“Hu -” Admiral Zhou let out a breath. The shivers on his body gradually stabilized, and he slowly opened his eyes. A faint layer of dark airflow radiated from his body. Pure Darkness Attribute circulated around his body, and nine pairs of Heavenly Jewels simultaneously appeared on both of his wrists.

It was only at this point that Zhou Weiqing was relieved, and the facial expressions of the people at the sidelines brightened at the same time.

Admiral Zhou’s eyes seemed a little lost. He stared at the people in front of him, stunned for a while, and spoke with a slightly hoarse voice, “Where’s this? Am I still alive?”

“Father, this is the Heavenly Bow Empire! Of course you’re still alive, so is everyone else,” Zhou Weiqing released his embrace from his mother, quickly strode two steps forward, and kneeled down before his father. He hugged his father’s legs with both his arms and cried loudly.

His emotions had been suppressed for too long. He had finally resurrected his father and rescued the people of the Heavenly Bow Empire. Upon his relief, all the pain and sorrow he had been holding in for long had all been released instantly. While he may be a formidable opponent who could even kill a Heavenly Emperor-tier powerhouse moments ago, he was now only an ordinary person who was back in the arms of his parents.

Admiral Zhou was indeed Admiral Zhou. Looking at his grown-up son hugging his legs while sobbing, his face darkened abruptly, and lifted Zhou Weiqing by grabbing his shoulder, “What are you crying for? I’m not dead. Now tell me, what has happened?”

At this moment, he was overwhelmed with questions, and so were the people who had just been released from the seal. He had been certain of his impending death upon casting the Fate Denying Seal. However, he came back to life now and his son had returned. ‘What on earth was going on?’ he wondered.

“Old bastard, can’t you be gentler? Without the reinforcements led by your son, none of us will be alive. My son is the hero of the Heavenly Bow Empire.”

Seeing that Admiral Zhou was still treating Zhou Weiqing like he did before, Ling Zihan failed to contain herself and headed over furiously. She seemed to have forgotten how much she had cried, as she was worried about her husband’s life.

“Reinforcements? Weiqing, tell me what happened. Hadn’t I taught you that a true man sheds only blood and no tears?’

Upon being lectured by this father, Zhou Weiqing could not continue his sobbing. Right then, his heart had been overwhelmed with happiness. Even if his father were to give him two slaps, he would not have minded at all.

“Father, this is how it went…. Back then, when I learned of the Heavenly Bow Empire’s annihilation of Heavenly Jewel Palace, I went to the Zhongtian Empire and returned to our Heavenly Bow Empire. I have also established armies, assembled the original soldiers of the Heavenly Bow Empire, and finally we’ve attacked Heavenly Bow City. With everyone’s help, we’ve invaded the city, annihilated the enemies, and removed the Fate Denying Seal you’ve cast.”

It could be said that Zhou Weiqing had summarized everything he had done all these years as briefly as he could. It may sound simple, but he did not wish to mention the sufferings he had experienced ever again.

While he spoke, Zhou Weiqing led his father to Six Ultimate Heavenly Emperor Long Shiya, “Dad, let me introduce someone to you. This is my Master, the Six Ultimate Heavenly Emperor who everyone refers to as The Strongest in The World, and goes by the family name of Long.” He did not feel comfortable to address his master’s name directly, so that was all he could say.

Although Long Shiya had restrained his Heavenly Energy, he was still a Heavenly Emperor. His strong aura was still unique despite being held back. After all, Admiral Zhou had entered the realm of Nine Jewels, thus, he could clearly sense the terrifying powers of Long Shiya. He quickly bowed, “Thank you senior, for saving Heavenly Bow Empire from disaster.”

Even the few words of the Heavenly Emperor-tier powerhouse were enough to throw the people of the Heavenly Bow Empire into shock. They had never met any Heavenly Jewel Masters of such a level!

Long Shiya chuckled, and said, “You have a wonderful son. Since I’m his master, let us speak on equal terms. You don’t have to address me as senior either. I’m Long Shiya.”

To be honest, Admiral Zhou was not familiar with the name Long Shiya. It was even his first time hearing that name. With his cultivation back then, he had not been qualified to have any knowledge of Six Ultimate Heavenly Emperor.

“Thank you for your aid, senior” Admiral Zhou bowed once again, but it was not just for himself this time; it was also for his people and his son.

With a flash of his plump silhouette, Long Shiya did not accept his respect, “Admiral Zhou, you’ve mistaken. It wasn’t I who had saved your life, it was somebody else.”

Upon hearing his words, Zhou Shui Niu was stunned momentarily, and thought, ‘It wasn’t him?’ However, he very well understood the best extent of powers of his Fate Denying Seal. It would be challenging even for a Heavenly King-tier powerhouse to remove it. Since Zhou Weiqing had been able to have a Heavenly Emperor come to his aid, it should obviously be the senior who had saved them! No matter what, he still could not identify anyone among the crowd who had the abilities to destroy his Fate Denying Seal.

“Please don’t joke with me, senior. Other than you, who else is capable of rescuing the Heavenly Bow Empire from the disaster?” Zhou Shui Niu said, puzzled.

Long Shiya chucked, and said, “Isn’t this simple? The person is just right in front of you. He’s your beloved son! I have to admit that I’ve not done much; it was his own powers that had saved your Heavenly Bow Empire. If you must, you should thank him, which brings me to the fact that the whole of your Heavenly Bow Empire should be thanking him well.”

“Weiqing?” disbelief appeared on Admiral Zhou’s face. He thought secretly, ‘How could I not know my own son? This brat may have become a Heavenly Jewel Master, but with his cultivation base, how is it possible for him to destroy my Fate Denying Seal?’

At this moment, Di Feng Ling had already walked to Admiral Zhou’s side, “Brother, let’s not discuss this as the battle is still ongoing outside. It won’t be too late to resume our conversation after we’ve solved the pressing matters.”

Admiral Zhou quickly nodded in agreement, ‘Weiqing, bring me to the battlefield.”

Zhou Weiqing chuckled, and said, “Relax, dad. I have everything under control. This battle won’t be needing you at all. The seal had just been removed; you need to rest now. Godfather, why don’t you have the guards and servants clean up the palace? Then, all you have to do is just wait for our victorious return. Oh, that’s right! My wives, come over and meet your father-in-law and mother-in-law.”

The Shangguan Triplets and Tian’er rushed forward, and bowed at Admiral Zhou and Ling Zihan, “Nice to meet you, uncle and auntie.”

Admiral Zhou stared in astonishment as the four beautiful ladies, and could not regain his senses for a brief moment. He pointed at Zhou Weiqing, “Brat, they, they’re all your…”

Zhou Weiqing cackled, and said, “That’s right, dad, they are all mine, and these are your daughter-in-laws as well. Aren’t I great?”

Zhou Shui Niu glared at them, but said softly, “Stand, ladies. After things have wrapped up, I’ll treat you well.”

The four ladies had heard from Zhou Weiqing that Admiral Zhou was rather short-tempered, but when they saw that they could still hold a conversation with their future father-in-law, they let out a breath of relief. They bowed once more and retreated to the sides.

Di Feng Ling also became more occupied. There was also an advantage for all the people of Heavenly Bow Empire to be gathered, as a large number of guards and servants were still present. As it had been sealed previously, the place did not suffer much damage and thus cleaning it up would not be difficult.

Zhou Weiqing said to Di Feng Ling, “Godfather, I’ll have a look outside. I think our big armies will be advancing here soon.”

Just like what Zhou Weiqing had said, the battles outside may still be happening in full swing, but there were no longer any concerns.

The key point of this war was the element of surprise. Although there were responses from the army union of Kalise and Bai Da, their first response was that something had happened in Heavenly Bow City. The higher-ups of the army union knew that there were numerous powerhouses on guard in the city. Therefore, they did not bother much about what was happening. It was only until the armies of the Heavenly Bow Empire had begun their advance that the fire descending from the sky almost instantly presented them with the conclusion of the war.

All this while, Peerless Regiment had been a formidable force which was capable of turning the tables around during the whole war. At the Northern Border, they had managed to eliminate a huge number of their enemies, although their opponents were the strong armies of the Wan Shou Empire. As time went by, the overall powers of Peerless Regiment had been on the rise, and this time, the entire Peerless Regiment had participated in the war.

chapters.title: Chapter 752
chapters.body:
Chapter 752

While facing the army union of the Kalise and Bai Da Empire, the defenses of the Peerless Heavy Cavalry were indeed invulnerable. Even in the dark, the Peerless Archers had a certain level of accuracy. Under such circumstances, every round of shots they took together would be able to kill thousands of their enemies, along with the terrifying damage of the flames. The outcome of this battle would be concluded in just two hours.

Ming Yu’s commands on the battlefield were absolutely wonderful. The main forces of the army closing in from the rear, eliminating the chances of the enemies escaping. This was a confirmed victory and a complete victory at that.

The real battle had only been going on for slightly more than two hours until it came to an end, and all that was left was to clean up the battlefield.

The flames burnt on until dawn. As the fire had extinguished, the war had also drawn to a close.

When Ming Yu led the group of the Heavenly Bow Empire’s officers into Heavenly Bow City, it also signified the success of Heavenly Bow City’s reclamation. Until this point, the Heavenly Bow armies had almost reclaimed every single territory.

Ming Yu had only used three days to accomplish all of these. During this period, Zhou Weiqing had remained in the palace and told all of his recent encounters with his father and the Emperor of Heavenly Bow Empire, Di Feng Ling.

“Princess Difuya is here,” the guard’s announcement made everyone who was in the midst of their discussion in the main hall, direct their gazes toward the entrance of the palace.

At this time, there was only Zhou Weiqing and his father, Di Feng Ling, Xiao Yunchen and several other men in the main hall.

Difuya had been assigned to the rear section of the city and did not participate in the war. In fact, Zhou Weiqing had never paid much attention to the princess. After they had emerged victorious in the war, he had ordered his people to send Difuya back.

Upon hearing the return of his daughter, Di Feng Ling looked agitated, but soon after, this agitation of his was replaced by anger, and he sat still on his seat with an unpleasant demeanor.

“Father,” accompanied by a sorrowful cry, Difuya rushed in from the outside and ran toward her father. Just like how Zhou Weiqing had hugged Admiral Zhou previously, she clung to her father’s legs and sobbed loudly.

Di Feng Ling sat perfectly still and gave no response despite her antics.

Admiral Zhou who had been sitting at the side frowned, and spared a glance at his son.

After Zhou Weiqing had reported everything to his father, Zhou Shui Niu’s attitude toward his beloved son had changed minutely. His previous sternness had vanished and was now replaced by affection. “It’s exactly like what Six Ultimate Heavenly Emperor had said. Whoever has a son like this will definitely be proud!” he thought as he recalled Long Shiya’s words.

As for Difuya giving up on the marriage, Admiral Zhou was extremely displeased within his heart. He thought, “I used to think that my son didn’t deserve the princess, but how about now? My son is the youngest Heavenly King-tier powerhouse. In what way is he undeserving of her?

Regarding Difuya, Admiral Zhou now did not think of her as a good match for his son. Difuya was the royal descendant of the Heavenly Bow Empire! However, since unpleasant things had happened to the Heavenly Bow Empire, it was his son who had invested all his efforts and had gone through so much for the empire to be successfully reclaimed today. What has she done as the princess? He thought that not only had she not aided much, she had caused trouble for his son instead. He did not bother to have such a daughter-in-law and did not mind calling off the marriage.

“Go away, I don’t have a daughter like you,” Di Feng Ling abruptly lifted his leg, and kicked Difuya away.

Difuya was stunned by her father’s kick, as she did not get up after falling to the ground. ‘Since I was little, father had loved me the most. How can he treat me like this?’ she thought.

Di Feng Ling stood up and said to Admiral Zhou, “Brother, I’m ashamed to allow this brat to step foot into your family. I shall beat her to death at this instant to prevent our relationship from being tainted any further.”

As he spoke, Di Feng Ling unsheathed his long sword and stepped forward. He raised it and was about to swing it toward Difuya’s head.

“Please don’t, your Majesty,” the people exclaimed.

In a flash, Zhou Weiqing held Di Feng Ling tightly, “Godfather, what are you doing? Difuya hadn’t done anything wrong either. Even if nothing had happened to the country in the first place, she had no feelings for me. Everyone has their own preferences, so it didn’t mean anything even if she doesn’t like me. There’ll be no happiness in a forced relationship. Furthermore, she had found her own happiness now, and our Heavenly Bow Empire had been successfully reclaimed. Throughout the last few years, she had been suffering as well. So, please don’t blame her.”

Di Feng Ling’s had a terrible expression, but once Zhou Weiqing held down, there would be no way for him to free himself. Under such circumstances, he could only stop his actions, and glare coldly at Difuya, “Get out! I don’t want to see you. From now onward, you’re no longer a princess of the Heavenly Bow Empire.”

Difuya was stunned. She stared at her cruel father, began to cry, and fled the scene.

Zhou Weiqing sighed. Although he had never been fond of Difuya, despite despising her, he did not wish to see such a tragic end to her. But alas, Di Feng Ling was really infuriated at the moment, so all words to coax him will be in futility.

After Difuya had left, Di Feng Ling gradually calmed down and he sighed heavily. He said, “Weiqing, I’m sorry! It’s all my fault, I’ve not taught her properly.” His emotions now could only be described as mixed feelings. If Difuya really did get married to Zhou Weiqing, he would be able to tolerate all of Zhou Weiqing’s actions. After all, the future child of Zhou Weiqing and Difuya would inherit the throne of the Heavenly Bow Empire – but what now?

In the recent days, Di Feng Ling had already educated himself with the current situation of the Heavenly Bow Empire. It could be said that this was the strongest era of the Heavenly Bow Empire in history. However, how much powers did he still have as the Emperor? This did not only refer to him; it was the same for Admiral Zhou as well. Although Zhou Weiqing had handed over all his powers immediately, they were perfectly aware that without Zhou Weiqing, nobody would be able to command the armies.

Di Feng Ling sat down and after recovering from his daze, he raised his head all of a sudden and looked at Zhou Weiqing, as if he had just made up his mind, “Weiqing, I’ve decided. Among all my children, there’s not a decent one. I’ve never appointed anyone as the prince as well. From today onward, you’re now the Prince of the Heavenly Bow Empire. In a few days’ time, I’ll officially crown you as the Prince.”

“Ah?” Zhou Weiqing was shocked and stared at Di Feng Ling in astonishment, Admiral Zhou who had been at the side had already kneeled on the ground, “Your Majesty, please reconsider.”

Zhou Weiqing quickly moved to kneel in front of Di Feng Ling too, “Godfather, all the things that I’ve done were well within my responsibilities. This is inappropriate. Furthermore, this isn’t what I desire. If you were to hand such a big country over to me, what freedom will I have left? Rest assured, I will handle the military affairs. As long as you don’t change the Marshal, and continue to place your utmost trust on Marshal Ming Yu like what I’ve done, then, I can guarantee that we Heavenly Bow will only grow stronger.”

Di Feng Ling shook his head and pulled Zhou Weiqing and Admiral Zhou up. He looked at Zhou Weiqing with affection and said, “My child, I know your heart. However, you’ve contributed so much to the empire. If I don’t do something, how can I face the people? Say no more, I’ve made up my mind. I also believe that under your ruling, the Heavenly Bow Empire will be able to become one of the strongest countries of the mainland.”

Other than possessing the highest popularity in the Heavenly Bow Empire, Zhou Weiqing had even established friendly relationships with several other big countries, including a few Great Saint Lands. If he were to rule the Heavenly Bow Empire, it would definitely bring great benefits to the country in the future. After some internal struggles, Di Feng Ling believed that he had made the most fitting decision. After uttering these words, he somehow felt relieved.

Zhou Weiqing smiled bitterly and said, “No, Godfather, please listen to what I have to say. Although I’m not willing to rule our Heavenly Bow Empire, I will never stop contributing to the country. These are my thoughts – why is the Zhongtian Empire and Wan Shou Empire so strong? It’s because they are supported by the Saint Lands. If that’s the case, why can’t we, the Heavenly Bow Empire, possess our own Saint Land?”

“Saint Land?” upon hearing these two words, Admiral Zhou and Di Feng Ling’s eyes shone.

Zhou Weiqing nodded lightly, and said, “That’s right, a Saint Land. Despite the current situation, our powers are still insufficient. However, the numbers of our Heavenly Jewel Masters are not any fewer than those big countries. Even if we’re no match for the Zhongtian Empire, we’ve surpassed the Fei Li Empire. Under a continuous nurturance, we’ll be able to grow stronger and stronger. With me and my teacher in the Saint land, we can still stand against the other Saint Lands in terms of higher-tier powers. As time goes by, I believe that we’ll grow more powerful. Furthermore, since I’m not a God Tier Master, I’m able to help the elderly Heavenly Jewel Masters to lengthen their lives. Once the news is released, I believe that not for long, we will have the scale of a Saint Land, and as for its organization, it’ll be my matters to handle. As for the country, it’ll be better for you to rule it, otherwise won’t I be considered a sinner plotting for the throne? As a citizen of Heavenly Bow Empire, it is required of me to contribute to my country. Please don’t give me a bad name!”

Upon hearing his words, Di Feng Ling’s will seemed to waver a little, and thought, “Yes, if heavenly the Bow Empire is able to have its own Saint land, it can be on the same ranks as the bigger countries!”

After some pondering, just as Di Feng Ling was about to nod in agreement, all of a sudden, a person rushed in. Without permission, the person barged straight into the main hall.

“Weiqing, this is bad, something has happened. Your Majesty, Admiral Zhou, I’m out of line, but I have urgent matters to speak to Weiqing about.”

The individual who had barged into the hall was none other than Ming Yu. It was only he who would not be blocked by the soldiers.

chapters.title: Chapter 753
chapters.body:
Chapter 753

Zhou Weiqing had never seen such an expression on Ming Yu; his face was now pale, and his body was shivering slightly. Moreover, his emotions were in a state of agitation, even to the extent that he might lose control.

“What’s the matter, Ming Yu? Don’t rush. Speak slowly,” Zhou Weiqing stood by his side immediately and supported his body while channeling a stream of Saint Energy into him.

Supported by Zhou Weiqing’s Saint Energy, Ming Yu’s emotions stabilized, albeit with a lingering pant.

Looking at Zhou Weiqing, Ming Yu’s gaze was complicated, “Weiqing, Weiqing, the Heavenly Demon Sect, the Heavenly Demon Sect has been annihilated…”

What?” Zhou Weiqing was astonished; his heart overwhelmed by bewilderment.

‘The Heavenly Demon Sect has been annihilated? What concept is this? The Heavenly Demon Sect may be the weakest among the five Great Saint Lands, but it is a Saint Land nonetheless! To aim to destroy a Saint Land when they had not received any news, how strong of a power is required? There’s no guarantee that even Heaven’s Expanse Palace will be capable of doing so,’ Zhou Weiqing thought.

At this moment, the person he thought instantly of was Little Witch, and his heart was immediately occupied by the images of Little Witch smiling.

‘If the base is destroyed, what will be left of its residents? No matter who it was who had annihilated the Heavenly Demon Sect, what will Little Witch do?’ he thought.

Ming Yu said with a bitter demeanor, “It’s the Blood Red Hell. It’s them who had attacked. I’ve just received the new as well; it happened a few days ago. A large number of Blood Red Hell powerhouses has ambushed the headquarters of the Heavenly Demon Sect in the Bai Da Empire. As the headquarters had been completely destroyed, I’m afraid not many had been able to escape. I’m still not clear on the details. Nevertheless, one thing that can be confirmed is that the Heavenly Demon Sect has suffered grave losses.”

Zhou Weiqing furrowed his eyebrows, and thought, “Blood Red Hell had actually struck the Heavenly Demon Sect at this time, and was even able to annihilate it. Wouldn’t that mean that they now possessed sufficient powers which could even put them on the same ranks as the Heaven’s Expanse Palace?”

Ming Yu sighed and said, “The initial plans of the Heavenly Demon Sect were to wait until our armies have invaded the Bai Da Empire, and then cooperate with them seamlessly to completely overthrow it, but who would have known that even before we’ve moved, we would be assaulted by Blood Red Hell?”

Zhou Weiqing said, “What do you need me to do now?

Ming Yu shook his head blankly, and said, “I don’t know either. Without knowing the situation, there’s nothing we can do.”

Zhou Weiqing took a deep breath and said, “Ming Yu, stay calm. No matter what, we, the Heavenly Bow Empire, is the support of the Heavenly Demon Sect. How about this? You try your best to contact the sect members of the Heavenly Demon Sect who’ve escaped. We’ll take all of them into our custody. Then, we’ll let them re-establish the Heavenly Demon Sect in the Heavenly Bow Empire. We must have our revenge.”

Ming Yu nodded and said, “This is the only thing we can do for now. I hope that the Sect Master can stay alive. Otherwise, it’ll be the end for Heavenly Demon Sect. Thank you, Weiqing, I’ll be taking my leave,”

While he was speaking, he bowed at Admiral Zhou and Di Feng Ling once again and left in low spirits.

Staring at King Yu’s silhouette leaving into the distance, Zhou Weiqing stood there without moving an inch; his brain spinning as it spiraled with thoughts.

The annihilation of the Heavenly Demon Sect was not a good news to Heavenly Bow Empire. The reason why Zhou Weiqing had the confidence to establish a Saint Land in Heavenly Bow Empire was due to his prior agreements with the Heavenly Demon Sect.

Once the Heavenly Bow Empire had strengthened, the Heavenly Demon Sect could come to its aid, and with the Heavenly Demon Sect in place, Zhou Weiqing would not have to be concerned about the insufficiency of the overall powers while he would be developing his Saint Land. At the very least, before the Saint Land’s development, the higher-tier powers of the Heavenly Bow Empire would be supported by the Heavenly Demon Sect.

However, now that the Heavenly Demon Sect had been eliminated, it may be bad news to Heavenly Bow Empire, but there was a denial that it was an opportunity as well. Maybe, it might be possible for the Heavenly Bow Empire to have its own Saint Land within a short span, and have its powers upgraded to a certain extent.

Di Feng Ling had stopped talking about Zhou Weiqing to inherit the throne as he discovered that the latter had long reached a height which was out of his line of vision. Such a territory like the Heavenly Bow Empire was no longer attractive to him.

After half a month, the Heavenly Bow Empire had been completely reclaimed, as it had achieved total victory in the battle of Heavenly Bow City. Seventy thousand enemies had been killed, and ten thousand of them had been captured, with most of them being taken into the empire. Some of the more stubborn ones had been murdered without hesitation. With this, the Heavenly Bow Empire’s army had once again, increased by a hundred thousand men.

Of course, these armies still required time to be organized and trained, with all of them assigned to individual parts of the original system of the Heavenly Bow Empire for expansion.

One must know that the area of the Heavenly Bow Empire was only comparable to a province of Fei Li Empire, but now, it had encompassed two hundred thousand armies, not lacking any elites.

After a month, the Emperor of the Heavenly Bow Empire had relayed his orders for the armies to advance toward the Kalise Empire.

The primary forces of the Kalise Empire had long been lost in the Heavenly Bow Empire. The Bai Da Empire had no longer given them any support, and in another month, the Kalise Empire would have been annihilated, adding to the victory of the Heavenly Bow Empire.

The total destruction of the Kalise Empire had also implied the rise of a new country. Several hundred thousands armies of the Heavenly Bow Empire were stationed at the borders, giving the perception that they would be capable of threat towards the Bai Da Empire any time. In fact, they could not mobilize any troops for the time being.

Having just seized the Kalise Empire, the Heavenly Bow Empire needed to rest and resume their military recruitment at the same time.

The Zhongtian and the Fei Li Empire had been transporting their resources endlessly into the Heavenly Bow Empire, effectively eliminating any concerns about the lack of resources. However, to sustain the life of so many armies, they needed to be self sufficient. According to the plans of Zhou Weiqing, Di Feng Ling, and the others, there would not be any major advancements in the meantime. Of course, it would only be a matter of time before they would invade the Bai Da Empire.

In these two months, the mainland was calm, with no battles in the other locations. However, the calmer it had seemed to be, the more Zhou Weiqing felt that it was a sign that something major would happen.

“Weiqing,” Ming Yu walked in; his face full of joy. They were now still in the compounds of Heavenly Bow City. Although the armies were still on guard at the former borders of the Kalise Empire, Zhou Weiqing and several other primary leaders had all returned due to an extremely important matter they needed to address.

“How is it?” Zhou Weiqing asked Ming Yu. He had now returned to stay in the Admiral House of Admiral Zhou, and his four soulmates had all joined him in staying at the Admiral House as well. However, what troubled Zhou Weiqing was the fact that since his current return, the four ladies seemed like they had come to an agreement. They had shut each of their doors upon nightfall, not allowing anyone to enter.

It was not impossible to enter by force, but Zhou Weiqing was afraid of the jealousy arising from others! Furthermore, too much had happened recently and things had only resumed its regular operations as of late. To the Heavenly Bow Empire, this was only the start as it required a great amount of time to reorganize itself. After all, to become a powerful country, it could not be done in such a short time. The biggest issue of the Heavenly Bow Empire was the instability of its foundation.

Ming Yu nodded lightly at Zhou Weiqing, and said, “They’re here, waiting outside. Only two have come.” Zhou Weiqing said, “Hurry up and invite them in. Oh, no, I’ll go with you to welcome them.”

While speaking, Zhou Weiqing pulled Ming Yu outside. Upon exiting the door, Zhou Weiqing’s footsteps had come to a stop, and could not direct his gaze away from the person before him.

Little Witch had seemed to have lost a lot of weight; she had never been plump but looked even skinnier now which aroused the sympathy of others. Her lovely face was slightly pale. The person beside her was an old man with a huge physique.

The old man appeared to be in his sixties and was rather dignified. However, a cold aura radiated from his body.

Staring at Zhou Weiqing, Little Witch was stunned momentarily, and in the next instant, her eyes had reddened. She clenched her teeth and said nothing.

Being stared at intently, full of resentment, Zhou Weiqing’s heart was uneasy. Back then at the crater, he had conquered the girl in front of him although his memory was incomplete! After that, the Heavenly Demon Sect had held its tongue, neither have they troubled him. In these recent years, Little Witch had not come looking him either.

Upon meeting Little Witch, feelings of guilt surged from Zhou Weiqing’s heart. Speeding up his footsteps, he stood before the two people, and Zhou Weiqing slightly bowed at the old man, “I, Zhou Weiqing, have arrived to meet you, your highness.”

The old man in black looked at Zhou Weiqing with a faint smile on his face, “Actually, I should’ve come to see you long ago, but there was never a good chance. I’ve heard that you’re a spectacular individual. Upon seeing you with my own eyes, it’s no doubt that the rumors are true. Even I am unable to see through your cultivation base. It’s no wonder that even Ming Yu’s pride had been conquered by you.”

Zhou Weiqing chuckled, and said, “I dare not say the word conquer. We are friends; partners as well as comrades.”

After finishing his sentence, he directed his gaze toward Little Witch, and after a pause, he said with a lowered voice, “Sorry, I… I should’ve come to see you.”

Little Witch finally could not hold back her sobs. With a turn of her body, she had leaped into the embrace of the old man in black and burst into tears.

Zhou Weiqing instantly felt awkward, and he scratched his head. He was most afraid of being in this kind of situation. Despite his intelligence, he did not know how he should handle the situation.

The old man in black sighed, and said, “Weiqing, aren’t you going to invite us in?”

“Oh, oh, how rude of me, senior. Please, do enter.”

As he spoke, he led the old man in black and Little Witch into the meeting hall of the Admiral House.

Without a doubt, this old man in black was the Sect Master of Heavenly Demon Sect, Demonic Emperor Wu Yunyue. He was the highest ruler of one of the five Great Saint Land’s Heavenly Demon Sect, and also one of the few Heavenly Emperor-tire powerhouses in the mainland. Concurrently, he was also Little Witch’s father.

A few months ago, Heavenly Demon Sect had received a destructive blow from Blood Red Hell. After the drastic disaster, only a third of the people of Heavenly Demon Sect were able to escape.

chapters.title: Chapter 754
chapters.body:
Chapter 754

The Demonic Emperor had also sustained grave injuries in the battle. He struggled for a while before he managed to escape from Bai Da Empire to the Heavenly Bow Empire. Finally, he settled down in Heavenly Bow City. Zhou Weiqing and Ming Yu had rushed back from the front lines just to meet the Demonic Emperor.

The Little Witch’s cries had died down. However, she still refrained from looking at Zhou Weiqing. She just sat at the side in utter silence with her head lowered.

Zhou Weiqing swept his gaze to her from time to time. If it was not for Wu Yunyue’s presence, he would have affectionately pulled Little Witch into his embrace. However, regardless of how thug-like he was, he did not dare to act recklessly since her father was there!

Wu Yunyue stared at Zhou Weiqing and sighed as he said, “I believe you’re aware of the matters regarding the Heavenly Demon Sect, Weiqing. I came here to discuss something with you.”

“Please go ahead, senior,” Zhou Weiqing forced himself to retract his lingering gaze on Little Witch and turned to look at Wu Yunyue.

Wu Yunyue said, “My suggestion is very simple. I hope that you’ll take over my position and become the Sect Master of the Heavenly Demon Sect.”

“What?” The one who exclaimed in shock was Ming Yu. Zhou Weiqing was equally as stunned. Even though he had some ideas regarding the purpose of the Demonic Emperor’s visit, he did not expect that those words would come out directly from the Demonic Emperor’s mouth.

As the saying went, a starved camel is still bigger than a horse. Although the Heavenly Demon Sect suffered a destructive blow, it still possessed a third of its powers. In addition to the Demonic Emperor’s Heavenly Emperor-tier cultivation, the sect was still a formidable force. As long as Demonic Emperor Wu Yunyue was still alive, who would dare say that the Heavenly Demon Sect no longer existed? However, for Wu Yunyue to want to give away these powers of his at this time, how would Zhou Weiqing and Ming Yu not be surprised?

It seemed like Little Witch had known about her father’s decision all along. She remained defeated at the side, still keeping quiet.

Zhou Weiqing inhaled deeply and said, “Why do you say that, senior? What favors do you want?”

Wu Yunyue shook his head and said, “I’m not asking for any troublesome favors. I just hope that after you’ve inherited the position of the sect master of the Heavenly Demon Sect, you’ll continue to lead the Heavenly Demon Sect towards strength. At the same time, I wish that your future child with Yuehan will inherit the Heavenly Demon Sect as well. These are two of my simple wishes. The other matters won’t require our attention.”

There were no flaws in Wu Yunyue’s two wishes. The conditions he had proposed was just like the one Zhou Weiqing had proposed to Shangguan Tianyang in Heaven’s Expanse Palace. The difference was Wu Yunyue was planning to give away the Saint Land beforehand. And as for the Heaven’s Expanse Palace, Zhou Weiqing maintained a passive stance. One could imagine the differences between these two individuals.

Zhou Weiqing smiled bitterly and said, “Senior, you think too highly of me. Do you really believe that I’m capable of controlling one of the Saint Lands?”

Wu Yunyue smiled softly and said, “Of course you are. Before meeting you in person, I had my doubts. But now, I’ve made up my mind. You possess the Evil Attribute within you. It’s the purest Evil Attribute. I believe that the Heavenly Demon Sect will definitely grow stronger in your hands. It’ll only head towards destruction in my hands. You’ll be the Sect Master of the Heavenly Demon Sect, and I’m willing to be your assistant. At the same time, I assure you that all your commands will be obeyed by everyone in the Heavenly Demon Sect. That includes me as well. What do you think?”

Staring at Wu Yunyue, Zhou Weiqing’s eyes were filled with hesitation. At this time, Little Witch gradually lifted her head. Her eyes that were swollen from crying subconsciously looked at him. There was a glimmer of hope in her eyes.

If Zhou Weiqing accepted the Heavenly Demon Sect, it would mean that there was a real chance for her. All these years, she had not been living well. Ever since she formed a relationship with Zhou Weiqing, she had been waiting for him to find her. However, she could not even find a trace of him. Little Witch also understood that Zhou Weiqing had too much to do in these years. Therefore, even though she had cried upon seeing him, she did not really blame him.

She who had been born in one of the Saint Lands knew clearly what was most important to a man. If it was not for the disaster that befell the Heavenly Demon Sect, she might not have met him so soon.

Wu Yunyue sighed softly and said, “Weiqing, the remaining powers of the Heavenly Demon Sect may not be much. However, I strongly believe that we’re still of use to the Heavenly Bow Empire. As long as you agree to be the Sect Master, the entire Heavenly Demon Sect will join the Heavenly Bow Empire. I think this is also essential to your country. Go ahead and raise any terms that you have.”
